french_terms: Affilié du site Web | affilié du site de la toile | affilié
definition_kin: Umufatanyabikorwa utangaza umurongo uhuza abasura urubuga rwe, abasomyi b’urubuga rwe cyangwa urubuga rwe nkoranyambaga.
Abashyitsi basuye urubuga rwa murandasi, bakaba barugarutseho.
Abasuye urubuga rwa murandasi bwa mbere.

Ingenamikorere cyangwa urufunguzo rwihariye ruranga ahantu habitswe amakuru yihariye mu mbikamakuru ya mudasobwa cyangwa y’ihuzanzira nyamibare, yifashisha inzungano n’inkoranabuhanga bishobora gutahura, kubona cyangwa kugarura amakuru ku buryo buhamye.
Igice cy’umubare ndanga wa mudasobwa cyangwa w’igikoresho cy’ihuzanzira cyerekana agace k’ihuzanzira kiri hamwe n’irindi huzanzira ryagutse.
Uburyo bw’itumanaho bukoresha ibikoresho by’itumanaho mu kohereza ubutumwa ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, urugero: info.
Ahantu hagenwe aho iboneka rya serivisi z’itumanaho riri hasi, aho serivisi ya murandasi ifite umuvuduko wa 100 Mbps kugeza kuri 20 Mbps.
Urwungano rwigenga mu nkoranabuhanga rufite ibyiciro byinshi bikenera urwinjiriro rwihariye n’isohokero riteguwe n’inzira izwi.
Agaciro gato k'amakuru gakomoka ku makuru menshi, gakoreshwa mu kumenya amakosa ashobora kubaho mu gihe cyo kohereza amakuru cyangwa kuyabika.

english_terms: Code page value | character Set | encoding
french_terms: Valeur de codes | jeu de caractères | codage
definition_kin: Umumaro umwanya ugira muri mudasobwa ukaba ushobora guhagararamo ishusho, ijwi cyangwa inyuguti.
Ubwoko bwa sisiteme ya anteni y’icyogajuru bufite ubushobozi bwo guhuza n’icyogajuru ikuraho amakuru hatitawe ku ngendo zacyo mu kirere.
Igikoresho cyifashishwa mu mu guhuza no gutandukanya insinga z’ihuzanzira zinyuzwa mu butaka.

Inkoranabuhanga ikora incamake koranabuhanga, ikagira ububiko bumwe rukumbi ishyiramo incamake z’inyandiko, z’ubushakashatsi, muri make ibyo ugomba kwibuka kugira ngo ucunge urugo rwawe, akazi kawe cyangwa ibyo ugomba kwibuka ku ishuri.
Zimwe mu ntambwe ziteguye zinyurwamo mu gihe cyo kwandika porogaramu za mudasobwa.

english_terms: Email box | e-mailbox | electronic mailbox | mailbox
french_terms: Boîte aux lettres électronique | boîte de messagerie | boîte e-mail | boîte aux lettres e-mail | boîte e-mail | messagerie
definition_kin: Ububiko bw’ikoranabuhanga bwakira, bugashyingura bukanacunga ubutumwa koranabuhanga bw’ukoresha ikoranabuhanga.
Akarango gashyirwa ahagana ibumoso h’ikirahure kuri mudasobwa hagamijwe kwerekana ibiri muri mudasobwa.

Ishusho igaragara ku ndebero ya mudasobwa ikerekana inkoranabuhanga ikoreshwa, igikoresho nkoranabuhanga cyangwa indi nshoza cyangwa imiterere yihariye ifite icyo isobanuye ku muntu ukoresha mudasobwa.
Urutonde rwa aderesi za imeri zose ukoresha kenshi.

Akantu gakoreshwa mu kugenda wihuse ku rupapuro mu byerekezo byose by’indebero, kakereka ukoresha mudasobwa aho ari bushyire icyo ashaka kongera mu byo yandika cyangwa yakoraga kuri urwo rupapuro cyangwa aho icyo ashaka gukora kiri bukorerwe, gakunda. kuba kari mu isura ry’ikiganza cyangwa ikimenyetso cyo guteranya ku makarita.

Akagurudumu kaba ku mbeba ya mudasobwa kakagira umumaro wo kuzamura cyangwa kumanura ifishiye, akenshi gakoze muri pulasitiki ikomeye iriho agakawucu, kakaba hagati y’imfatamakuru mwikarago iri mu mbeba.
Urukuta (ipaji) rubanza ku rubuga, aho urusuye agomba kunyura, bigafasha kwereka urusuye aho yanyura bitewe n’ibyo akeneye.
Ahantu hose hagerwa n’ihuzanzira n’indi miyoboro ya murandasi, bikagaragazwa n’ingano y’abantu bashobora kubona no kwakira uburyo bw’ihuzanzira kuri telefoni zabo cyangwa mudasobwa.
Ahantu hashobora gusobanurwa hifashishijwe ibisobanuro byanditse ari byo imibare y’inyabubiri, hakarangwa no kugira indanga, korohereza ibika ry’amakuru cyangwa kuyabona.
Akadirishya ko mu rwungano rushushanya kuri mudasobwa, gashyirwamo amagambo mbere yo kuyajyana aho agenewe.

Uruganiriro rushyirwa ku ishusho cyangwa ifoto (GUI) haba hameze nk’urukiramende, hashobora kwimurwa cyangwa guhindurirwa ingano, hagakoreshwa mu kwandikamo, guhindura ibyanditse cyangwa kwerekana inyandiko, bigafasha abakoresha mudasobwa gukorana n’inkoranabuhanga cyangwa urubuga rwa mudasobwa umuntu yandika inyandiko, ayishyiraho cyangwa akaba yayisoma.

Agakoresho ko mu ikoranabuhanga kakira gusa, gakoreshwa mu kubika igihe gito amashanyarazi, kakagira ahantu hashashe habiri ntwaramashanyarazi hatandukanywa n’inkumiramashanyarazi (ibumba, purasitiki,…).

Uburyo bw’imikorere y’igikoresho gitotoniki, twavuga nka telefoni, aho icyo gikoresho kitajya ku ihuzanzira nziramugozi, bityo ntigishobore kohereza cyangwa kwakira amakuru (guhamagara, ubutumwa), ndetse ntigishobore gufata murandasi arikoi kikaba gishobora gukomeza gukoreshwa ku bundi buryo.
Ahantu ubanziriza kuri mudasobwa harimo ibikoresho by’ibanze byo guhindura no gutunganya inyandiko.
Akantu gashyirwaho za mugabuzi cyangwa ibindi bikoresho by’ihuzanzira akenshi karangwa no kugira imyanya igerekeranye.

english_terms: Payment terminal | Card machine | Credit card machine
definition_kin: Igikoresho cyifashishwa mu bucuruzi mu kwishyura mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga no gukora ibikorwa bya serivisi za banki.

english_terms: Alert Dialog Box | Dialog box | Alert Box
french_terms: Boîte de dialogue d'alerte | boîte de dialogue | boîte d'alerte | boîte de message
definition_kin: Akadirishya kizana ku ndebero kugira ngo kakumenyeshe ko mudasobwa yawe yenda kugira icyo ikora gishobora kugira ingaruka zangiza, bityo ukaba ugomba guhitamo ikigomba gukorwa ari cyo kuyemerera cyangwa kuyihakanira.
Ingaragaza ihumbaguza, igaragara ku ndebero, ikagaragaza aho inyandiko yandikwa, ihindurwa cyangwa yongerwamo ikintu.

english_terms: Wireless local area network (WLAN) | wireless LAN
definition_kin: Umuyoboro wa murandasi udakoresha umugozi ahubwo ukoresha amajwi ya radiyo, ugahuza za mudasobwa cyangwa ibindi bikoresho bihuriye ku nzira imwe hakoreshejwe amajwi aho hafi nko mu nzu, mu ishuri, muri raboratwari ya mudasobwa, ikigo cya kaminuza cyangwa mu nyubako yagenewe ibiro.
Akarongo gashyirwa mu ruhande rwa mudasobwa kerekana uko ukoresha mudasobwa ari kuzamura cyangwa se amanura urupapuro rwe.
Akantu kizengurukije gashobora kwikunja kaba mu ndangururamajwi cyangwa mu muzindaro kagatuma byirangira bigatanga amajwi yumvikana kurushaho.

english_terms: Access control protocol | controlled access protocol
definition_kin: Ikintu shingiro mu mutekano w’amakuru, kigena ufite uburenganzira bwo kugera ku makuru no ku mutungo w’ikigo no kubikoresha.
Itegeko rya mudasobwa rikoresha imiyoboro ikenewe kugira ngo habashe gukorwa igikorwa kimwe cy’umurimo wa mudasobwa, cyane cyane mu gihe hakorwa itegeko ryo mu rurimi rwa mashini.

french_terms: Protocole d'accès léger aux répertoires. Ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa
definition_kin: Amabwiriza mashya agenga imitangire ya serivisi ziboneka kuri murandasi. Amaguru ya kamera (amaguru ya kamera)
Ihindura mu mibare, isesengura, ibika n’isomwa ry’amajwi hakoreshejwe urwungano koranabuhanga.
Ibishobora kuboneka uko byaba biteye kose hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga.

Amakuru ayo ari yo yose yerekeye ufatika uriho uzwi cyangwa ushobora kumenyekana, haba ku bijyanye n’indanga mbonera (amazina, inomero ndangamuntu) cyangwa indanga nziguro (aderesi yihariye kuri murandasi, indanga ya kuki, amakuru ndangahantu) bifasha gutahura umuntu uwo ari we cyangwa kumenya aho akerereye.

Amakuru agaragaza isanomuzi y’umuntu, uko ubuzima bwe buhagaze ko yafunzwe cyangwa atafunzwe, dosiye ye yo kwa muganga, inkomoko ye mu muryango, imyemerere ye ishingiye ku idini cyangwa ku mitekerereze, ibitekerezo bye bya politiki, amakuru ndangasano cyangwa ay’imiterere ye, ay’ubuzima bw’imibonano mpuzabitsina cyangwa umwirondoro w’umuryango.
Amakuru aremereye ashobora gufata umwanya munini ku bubiko bwa mudasobwa ndetse no mu gihe cyo kuyahererekanya bigafata umwanya munini bitewe n'imiterere y'ayo makuru.
Ibiranga umuntu bikubiyemo ifoto igaragaza mu maso, ibikumwe n’ishusho y’imboni.
Amakuru yoherezwa cyangwa yakirwa atangiwe kuri telefoni ku buryo bw’inziramugozi telefoni idahujwe na WI-FI ahubwo ikoresheje amayinite yaguzwe.
Amakuru yakusanyijwe neza, agasukurwa, agashyirwaho ibisobanuro (labels), kandi agatunganywa mu miterere ikwiriye ku buryo ashobora gukoreshwa byoroshye mu
Amakuru yose adafite aho ahuriye n’umuntu tuvuge nk’amakuru y’iteganyagihe.
Inyandiko, imibare, amafoto, amajwi, videwo n’ibindi bintu bibikwa, bitunganywa cyangwa bikoherezwa hakoreshejwe sisitemu ya mudasobwa.
Amakuru agaragaza amakuru bwite cyangwa ay'ingenzi nk'ubuzima, imyizerere cyangwa ibitekerezo bya politiki.
Amakuru ateguwe ku buryo agaragaza ihuzanzira cyangwa amasano ari hagati ibikoresho.

Ubwumvikane hagati y’abantu babiri cyangwa ibigo bibiri ku buryo mbonezamikorere bwa mudasobwa bugenwe ku buryo y’iyo mudasobwa yikoresha hagati yabyo hatagize undi wa gatatu uzamo kandi igisubizo kikaba cyizewe ko ari cyo.
Uburyo bwo gusakaza amashusho mu gihe nyacyo.

english_terms: Airtime credit | Prepaid mobile plan | Mobile airtime | Airtime payment | Airtime charge
french_terms: Crédit de communication | credit | temps d'antenne
definition_kin: Uburyo bwahanzwe bw’amafaranga akoreshwa kuri telefoni aho umuntu atanga amafaranga agahabwa igihe cyo kuvugira kuri telefoni ye.
Ikoranabuhanga ryifashishwa mu kwakira cyangwa kohereza imiraba y’itumanaho nk’iya radiyo, televiziyo, telefoni zigendanwa, murandasi cyangwa itumanaho nziramugozi.
Ubwoko w’anteni yakira imiraba nsakazamakuru ituruka mu byerekezo byose.
Ubwoko w’anteni yakira imiraba nsakazamakuru ituruka gusa ku cyerekezo yerekejweho.
Igikoresho gishyirwa hanze cyangwa hejuru y’inzu kugira ngo gihure n’umuraba w’icyogajuru mu kirere, kikakira cyangwa kigashyira hanze ibimenyetso by’itumanaho.

Ubwoko bw’anteni y’igisahani ifite ibara ry’umweru ikoreshwa mu kwakira no kohereza imiraba y’itumanaho hagati y’Isi n’icyogajuru cy’itumanaho kiri mu kirere, ku buryo ibasha kwihanganira ubushyuhe bwinshi n’imihindagurikire y’ikirere.

english_terms: Earth station antenna | Ground satellite antenna
french_terms: Antenne de station terrestre | Antenne satellite terrestre
definition_kin: Ubwoko bw’anteni nini iba ku butaka yakira kandi ikohereza imiraba y’itumanaho hagati yayo n’icyogajuru kiri mu kirere.

Ubwoko bw’anteni ifite ishusho nk’iyisahani ishyirwa hanze y’inzu cyangwa ku nkingi, igakoreshwa mu kwakira no kohereza imiraba nsakazamakuru hagati y’ibikoresho by’itumanaho n’icyogajuru kiri mu kirere, ishobora kwakira cyangwa kohereza ibimenyetso nsakazamakuru bya radiyo mu buryo bw’uruhande rwose, bivuze ko itayobora ku cyerekezo kimwe gusa.
Igikoresho mfamajwi cyangwa amashusho gifite utwuma tugishamitseho gishyirwa ku cyerekezo runaka kugira ngo kiyobore cyangwa gikomeze ibimenyetso mu cyerekezo kimwe gusa, aho kuba mu mpande zose.
Ubwoko bw’inkoranabuhanga ikoreshwa mu gukumira, gushakisha, gutahura no gusiba virusi muri mudasobwa.
Indundo y’amayinite akenewe kugira ngo ukoreshe murandasi.

english_terms: Digital Banking | Electronic Banking | E-Banking, Online Banking
french_terms: Banque numérique | Sytème bancaire électronique | banque à distance
definition_kin: Gukoresha mudasobwa, telefoni zigendanwa, imashini za ATM cyangwa murandasi mu gukora ibikorwa bya banki utiriwe usura ishami rya banki.
Igikorwa cyo gukora ibikorwa by’imari hifashishijwe ibikoresho bigendnwa nka telefoni.

Urukurikirane rw’imyanya nyantera ifite umumaro wo gushyirwamo amakuru nk’amashusho, amajwi cyangwa uruvange rw’ibitangazwa, ikagira agaciro ku ipaji ka zeru (0), umwanya nyantera ugizwe n’imyanya nkoranabuhanga 8.

Itsinda rya bibiri rifatwa nk’ikintu kimwe, kuko nyakamwe ya bayiti ingana na 0 cyangwa 1 habaho uburyo bune ari bwo 00, 11, 01 na 10 buboneka hahereye kwikurikiranya rya za nyakamwe ari zo 00, 01, 10 na 11.
Igice cyo gupima umuvuduko w'ibimenyetso cyangwa umubare w'impinduka zidasanzwe mu kimenyetso kuri buri sogonda.
Akamenyetso kaba ku rubaho rwa mudasobwa kifashishwa mu guhinduranya ibimenyetso mu mibare.
Akabuto kaba kuri porogaramu cyangwa ku idirishya, gakunzwe kugaragazwa n’inyuguti “X”, gakoreshwa mu gufunga idirishya, agasanduku k’ikiganiro cyangwa porogaramu.

synonym_kin: Incapisho (incapiisho); buto yo gusohora (buto yô gusohora).
definition_kin: Akantu ko kuri mucapyi gatangiza igikorwa cyo gusohora inyandiko.
Akantu gakoreshwa mu gufunga inyandiko cyangwa porogaramu kuri mugaragaza.
Ubushobozi bwo kumva no kugira ibyiyumvo, nko kumva ububabare, ibyishimo cyangwa ubwoba.

synonym_kin: Agace nyatsa (agacê nyatsa); impagurutsa (impagûrutsa).
definition_kin: Icyiciro cya mbere cy’imbikamakuru ruziga, akaba ari ahantu hihariye
Ikinyabumwe cy’ibara (kubara) rya bayiti mu ikoranabuhanga kingana na jigabiyiti miriyari imwe.
Fishiye ya porogaramu ikoreshwa mu gucunga imeri n’amakuru y’umuntu ku giti cye.
Fishiye ukoresha mudasobwa aba aheruka gufungura mu gihe gishize.
Amakuru ayo ari yo yose yashyinguwe cyangwa yoherejwe ku buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga, akaba yakoreshwa mu rwego rwo gushaka amakuru yifashishwa n’ubutabera cyangwa y’ubushinjacyaha.

Amakuru ayo ari yo yose akurwa mu bikorwa byo ku ihuzanzira akoreshwa mu kugaragaza cyangwa mu guhakana ikintu gikekwa ko cyabaye mu rwego rwo gushaka amakuru yifashishwa n’ubutabera cyangwa y’ubushinjacyaha.
Igikorwa cyo kohereza inyandiko muri mucapyi kugira ngo isohoke ku mpapuro.
Guhuza ibyiciro bibiri by’ibikoresho bikarumana hagamijwe kohererezanya amakuru biciye mu nzira nkoranabuhanga ntwaramakuru.
Gutandukanya ibikoresho bibiri byari birumanye mu rwego rwo guhererekanya amakuru yanyuraga mu nzira nkoranabuhanga ntwaramakuru, ava mu gikoresho kimwe ajya mu kindi.
Igikorwa cyo gufata
Gufunga porogaramu zose zirimo gukora.
Guhaha wifashishije tekiniki z’itumanaho cyangwa za radiyo.
Guhabwa umubare w’ibanga mushya igihe uwari usanzwe wibagiranye, wibwe cyangwa ushaka kuwuhindura ku mpamvu z’umutekano.
Ukuba amakuru y’ibanga cyangwa yihariye ashyizwe ahagaragara, yaba ku bushake cyangwa ku buryo butateganyijwe.
Gutoranya inyandiko cyangwa ikintu kugira ngo gikoreshweho igikorwa runaka.
Igikorwa cyo gukuraho inyandiko wahisemo ukayishyira mu bubiko bw’igihe gito.
Ugufata kopi y’inyandiko wahisemo utayikuye aho yari iri.
Uburyo bwo gukura igikoresho cyakira amakuru kuri murandasi ku buryo bw’itumanaho kugira ngo kidakomeza gukoreshwa cyangwa ngo gikorweho imirimo y’ikoranabuhanga.
Inshingano yo gutanga serivisi z’ibanze z’itumanaho, ku nyungu za rubanda kandi ku giciro gikwiye.
Uburyo bwo gutiza ihuzanzira rya murandasi ibindi bikoresho nka telefoni yindi, mudasobwa ngendanwa nto cyangwa mudasobwa isanzwe iturutse kuri telefoni hakoreshejwe amayinite.
Uburyo bwo gushakisha inyandiko cyangwa amakuru mu bubiko hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga.
Igikorwa cyo kohereza inyandiko cyangwa amakuru ku buryo bwemewe ngo bisuzumwe bifatirwe icyemezo.
Uburyo bwo gushyira amakuru arimo inyandiko, amafoto, amashusho n'amajwi bitunganyije ku miyoboro itandukanye y'imbuga nkoranyambaga ku mpamvu zo kubicuruza ku mbuga nkoranyambaga.
Igikorwa cyo gufata cyangwa kubika amakuru hifashishijwe igikoresho nka sikaneri.
Igikorwa cyo kuva muri konti wari winjiyemo.
Ihanagurwa ry’ibyari muri mudasobwa byose ndetse na sisitemu zari zirimo na zo zigakurwamo, hagashyirwamo sisitemu nshyashya.
Igikorwa cyangwa urukurikirane rw’ibikorwa bikorerwa amakuru bwite y’umuntu byaba bikozwe cyangwa bitakozwe ku buryo bwikora.
Kimwe mu bikorwa by’ukoresha mudasobwa aho yimura akayoborambeba akajyana ahantu runaka ku irebero hanyuma agakanda akarango k’imbeba cyangwa k’ikindi gikoresho cya mudasobwa kiranga.
Kurinda icyahungababanya ikumira ryemewe ku iyinjira n’igaragazamakuru hakubiyemo uburyo bwo kurinda ubuzima bwite n’amakuru yihariye.
Amakuru atangazwa kandi bitatangiwe uburenganzira kandi bikaba byateza igihombo cyangwa ingorane ikomeye cyane yo mu rwego rw’umutekano w’igihugu. Ibanga ry’amakuru (ibaanga ry’âmakurû)
Uburyo bwo gushyira amakuru muri sisitemu ya mudasobwa.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya inyandiko butuma inyuguti zihengamira iburyo kugira ngo zitandukane n’izisanzwe.
Ibibazo bititezwe inkoranabuhanga isanzwe ikora yazagira iramutse ihinduwe cyangwa ntijye igera ku ntego cyangwa byombi bikaba.
Amakuru agaragarira mu kirahure cy’irebero rya mudasobwa.

Igikoresho gitunganywa n’uruganda rwa Mikorosofuti cyorohereza abakora bakanarema imbuga zigiye zitandukanye gukora porogaramu zifashishwa mu gucuranga amajwi n’amashusho ndetse no kugaragaza amafoto.
Ibikoresho bifatika nka mudasobwa, ikigega mpuzamakuru, intanganzira, telefoni igezweho (simatifoni), bigahurira ku gucunga ububiko bw’amakuru.

english_terms: Networking hardware | network equipment | computer networking devices
french_terms: Matériel de réseautage | équipement de réseau | périphérique de réseau informatique
definition_kin: Ibikoresho bya eregitoronike biba ari ngombwa kugira ngo itumanaho n’isangiramakuru hagati y’ibikoresho by’ihuzanzira, ari byokohererezanya amakuru mu ihuzanzira ry’ikoranabuhanga.
Ibikoresho cyangwa serivisi bigamije kwereka abandi nyir’umukono koranabuhanga.
Ibikoresho byiyongera kuri mudasobwa bikayifasha kongera ubushobozi. Hari nk’imbeba, urwandikiro, mucapyi cyangwa indebero.
Ibikoresho byose byitabazwa by’umwihariko mu miyoboro rusange y’itumanaho koranabuhanga.

Sisitemu zifatika nk’insinga z’ihuzanzira, iminara y’itumanaho n’inkoranabuhanga (inkusanyamakuru ya murandasi, ibigo ntangamakuru, na mudasobwa bwite) bikoreshwa mu guhuza za mudasobwa n’abakoresha murandasi, ibyo bikorwa bigatuma habaho itumanaho kuri murandasi.
Ibintu shingiro bifatika hamwe n’uburyo bukenewe bw’ikoranabuhanga bikoreshwa mu gutanga ibicuruzwa na serivisi, twavuga nk’ibigo by’ amakuru, sisitemu y’imikorere n’ibindi.
Umwanya w’ububiko ufite izina urimo umubare ushobora guhinduka mu gihe hariho hakorwa gahunda ya mudasobwa.

Ikoranabuhanga nyamwikoresha rituma hemezwa hakanatahurwa ibimenyetso by’umubiri w’umuntu nk’ ibimenyetso by’intoki, indiba y’ijisho, imbengeza y’amaso, ingero mbonera z’ijwi, ingero mbonera zo mu maso n’ibipimo by’ibiganza.
Uburyo bwo gushyira ibimenyetso ku makuru, kugira ngo werekane ibyo ushaka ko mudasobwa yawe yiga cyangwa iteganya.

Imikoranire yihariye cyangwa uruhurirane rw’ibikenerwa byifashishwa mu nzungano n’imikorere koranabuhanga harimo ibigenderwaho nk’ibiranga umukoreshabuhanga, inzira y’imikorere n’amakuru agenewe abaturage.
Ahantu cyangwa uburyo byorohereza abantu gukora bifashishije ikoranabuhanga.

Igikoresho gikozwe n’ibiye rishyigikiwe n’ikintu kirimo imfatamakuru zibona izunguruka ryaryo ku nsanganya (axe) ebyiri, kikaba gikoreshwa n’intoki mu kwimura akanyerezo ngaragazahantu ku irebero rya mudasobwa.
Ikosa riri hagati y’ukuri kw’ibiboneka n’ikomeza kugaruka rikaboneka mu rugero rwigirwaho nyirizina bitewe n’inkeko zikocamye mu rugendo rwo kwigiraho kwa mudasobwa.

english_terms: Computer aided acquisition and logistic support | continuous acquisition and life cycle support
definition_kin: Uburyo bw’ikoranabuhanga buhuza amakuru y’ihanga, ikora, iyamamaza n’igemura ry’ibicuruzwa no kubungabunga inganda.
Itondekanya mbonera ry’amakuru mu isura yubakitse kugira ngo horoshywe ishakisha, isesengura n’isobanura ryayo.

english_terms: Logic programming | logic code | logic language
french_terms: Langage de programmation logique | programmation logique | code logique | langage logique
definition_kin: Igenamikorere y’ikigega cy’amakuru n’igaragazashuho y’ubumenyi rishingiye ku mbonezamitekerereze mbonera harimo gushyiraho gahunda ziboneye zitanga ibisubizo ku bibazo byihariye binyuze mu guha hakoreshejwe ibonezamitekerereze ku rurimi mbonera rwa mudasobwa hakaboneka igisubizo cyifujwe.
Amategeko n’imiterere yihariye iyobora imyandikire y’ururimi rwa mudasobwa mu rurimi rw’ibonezamikorere bituma mudasobwa ishobora kurwumva no kurukoresha.
Gucunga amadosiye bikubiyemo kwita amazina, kubika no gutunganya amadosiye muri sisitemu cyangwa porogaramu kugira ngo byorohere kuyashakisha.

synonym_kin: Icikagurika rya murandasi (icîikagurika ryaa mûraandasî); kuvaho (kuvahô).
definition_kin: Kubura murandasi cyangwa kuba icikagurika bitewe n’inyoboragikoresho itakigezweho cyangwa yangiritse kubera amavirusi cyangwa se iyo inkoranabuhanga iriho ikoreshwa kimwe na modemu ndetse n’intanganzira bidaheruka kuvugururwa.

synonym_kin: Imbarutso (imbârutso); buto yo kwatsa (buto yô kwaatsa), incanyi (incâanyi).
french_terms: Bouton de démarrage | bouton démarrer | bouton d’alimentation
definition_kin: Akantu ka mbere kuri mudasobwa bakanda iyo batsa cyangwa bazimya mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho koranabuhanga.

french_terms: Bouton de commande | bouton poussoir | Bouton
definition_kin: Igikoresho ngenzuzi giha uri gukoresha mudasobwa uburyo bworoshye bwo gutangiza igikorwa nko gushaka igisabwa mu nshakishamakuru cyangwa gukorana n’agatangazo menyesha, twavuga nko kwemeza igikorwa.

Akarango kaba ku ruhande rwa telefoni zigezweho cyangwa irebero mudasobwa, ikagira umumaro wo kwatsa no kuzimya cyangwa kongera no kugabanya ijwi, hari n’ubwo gahabwa undi mumaro, kuri mudasâobwa zo muri iki gihe aka karango kari mu mashini mo imbere, mu itendekamikorere.

Amabwiriza atangwa n’ukoresha mudasobwa akoresheje ijwi kugira ngo inkoranabuhanga nkorabikorwa ikore umurimo runaka, bukaba ari uburyo umuntu aganiramo na robo mu buryo busa n’ikiganiro gisanzwe, bityo bikongera imikorere myiza n’uburyo bworoshye bwo gukoresha sisitemu bakoresheje ijwi ryabo aho gukoresha intoki.
Itegeko rituma abakoresha mudasobwa basohora inyandiko zanditseho handitswe inyandiko yagaragara mu mashini, bikaba byakorwa ku nzungano nkoresha zitandukanye.

Imbonezamibare ibona utunyangingo foto tw’ishusho tujyanye n’ibara cyangwa n’uruhurirane rw’amabara runaka, utwo tunyangingo tukaba twahindurwa bikenewe kugira ngo dutandukanywe n’ibindi bisigaye by’ishusho.
Umubare wose w’amapaji abantu barebye kuri murandasi.
Ahantu ho kubika ubutumwa mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga aho wakira kandi ukabika ubutumwa bwinjira, nka za email, amatangazo cyangwa ubutumwa butaziguye, bitewe n'urubuga cyangwa serivisi ukoresha.

Amakuru cyangwa amabwiriza byinjizwa muri gahunda ya mudasobwa hagamijwe gutuma ikora, twavuga nko gukoresha urwandikiro, gukanda imbeba cyangwa gukoresha inyoboramajwi, hakajyamo uvuye ku nyandiko ukagera ku bikomeye nko gufata amashusho cyangwa amajwi.

Agaciro gatuma ingenamikorere ya mudasobwa igera ku makuru yihariye ku buryo buziguye (twavuga nk’agaciro k’umubare cyangwa ibyafashwe amajwi cyangwa amashusho) ari mu mbikamakuru ya mudasobwa cyangwa mu kindi gikoresho kibika amakuru.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya inyandiko bushyira umurongo munsi y’inyandiko.
Uburyo bwo gukora ibintu bifatika bifite ingano eshatu hongerwaho ibikoresho ku byiciro hashingiwe ku gishushanyo cyo kuri mudasobwa.
Imikorere cyangwa igikorwa cyo guhina cyangwa gukuraho igice cy'amakuru cyangwa amakuru amwe kugira ngo ugabanye uburebure cyangwa ubunini bwayo.
Tekiniki yo

Gucunga ijambo ry’ibanga n’uruhererekane rw’amahame n’ibikorwa byiza abakoresha bagomba gukurikiza mu gihe babitse kandi bagacunga ijambo ry’ibanga neza kugira ngo babungabunge umutekano ushoboka kandi birinde kubuza kwinjira.
Uburyo bwo gucunga amakuru bikubiyemo gukusanya, kubika no gukoresha amakuru mu buryo bwizewe, bunoze.
Itangwa rya serivisi y’imari n’imikoranire y’amasoko y’imari hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga ry’itumanaho n’iry’ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa.

synonym_kin: Impanuka (impanuka); icyitonderwa (icyiîtoonderwa).
definition_kin: Ukuba urwungano rutari gukora neza bitewe n’ikibuza kitari giteganyijwe kibonetse kuri mudasobwa.
Igikorwa kitemewe n’amategeko gikorerwa kuri murandasi cyangwa hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga.
Igikorwa kinyuranyije n’amategeko gikorwa hakoreshejwe mudasobwa cyangwa imiyoboro yayo.

synonym_kin: Ikiraro huzanzira (ikiraro huuzanzira); ipfundo huzanzira (ipfûundo huuzanzira).
french_terms: Passerelle | pont réseau | Pontage de réseau
definition_kin: Ahahurirwa n’ihuzanzira ritandukanye hakoreshwa mu itumanaho, hagahuza ihuzanzira ebyiri zifite imbonezanzira nyoherezamakuru zitandukanye.
Uburyo bufasha kugenzura no guhuza imikoranire hagati ya serivisi nyinshi z’ikoranabuhanga mu buryo butekanye.
Imashini icunga imfatahuzanzira hagati ihuzanzira zikora imbonezanzira zitandukanye z’itumanaho cyangwa se itumanaho hagati y’ihuzanzira ritandukanye zikoresha imbonezanzira imwe.
Inyandiko yoherezwa muri imeyiri igamije gusuzuma niba ukoresha konti ariwe nyirayo cyangwa akoreraho ubucuruzi bwizewe.

english_terms: Secure sockets layer certificate (SSL) | SSL certificate | secure certificate | certificate
definition_kin: Icyemezo cy’ikoranabuhanga cyemeza umwirondoro w’urubuga kandi kigatuma habaho guhuza urubuga n’umukoresha.

synonym_kin: Iringaniza nkeshafoto (iriinganiza nkeeshafoto); icyesha ndinganizafoto (icyêesha ndiinganizafoto).
definition_kin: Uburyo

Igikoresho cyihariye kandi cyubatse ku buryo hari ibiruta ibindi bikoze icyuma nyaruhererekane cyangwa ikoranabuhanga rya murandasi, kikaba gishinzwe kuyobora imimaro, amategeko n’imikoranire yihariye mu ihuzanzira.
Agace nyurabwenge kagena imbonezanzira zisangiwe z’itumanaho n’imikorere y’uruganiriro ikoreshwa n’abakoresha ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho.

Inzira ntwaramakuru yo ku rwego rwa kane mu buryo bw’itumanaho bwa OSI butanga igisubizo cyuzuye ku ntangiriro no ku iherezo mu ihererekanyamakuru ryizewe hagati y’abantu babiri kuko rikoreshwa mu ntangiriro no mu iherezo ry’ihererekanyamakuru IP.
Igikoresho gihuza kikabika amakuru yose ahererekanywa mu duce dutandukanye tw’isi hifashishijwe ibikoresho by'itumanaho.
Ububiko bubamo kopi za imeri zose wohereje.
Icyumba cyubatswe mu nyubako aho sosiyete yakora itumanaho rigezweho n’ibikoresho byose by’urusobe.
Ahantu hagenewe kwakira abantu bashaka gukoresha murandasi batanze ubwishyu.
Uburyo butuma bidashoboka kugera ku ifishiye cyangwa ku yandi makuru.

synonym_kin: Ikare ya konti (ikare yâ koônti); ikumiranzira (ikumiiranzira).
definition_kin: Imikorere izana umutekano w’ibanze ishyirirwaho kubuza abagerageza gutwara ijambo banga ku ngufu.
Uburyo bwa tekiniki bukoreshwa mu gutuma ibikubiye mu makuru bidasomeka k’uwo ariwe wese atagenewe.
Uburyo bukoresha ikoranabuhanga cyangwa murandasi
Agace ka ekara kagaragaza amakuru yerekeye porogaramu runaka.
Agaciro k’amafaranga kaba kari ku kintu gikora ku buryo bw‘ikoranabuhanga nk’ikarita yabugenewe cyangwa konti iri kuri murandasi, kagahagararira amafaranga nyakuri (ibiceri n’inoti) tugendana.
Uburyo bwo kohereza cyangwa kwakira amafaranga hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga, hagati y’abantu babiri, ukoresheje telefoni cyangwa porogaramu ya banki.

synonym_kin: Ifaranga koranabuhanga ritekanye (ifaraanga kôrabûhaânga riteekâanyr); ifaranga ridafatika (ifaraanga ridafatîka).
english_terms: Cryptocurrency | electronic currency | Electronic cash | e-cash | electronic money | e-money | digital currency | digital money
definition_kin: Ifaranga ry'uburyo bw'ikoranabuhanga ryagenewe gukora nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana amakuru binyuze mu muyoboro wa mudasobwa udashingiye ku buyobozi ubwo ari bwo bwose, nka guverinoma cyangwa banki, kugira ngo ubushyigikire cyangwa ububungabunge.
Agace kamwe mu tugize ibikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga katabikwaho amakuru ayo ari yo yose.
Uburenganzira bwo kwakira serivisi cyangwa kubona amakuru ku murongo koranabuhanga mu gihe runaka.

synonym_kin: Ihuzamiyoboro (ihuuzamiyoboro); ifatanzira (ifatanzira).
definition_kin: Inzira yagutse kandi yuzuye aho ibice bitandukanye by'urusobe runaka bihurizwa hamwe.
Ubugeni bwo gufata amashusho ayega afite cyangwa adafite amajwi hifashishijwe kamera (imfatashusho) yaba ari isanzwe cyangwa igezweho.
Agace ka nyuma k’ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho rihuza ku buryo bufatika abakoresha baryo ba nyuma (nk’imiryango, ibigo cyangwa ibikoresho) n’ihuzanzira remezo cyangwa ku cyicaro cy’utanga murandasi.

english_terms: Connection | Internet access | Access to Internet
definition_kin: Uburyo buri gikoresho cya buri muntu ku giti cye cyangwa ihuzanzira y’ibikoresho biri mu gace kamwe bihuzwa na murandasi y’isi yose, izo mashini zikabasha guhuzwa mu itumanaho zigahererekanya amakuru.
Amakuru cyangwa inyandiko ikorwa, yoherezwa, yakirwa cyangwa ibikwa hakoreshejwe uburyo bw'ikoranabuhanga nka mudasobwa, telefoni cyangwa murandasi aho kuba ku mpapuro.
Itsinda ry'inyandiko runaka zifite amakuru afitanye isano cyangwa ikaba itsinda ry'amakuru runaka ari muri porogaramu ajyanye n'ibikorwa bikorerwa muri iyo porogaramu.
Inyandiko ikubiyemo izindi, akenshi ziba ari izirimo amashusho.
Inyandiko irimo amakuru yerekeye urwego cyangwa akarere runaka muri sisitemu y'amazina y’urwego.
Inyandiko irimo urukurikirane rw'amabwiriza akorwa uko bikurikirana n'umusemuzi w'umurongo w'amabwiriza wa sisitemu ikora.
Inyandikorifite imiterere ikunze gukoreshwa mu guhererekanya amakuru hagati ya porogaramu zitandukanye.
Ishusho yakozwe n'urumuri ruhinduka ishusho hakoreshejwe sensa cyangwa filime ifata amashusho.

english_terms: Screenshot | screen grab | screen capture | Print screen
definition_kin: Ishusho yafashwe igaragaza ako kanya ibiri ku ndebero ya mudasobwa, ya telefoni cyangwa y’ikindi gikoresho koranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo kubona ishusho koranabuhanga biturutse ku mfatamakuru nyarumuri, twavuga nk’imfatafoto.
Igikorwa cyo kugabanya ingano y’amafishiye y’amakuru usanga akubiyemo amafoto, amajwi n’amashusho, inyandiko, inyandiko nyamibare n’ibindi.

igipimo kigaragaza ingano iri hagati y’ubugari n’ubuhagarike bw’ishusho kigaragazwa n’imibare ibiri itandukanyijwe n’utubago (:). Urugero, 4:3, ku ishusho, bivuze ko ubugari ari ibice bine (4) mu gihe ubuhagarike ari ibice bitatu (3).
Igikorwa cyo kwerekana amashusho ku irebero.
Isubizwa inyuma ry’ubutumwa bwoherejwe muri imeri bukagarukira uwabwoherereje bumubwira ko uwohererezwa atabonetse.
Igikorwa cyo kugarura cyangwa gusubiza ikintu cyabitswe cyangwa cyatakaye.
Sisitemu yifashishwa n’abakoresha mudasobwa igihe ashaka kubona, gushaka no kugaragaza amakuru ya mudasobwa yifashishije murandasi.

french_terms: Récupération de sécurité | cyber- récupération | récupération
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo gusubiranya amakuru cyangwa amafishiye yabuze, yatakaye cyangwa yangiritse.

Uburyo bwo kwerekana urubibi bw’ibinyabumwe ntangamakuru mu mujyo waza nyabubiri woherezwa mu muyoboro w’itumanaho, bukaba uburyo bwuzuye bwo guhuza za mudasobwa cyangwa ibindi bikoresho hifashishijwe umugozi ucibwamo n’amakuru mu buryo bw’umujyo wa nyabubiri.
Ubwoko bw’ifishi irimo amakuru y’amashusho ataratunganywa yafashwe n’imfatashusho cyangwa indemashusho koranabuhanga.
Uburyo butegura kandi bugenzura uko amakuru abikwa kandi aboneka kuri mudasobwa.
Porogaramu ikoreshwa mu guhindura uko igikoresho cyangwa porogaramu ikora.
Inzira ihanitse ihuza ubushishozi, ihanga, ubumenyi, ubushobozi n’ubunyakuri cyangwa gukurikiza amabwiriza umuntu ahanga ibicuruzwa bisubiza ibyifuzo by’abakiriya, cyane cyane bikorewe mu kazi.
Umugozi n’uburyo bwo kunyuzamo amakuru muri rusange kuva ku murongo umwe ujya mu bindi.

Inzira igenda igaruka ikubiyemo isubizwa ry’ibibazo mbonera kandi ngaruka bishingiye ku ihange ry’isakara ry’urumuri, ku ikoreshwa ry’ibikoresho bikoresha urumuri mu ifatwa ry’ishusho no ku ikoreshwa ry’izindi koranabuhanga mu gukora umwanzuro w’igikorwa, hagamijwe kongera imiterere iboneye y’ikigezweho.
Igikorwa cyo kwegeranya, kugenzura no gusesengura amakuru ava kuri murandasi, yaba ari imeri, imbuga nkoranyambaga, kujya ku mbuga z’ikoranabuhanga.
Ubushobozi bwo gucunga, gutunganya cyangwa gushyira mu bikorwa ikintu kuri mudasobwa.

Ikoranabuhanga nyamwikoresha rituma hemezwa hakanatahurwa ibimenyetso by’umubiri w’umuntu nk’ibimenyetso by’intoki, indiba y’ijisho, imbengeza y’amaso, ingero mbonera z’ijwi, ingero mbonera zo mu maso n’ibipimo by’ibiganza.
Isuzuma rigamije kwemeza niba igikoresho gishya cyakozwe gishobora gukora neza ibyo cyakorewe.
inyigo y’impinduka zihoraho n’inshuro zazo.

english_terms: Error control | Error detection and correction
french_terms: Contrôle des erreurs | détection et correction des erreurs
definition_kin: Uburyo bukomeye bw’ihuzanzira koranabuhanga butuma habaho kwizera n’ubunyakuri mu kohereza amakuru.

Iyemeza bihamye ko umukono koranabuhanga ukozwe mu mibare wakozwe hakoreshejwe urufunguzo rwihariye rufitanye isano n’urufunguzo rusange zombi zigaragara ku cyemezo kandi ko inyandiko itononekaye kuva aho umukono koranabuhanga ukozwe mu mibare wayo wokorewe.

french_terms: Contrôle de la sécurité des cybers
definition_kin: Ibyemezo by’umutekano n’imvuguruza zabyo bikoreshwa mu kurinda urwungano ntangamakuru, ihuzanzira n’amakuru birindwa ibyabyangiza, twavuga nk’ ibyemezo tekiniki, by’ubuyobozi cyangwa bifatika, bishyirwaho kugira ngo bigabanye ibyago byabaho kandi no kurinda ibanga, ubusugire no kuboneka kw’inzungano. Igerageza rya porogaramu (igerageza ryaa porogaraâmu)
Inzira y’igenzura ko inkoranabuhanga ikora ibyo yagenewe gukora.
Igice cyo gutunganya mudasobwa (CPU) kiyobora imikorere ya poroseseri.
Uburyo bwo mu ikoranabuhanga bukoreshwa mu kwerekana umurongo wasibwe kugira ngo utekerezweho.
Ahantu hakorerwa ibikorwa by’ubuvumbuzi, ubucuruzi, n’ubufatanye mu by’ikoranabuhanga.
Igihe umuntu ukoresha murandasi ari umwe ayimaraho mu gihe kigenwe, twavuga nk’umunsi cyangwa ukwezi, ari ukuyisura cyangwa kubona ibiyiturutsemo, twavuga nk’ibyamamazwa, imeri n’ibinyamakuru.
Igihe bifata ikimenyetso cyangwa amakuru kugira ngo akwire ava ahantu hamwe ajya ahandi, hakubiyemo ibintu binyuranye nko gusesengura amakuru, kuba ategereje, kuyohereza no kuyasakaza.
Igihe kiringaniye umuntu amara ku rubuga rwa murandasi.
Igihe cyo gutegereza kiba hagati yo gusaba urwungano nka mudasobwa cyangwa igikoresho ngendanwa amakuru abitswe n’igihe amakuru wasabye akugereraho.
Igikoresho (cyangwa imiterere myinshi y’inzungano zikomatanyije n’ibisubizo bijyana na zo bireba amahuriro y’amakuru) cyakira amakuru aciye mu nzira koranabuhanga kikayabika,

Ikintu gifasha gutahura ibibazo mu rwungano cyangwa mu gikoresho, kigasesengura ibice bitandukanye by’urwungano kugira ngo hatahurwe ibibazo, icyo gikoresho gishobora gukoreshwa kuri mudasobwa, imashini n’ubundi buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga, ifasha mu gusesengura imbikamakuru ahoraho, kugenzura amakosa ari mu mbikamakuru, kugenzura ubushyuhe bw’inshobozamudasobwa no gutanga amakuru ku kindi gikoresho gihujwe na mudasobwa.
Ikintu kigizwe na mugaragaza na mwandikisho.
Imashini ikoreshwa mu kugura, kubika, gusesengura, gutunganya, no gutangaza amakuru n'andi makuru mu ikoranabuhanga.

english_terms: ICT tool | IT tool | IT interface
definition_kin: Icyifashishwa mu itumanaho hakoreshejwe ibintu cyangwa inkoranabuhanga, twavuga mudasobwa, imfotoranyandiko, ingaragazamakuru, ikibaho cy’umweru nyoroshyakazi, isesenguranyandiko, murandasi, imfatamajwi, telefoni ngendanwa, inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa z’imbuga nkoranyambaga nka Watsapp usanga bikoreshwa mu rwego rw’ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa.

Igice cyihariye gikoreshwa mu ihuzanzira kiyobora imimaro, gutanga amategeko no guhuza ku buryo bwihariye imiyoboro y’ihuzanzira nk’iy’ibikoresho bihera cyangwa nkoramumaro, intanganzira, impinduranzira, intangamakuru, inkomatanyanzira n’amakarita mpuzanzira.

Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga umuntu ashobora kwitwaza kikaba kitaremereye kandi ari gito ku buryo cyafatwa mu kiganza, kikaba cyakoreshwa mu rugendo ku buryo cyigenga, aha twavuga telefoni igezweho n’ikibaho nkoranabuhanga.

english_terms: Analytic tool | Business Intelligence tool | decision support system
french_terms: Outil d'analyse | systèmes d'aide à la décision | outils d’intelligence d'affaires
definition_kin: Porogaramu cyangwa sisitemu ifasha abakoresha gusesengura amakuru kugira ngo babone ubumenyi, barusheho gufata ibyemezo, kandi barusheho kunoza inzira.

mudasobwa ikora nta rutsinga rugaragara ikoresheje ahubwo yifashishije ikoranabuhanga nka Wi-Fi cyangwa Bluetooth, bikayifasha kugera kuri murandasi no guhererekanya amakuru hamwe no gukoresha ubushobozi nkoranabuhanga butandukanye ndetse no gukoresha inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa.
Ikimenyetso gisigwa n’imigongo y’igikumwe iyo umuntu akojeje urutoki ku kamashini kagenzura amakuru atanga uburenganzira bwo gufungura imashini kakayemeza.

english_terms: Clock Cycle | machine cycle | clock tick
definition_kin: igice cy'ibanze cy'igihe cya poroseseri ya mudasobwa (CPU).

french_terms: Page de codes | jeu de caractères | codage
definition_kin: Imbonerahamwe y’agaciro aho buri nyuguti ihagararirwa n’umubare, bigatuma mudasobwa ishobora kumenya inyuguti, bityo ikagaragaza nta kosa inyandiko.
Uburyo imboni koranabuhanga ya kamera yongera cyangwa igabanya urumuri ruyinjiramo mu ifatashusho.
itsinda rito cyangwa urukurikirane rw'amabwiriza mudasobwa ishobora gukoresha no gushyira mu bikorwa, ni ryo shingiro ry'ikoreshwa ry'ingufu zo gutunganya.

Imyubakire nyamibare y’ahantu cyangwa ibimenyetso by’ishusho, byakorewe gufata ibimenyetso byihariye kugira ngo imbonezamibare zishobore kubigereranya no kubihuza n’ibindi bimenyetso, hakavamo ikintu nk’ameza n’ayandi makuru nk’izina ameza, izina ry’ifishi ishusho irimo, n’ibihamyamakuru bikora ishusho y’ameza, iyi myubakire itanga amakuru asobanura amakuru.
Uburyo bugaragaza umubare w’amakosa abonrka mu makuru yoherezwa cyangwa atunganywa, ugereranyije n’amakuru yose yoherejwe.

english_terms: Maximum transmission rate | data transmission rate
definition_kin: Ubwinshi bw’amakuru yoherezwa

english_terms: Computer housing | computer case | computer chassis
french_terms: Boîtier d’ordinateur | boite d'ordinateur | châssis d'ordinateur
definition_kin: Ikintu gishyirwamo ibikoresho byenda kuba byose bigize mudasobwa bwite.

Igishushanyije gikozwe cyangwa cyerekanwa hakoreshejwe mudasobwa na porogaramu zihariye, nk’amashusho, ibishushanyo, imbonerahamwe, n'ibindi bintu bifatika bikoreshwa mu gutanga amakuru, kongera itumanaho cyangwa kongera ubwiza bw'amashusho ku itangazamakuru koranabuhanga.

Ukwerekana uburyo ibintu bitandukanye (nk’abantu, ibintu cyangwa ibitekerezo) mu rwungano bifitanye isano, ubusanzwe bikoreshwa mu guhanga imiterere y’ikigega cy’amakuru hashushanywa ikarita igaragaza ibintu, ibibiranga n’amasano bifitanye hagati yabo, bigatanga cyane cyane imbata yerekana ukuntu amakuru azaba ateye kandi ahujwe mu rwungano.

Ibiboneka bigaragara nk’amashusho, ibyumvishwa amatwi cyangwa intoki bitanzwe na mudasobwa nyuma y’isesengurwa ry’amakuru yatanzwe, twavuga nk’inyandiko, ishusho, ijwi cyangwa amashusho agenda yerekanywe ku irebero rya mudasobwa cyangwa biciye mu ndangururamajwi kimwe no mu nyandiko cyangwa iy’abafite ubumuga bwo kutabona biturutse mu ncapanyandiko.
Ikigo kigizwe n’inzobere mu iyamamaza zizi gukora igenamigambi no gushyira hamwe no gukurikirana amakuru yavuye mu iyamamaza ryashyizwe ku bintu bitandukanye.

Ibitero bya murandasi byibanda ku makuru y’itahurwa ry’abakoresha mudasobwa, twavuga nk’amazina y’abayikoresha, amagambo banga n’ingaragazaburenganzira nyemeza zabo kugira ngo bashobore kwinjira ku buryo butemewe mu nzungano no ku makuru.
Buri gikorwa cyose cyakwibasira kikanabangamira sisitemu ya mudasobwa, imiyoboro y’itumanaho, mudasobwa cyangwa se ibindi bikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
Uburyo bwo kwiba bukoresha gufoza mu gufindura amagambo banga, amakuru y’ifatanzira, imfunguzo z’iyandikabanga mu mibare.

english_terms: Distance selling | telephone sales | telephone selling | telesales
definition_kin: Ubucuruzi bukoresha tekiniki z’ikoranabuhanga cyangwa za radiyo bushingiye ku kugurisha igicuruzwa cyangwa serivisi ku bantu cyangwa ku bigo hakoreshejwe telefoni.
Agaciro k’ihindura gapima umubare w’ibyaguzwe kuri murandasi.
Uburyo koranabuhanga buguhuza n’umuntu nkaho muri kumwe mukaganira kuri telefoni, bigakemura ibibazo ku buryo bwihuse, ukaba wakumva niba afite imbamutima, mbese mugashyikirana.
Ishami rya siyansi ya mudasobwa rishinzwe gushushanya, guteza imbere, gupima no kubungabunga porogaramu za mudasobwa.
Inyigo y’imiterere y’indimi n’ihuzwa ry’inkoranabuhanga zihariye.

Imikorere mishya ishingiye ku kunoza serivisi cyangwa se ku bikorwa by’ikigo runaka binyuze mu guhindura uburyo bwakoreshwaga ahubwo iyo mikorere igasanishwa n’ikoranabuhanga rigezweho kugira ngo bihuzwe n’umuvuduko ikoranabuhanga ririho.
Uburyo bwo guhanga no kwinjiza inyandiko ku rubuga rwa murandasi, bityo ibihashyizwe bikitwa inyandiko yo ku rubuga.

Gufata amashusho kuri mudasobwa bikubiyemo gufata ishusho ya sisitemu y'imikorere cyangwa ishusho y'icyitegererezo, uhereye kuri mudasobwa y'icyitegererezo ukayishyira mu gikoresho kimwe cyangwa byinshi.
Hakoreshejwe isesengura ry’amakuru, hashakwa umubare w’imyanya

Ishami ryibanda ku ihange ry’ikoranabuhanga rishingiye ku ibonezabitekererezo ry’imibare, rigatanga ishingiro ry’iyumvwa ry’imibare no kugena za sisitemu z’indundo na musesenguzi, rikiga ku mashini nyabuhanga zitwa nyamwikoresha no ku bushobozi bwazo bwo kubara.
Ishami rihuza siyansi ya mudasobwa n'imibare rivuga ku buryo ibibazo bishobora gukemurwa hakoreshejwe uburyo bwo kubara, hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa aligoritime.

Ubuhanga bwo kubara bushakashaka ibibazo bishobora gukemurwa n’imbonezamibare na za mudasobwa byibanda ku mbibi z’ibara no kuba hariho ibibazo bidashobora kubonerwa igisubizo twavuga nk’ikibazo cy’ihagarara ry’igikoresho koranabuhanga.
Ahantu cyangwa ingano y’abantu bashobora kubona no kwakira uburyo bw’ihuzanzira kuri telefoni zabo.
Uburyo bukomeye cy’imibare gikoreshwa mu gutunganya ibimenyetso, amashusho, no mu by’ubwubatsi bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Ihanahana ry’amakuru ryaba iryo mu rwego rw’ubucuruzi cyangwa urutari urw’ubucuruzi hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga.
Kugura, kugurisha, kwishyura cyangwa kohereza amafaranga kuri murandasi ukoresheje mudasobwa cyangwa telefoni igendanwa.
Uburyo bwo guhaha bugezweho budasaba ko uba ufite amafaranga mu ntoki, akenshi hifashishwa ikarita yabugenewe.
Uburyo bwo guherererekanya amakuru mu dupaki duto, hanyuma akongera kwegeranywa ku murongo n’abayakiriye.
Uguhererekanya amakuru ava mu gihugu kimwe ajya mu kindi hifashishijwe icyogajuru cyangwa imiyoboro yo kubutaka.
Urubuga rwo kohererezanya ubutumwa rushingiye ku bubiko bw’iyakure butanga za aderesi nkoranabuhanga, karendari, ibiranga n’ibigomba gukorwa.
Itumanaho ryifashisha imiraba ifite ingufu zo hejuru inakoresha igipimo kinini cy’amakuru, iri mu itumanaho ahanini rikoreshwa ku rwego mpuzamahanga cyangwa mu byogajuru.
ihindagurika ry’igihe amakuru amara mu muyoboro w’itumanaho kugira ngo agere aho yoherejwe.

Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga aho ikintu kiva mu miterere imwe kijya mu yindi, ariko indemo yacyo ntihinduke. Urugero, ushobora guhindura inyandiko ya Word uyigira PDF cyangwa videwo ukayihindura amajwi gusa.

Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga aho amajwi ari mu miterere imwe runaka ashyirwa mu yindi, ariko indemo ntihinduke., urugero, amajwi: yafashwe mu buryo bwa WAV akajya muri MP3 akenshi bigamije koroshya ikoreshwa ry’ayo majwi.
Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga ry’amajwi aho amajwi akurwa mu miterere yayo karemano akajya mu miterere y’ikoranabuhanga mudasobwa zishobora kubika, gutunganya no kohereza.

Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga aho amakuru ari mu miterere imwe runaka ashyirwa mu yindi, ariko indemo ntihinduke hagamijwe koroshya ikoreshwa ryayo. Urugero, ushobora guhindura amakuru ya CSV uyagira Excel.

Uburyo bw’ikoranabuhanga bwo guhindura uko amabara ahagararirwa mu ifoto cyangwa ishusho, urugero nko guhindura ishusho iri mu mabara ya RGB (Umutuku, Icyatsi, Ubururu) ikajya muri Grayscale (umweru n’umukara) kugira ngo igabanye umwanya ifata mu bubiko cyangwa kuyihindura muri YIQ (Ubukesha, umuhondo ushyira ubururu n’idoma ryijimyemo ibihogo rishyira icyatsi kibisi) bigafasha mu kugabanya uburemere mu mabara y’amafoto cyangwa y’amashusho.
Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga aho ifoto iva mu miterere imwe ijya mu yindi cyangwa ikava mu bwoko bumwe bwa dosiye ijya mu bundi cyangwa mu buryo bumwe bw’amabara ijya mu bundi.
Uburyo

Uburyo bw’ihindura koranabuhanga aho inyandiko iri mu miterere imwe runaka ishyirwa mu yindi, ariko indemo ntihinduke hagamijwe koroshya ikoreshwa ryayo, nk’urugero umuntu ashobora guhindura inyandiko ya word ikaba pdf.

Uburyo bwo guhindura inyongera za fishiye ziva mu bwoko bumwe bwa dosiye zijya mu bundi, urugero nko guhindura dosiye ya BMP cyangwa ishusho idatunganyije ikajya muri PNG, JPEG cyangwa GIF kugira ngo ibashe gukoreshwa neza muri porogaramu runaka. Ihinduramiterere ya sisitemu (ihîinduramîteêrere ya siisiteêmu)

Ugukoresha serivisi zitanga amakuru kuri telefoni zo hanze y’ikigo, bigatuma uguha serivisi ya murandasi kuri telefoni agira amafaranga yongeraho ku kiguzi bitewe n’aho amakuru yoherezwa ndetse n’icyo agamije gukoreshwa.

Uburyo bw’ihinduria koranabuhanga aho videwo iri mu miterere imwe runaka ishyirwa mu yindi, ariko indemo ntihinduke, nk’urugero, guhindura videwo yafashwe mu buryo bwa AVI, MOV, MKV ikaba MP4 akenshi bigamije koroshya ikoreshwa ry’iyo videwo.
Uburyo bw’ikoranabuhanga bwo guhindura uduce duto tw’amabara tugize amashusho tugahindurwamo ibishushanyo bya vekiteri.
Urutonde rwa buri zina ry’ifishi na nomero yo ku rutonde yayo aho ingaragazabwite yahawe izina yatanzwe yigaragaza mu rutonde nkomoko rw’imbonezamikorere.

Igikoresho gihuza mudasobwa nyinshi cyangwa mudasobwa n’ibindi bikoresho, kikaba hagati y’ibindi bikoresho byo ku mpera kikabihuza, byaba ari za mudasobwa cyangwa ibindi bikoresho, kikaba umutwe w’ihuzanzira rya hafi ku buryo buri gikoresho kigicometseho kigisangiza amakuru kibonye.

Inkingi ya mwamba y’ihuzanzira rya GSM /CDMA ikora nk’urwungano mpinduranyamiyoboro rugendanwa (NSS) ruhuza abahamagarwa b’abafatabuguzi ruhinduranya amatsinda y’amajwi koranabuhanga hagati y’inzira huzanzira, rugatanga amakuru ya ngombwa mu kwita ku bafatabuguzi ba serivisi ngendanwa nko kwiyandikisha no kwemeza abakoresha umuyoboro.

english_terms: Cyan Magenta Yellow Black (CMYK) | CMYK color model | process color | four color
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo guhuza amabara y’ubururu bw’ikirere, iroza ryijimyemo idoma, umuhondo n’umukara bukoreshwa mu icapiro bugatanga amabara yose bifuza.
Uburyo bwo guhuza amabara y’umutuku, icyatsi kibisi, n’umukara bukoreshwa mu icapiro bugatanga amabara yose bifuza.
Ijwi

Imashini gitoroniki yakorewe gutahura no kwemeza biciye mu bimenyetso nyamubiri cyangwa nyamyitwarire nko gutahura isura, gusoma ibimenyetso by’intoki, gutahura ikiganza n’ibindi, bigafasha mu kazi kumenya abaje mu kazi, ibyo bakoze kuri buri gikorwa, bigatanga ishusho rusange y’imigendekere y’akazi.

Ikigero inkoranabuhanga, ibikoresho n’inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa cyangwa ikindi kintu cyose gishobora gufatana n’ibindi bigahererekanya amakuru ku buryo buri ku murongo hatabayeho igikorwa cy’ukoresha mudasobwa.
Igihe ibikoresho bya mudasobwa bitandukanye bishobora kwifashisha murandasi bihererekanya amakuru hagati yabyo hatabayeho uruhare rwa muntu.

Urwunge rwa za mudasobwa ebyiri cyangwa nyinshi cyangwa ibindi bikoresho byahujwe kugira ngo bihererekanye amakuru cyangwa bisangire ibikoresho by’ibanze nk’insohoranyandiko, imbikamakuru ruziga cyangwa guhererekanya amafishiye, ziba zihujwe n’umugozi, umurongo wa telefoni, imiraba ya radiyo, icyogajuru cyangwa urwunge rw’imiraba ndengamutuku.
Ubushobozi bwa mudasobwa bwo gufatisha mu buryo bw’ihuzanzira ikindi gikoresho koranabuhanga cyangwa murandasi.
Ikoreshwa ry’itumanaho n’ikoranabuhanga mu mikorere ya Leta.

french_terms: Mot de passe | Code d’enregistrement de la machine
definition_kin: Urufunguzo bwite rwinjiza umuntu ubyemerewe mu rwungano koranabuhanga rwa mudasobwa, rukanagaragaza uruhare rwa nyir’urufunguzo mu ihererekanyabikorwa n’impinduka zibaye ku bintu byo mu rwungano cyane cyane amakuru.
Uburyo bw’ubwirinzi bwa sisitemu runaka y’igikoresho kivuye mu ruganda, ahanini ikunze kuba ifite na konti yashyizwemo n’uruganda.
Igikorwa cyo kugabanya mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga ingano y’uburemere bw’amajwi runaka kugira ngo atware umwanya muto.
Uburyo bwo gukuraho icyuho, amakuru atari ngombwa kugira ngo hagabanywe ububiko cyangwa ikoreshwa ry’amakuru n’ubwinshi bw’ibibitswe.
Igikorwa cyo kugabanya mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga ingano y’uburemere bw’amashusho kugira ngo bitware umwanya muto.

french_terms: Compression de texte | compression de documents
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo kugabanya mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga ingano y’uburemere bw’inyandiko runaka kugira ngo itware umwanya muto.
Igikoresho cya mudasobwa giteye nk’ikaramu kifitemo akareharumuri kamenya umwimerere w’amashusho.
|Igikoresho bwite cyo kurihiraho ibicuruzwa gitangwa n’ikigo cy’ubucuruzi, kigahabwa
Igikoresho cy’ihunika ry’amakuru gitoroniki gikoreshwa mu guhunuka amakuru koranabuhanga, muri rusange hakoreshejwe imbikamakuru ntaremya.
Ikarita yishyurirwaho avanse ya serivisi mbere yo kuyishyura yose.
Ikarita ntwaramakuru ishobora gushyirwa muri mudasobwa kugira ngo yongere ubushobozi bwa mudasobwa, urugero hongerwa imbikamakuru cyangwa hongererwa agaciro ibishushanyo cyangwa amafoto.
Igikoresho koranabuhanga gikora amajwi kikanayafata.
Ikarita tubona
Igitekerezo cy'ibanze cy'ubwenge buhangano (AI), aho sisitemu zigenewe kumenya imbogamizi, gufata ibyemezo, no gushaka ibisubizo bifatika.

english_terms: Electronic Blackboard | electronic whiteboard | Smart Board
french_terms: Tableau noir électronique | tableau blanc électronique | tableau intelligent
definition_kin: Igikoresho gifite indemo nk’iy’ikibaho gisanzwe ariko kikaba gishobora gukorana na mudasobwa.
Ahantu habikwa kandi hagatunganyirizwa amakuru y’igihugu mu buryo bwizewe.

synonym_kin: Imbikamakuru (imbîikamâkurû); ububiko bw’amakuru (Ububîiko bw’âmakurû).
french_terms: Base de données informatiques | base de données | périphérique de stockage
definition_kin: Ikusanyamakuru ryateguwe cyangwa ubwoko bw'ububiko bw'amakuru bushingiye ku ikoreshwa rya sisitemu yo gucunga amakuru.
Ahantu hatangirwa serivisi za murandasi n’izindi zijyana na yo, zaba ari iz’abantu ku giti cyabo cyangwa ibigo. Ikigohe cya kamera (ikigôhe cyaa kamera)
Ubwoko bw’amakuru bwo hambere usanga imiterere yabwo bufite isura ishobora gusomwa n’umuntu.
Ibimenyetso byo ku mubiri cyangwa by’imyitwarire byihariye bikoreshwa mu kwemeza ko uwo umuntu ari we.
Igikoresho gituma umuntu agera ku makuru akenera urufunguzo gitoroniki kugira ngo agerweho, akaba akoreshwa nk’inyunganizi cyangwa agakoreshwa mu mwanya w’urufunguzo banga.
Urukomatane rw’amabwiriza
Inyuguti ishobora gusimbura zeru cyangwa irenga mu murongo.

Ikinyabumwe ntangamakuru shingiro gishobora kuvangwa n’ikimenyetso kimwe rukumbi, twavuga nk’inyuguti, umubare, umwanya, akatuzo cyangwa ikimenyetso bishobora kwandikwa muri mudasobwa, bikaba ibanze mu kwandika inyandiko, amakuru cyangwa amabwiriza mu nzungano koranabuhanga.
Itsinda rito nyarurimi rishobora gucungwa no gukorwa ukwaryo.

french_terms: Réseaux mobiles de deuxième génération | technologie 2G
definition_kin: Ihuzanzira rya telefoni ryahanzwe muri 1991, rizana ikoranabuhanga nyamibare mu itumanaho rya telefoni, risimbura itumanaho nyamuraba (analog), bigatanga ijwi ryiza kurushaho, no gukoresha ku buryo ntangamusaruro inziramugozi.

Icyiciro cy’ihuzanzira ryadutse mu mwaka wa 2000, rigatanga umuvuduko n’ubwaguke bw’ihuzanzira ntangamakuru n’irya murandasi buruse ubw’icyiciro cya kabiri, mu gutanga ibisubizo ku bisabwa n’isoko rizamuka rya telefoni zigezweho.
Icyiciro cy’ihuzanzira rya telefoni, ritanga

Ihuzanzira rya telefoni nziramugozi ku buryo bw’uruganiriro rwa radiyo ruhujwe kandi runyuze abarukoresha kurushaho, rufite ubushobozi bwagutse cyane, rufite umuvuduko uri hejuru cyane, kuba rwizewe cyane kandi gutegereza ntibijya bibaho, ruzagura uburyo ngendanwa bukaba bwahuza ibintu byinshi, rikaba ryizewe ku buryo bwo hejuru busumbye ihuzanzira ryaribanjirije.

french_terms: Réseaux mobiles de dpremière génération | technologie 1G
definition_kin: Ihuzanzira rya telefoni nziramugozi ryahanzwe muri 1979 mu Buyapani, ryakoreshaga uburyo bw’imiraba (anaroge) mu kohereza amajwi, ryakoreshaga imiraba ya 150 MHz cyangwa irenzeho.
Amakuru arambuye ya tekiniki ajyanye na mudasobwa, nk’ibikoresho byayo, sisitemu iyikoresha, n’ibindi bisobanuro by’ingenzi bigena ubushobozi n’imikorere ya mudasobwa.
Ikirango cyangwa ijambo rya ngombwa rishobora kuba rijyana n’amakuru, amakuru runaka cyangwa indemo hagamije koroshya itahura n’iboneza.

english_terms: Virtual Local Area Network Tag | VLAN Tag
definition_kin: Umutwe ufite bayiti winjizwa mu ihuzanzira nziramugozi (nk’indanga VLAN cyangwa VID) ukagira umumaro wo kwerekana ku buryo buhwitse agace k’urujya n’uruza rw’amakuru mu ihuzanzira buri paki ijyana nako, bityo urujya n’uruza rukagabwamo

Uburyo bwo kugaragaza ishusho bwakorewe inkoranabuhanga zihariye hifashishijwe indoro ya mudasobwa, bugatuma hashakishwa ibintu ku buryo buhwitse mu mashusho hagiye hafatwa ibimenyetso muri buri gace bizana itandukaniro cyangwa bikiranga, twavuga nk’impande, impindurantego cyangwa indemakintu, bukagira umumaro mu kugereranya no guhuza amashusho kuko butuma imbonezamibare zibona ahantu cyangwa ibintu bisa mu mashusho atandukanye.

Imiterere y’inyobozi y’amakuru ikoreshwa mu ikoranabuhanga mu kubika amakuru avuye mu mafishiye y’amajwi, akenshi akabikwa mu miterere ya MP3, bigatuma hashobora gushyirwamo izina ry’umuhimbyi, izina ry’igihangano,iry’itsinda n’iry’ingeri ya muzika, umwaka, n’igifubiko cy’indirimbo, bikagaragara mu nsoma ntangazamakuru, inkoranabuhanga y’itangazamakuru cyangwa ya DJ.

Indanga nyamiterere cyangwa ijambo ry’ingenzi rihabwa indemo nyamibare y’amafishiye, amashusho cyangwa imbuga za murandasi, igasobanura ibiranga iyo ndemo, icyiciro ibarizwamo naa nyirayo, bikoroshya ishakwa, irobanurwa, n’itunganya ry’amakuru, bikoroshya imicungire yayo.
Igikoresho gifatika cyangwa kidafatika cyoroshya ihererekanya ry’amakuru hagati ya sisiteme za mudasobwa kibanje guhindura imiterere y’ibyoherezwa.
Guhuriza hamwe uburyo butandukanye bw’itumanaho kugira ngo bikorere hamwe.
Inzira yo gutegura inkoranabuhanga, kuzisakaza no kuzikwirakwiza hirya no hino mu bikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga.
Iyandikwa ry’amakuru avanwa ku mbikamakuru ruziga ashyirwa ku yindi itarakoreshwa cyangwa bihita bihanagura ayariho.
Ikoranabuhanga rikoreshwa mu kugenzura ukuri kw’ibiranga umuntu hifashishijwe murandasi cyangwa se kureba amakuru abaruye muri sisitemu zabugenewe.

Kuba mu rwungano ruhanganye n’urundi ibikorwa bibiri cyangwa byinshi, twavuga nk’ibonezagikorwa cyangwa gahunda, bigenda biteganye uko bishyirwa mu bikorwa, bityo bikozwe n’inzungano nyinshi zigenga, zihujwe hagati yazo kugira ngo zifatanye hagati yazo.

Ikoreshwa ry’ikoranabuhanga mu ihererekanya ry’indemo ntangamakuru, kuyibika no kuyikora hifashishwa byinshi guhera ku bikoresho n’imbuga koranabuhanga kugera ku nzungano zituma haba ikorwa ry’amakuru, kuyasakaza no kuyagurisha mu isi y’ikoranabuhanga yo muri iki gihe.

Uburyo bwo gukoresha ikigega cy’amakuru ku buryo buteye imbere bituma haba isangira ry’amakuru mu ihuzanzira y’ikigo, bukaba bufite umumaro wo kubika amakuru mu byumba nyamutekano, bigahuzwa bigakora uruhererekane rutuma amakuru akoreshwa neza cyane, bikagabanya ibitero n’ubujura kuri murandasi.
Ubwoko bw’ikoranabuhanga aho urikoresha akoresha telefoni igendanwa kugira ngo akore imirimo ijyanye n’itumanaho, nko kuvugana n'inshuti, abavandimwe n'abandi.
Itumanaho nziramugozi rya hafi rikoresha igikoresho cyabugenewe mu kohereza no kwakira amajwi miyego ku ntera ndende hadakoreshejwe urutsinga.

english_terms: Advanced technology | New computer science technology | new technology
french_terms: Technologie avancée | Nouvelle technologie informatique | nouvelle technologie
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga rigezweho risobanura udushya, ibikoresho n’inzungano zigezweho kandi zigaragaza iterambere rya siyansi n'ubwubatsi, akenshi zirimo guhuza ibintu bigoye, gukora ibintu bike, no gukoresha mudasobwa, kugira ngo habeho ibisubizo byiza kandi binoze mu nzego nk’ubwenge buhangano, n’ibindi.
Ikoranabuhanga rishya kandi ritera imbere ritangiye kugira ingaruka zikomeye ku buryo abantu babaho, bakora, kandi baganira.

english_terms: New computer science technology | new technology
definition_kin: Ihangabishya mu rwego rw’ikoranabuhanga nko mu bwenge buhangano, isesenguramakuru, iyigishamashini, isi shusho yagutse, igenamiterere ya UI/UX n’ikoranabuhanga rya quanta.

english_terms: Digital democracy | Internet democracy | E-democracy | democratic network
french_terms: Démocratie numérique | démocratie électronique | réseau démocratique
definition_kin: Ikoreshwa ry’ikoranabuhanga mu itumanaho mu bijyanye na politiki n’imiyoborere.

french_terms: Technologies langagières | Technologies du langage humain
definition_kin: Sisitemu zishyirwa muri mudasobwa ziyifasha kumva icyo abantu bari kuvuga hanyuma igakora ihinduranyandiko uwo mwanya.
Urwungano ruboneza indebero zishashe zifite ubushobozi buhanitse aho buri buri ndemashusho ku giti cyayo igenzurwa na taranzisitoro yayo na kondansateri bijyana.
Ikoreshwa rya kaseti mu kubika amakuru menshi ku buryo bw’ibyiciro, ntushobora kugera ku yo ushaka hatabaye kuyapangura.
Ikoranabuhanga rigizwe n’ibikoresho, sisitemu cyangwa imikorere ishobora kubyara, guhanga, kubika cyangwa gukoresha amakuru hakoreshejwe insimburabikorwa

english_terms: Information and communication technologies | ICT Computing | Computing
french_terms: Technologie de l'information et de la communication | informatique
definition_kin: Ubuhanga bwose rikoreshwa mu gucunga, gutunganya, kubika no gutangaza amakuru, rikubiyemo mudasobwa, porogaramu, imiyoboro, murandasi, ibikoresho bigendanwa, n'itumanaho (nk'amatelefone n'ibimenyetso bitagira umugozi) kugira ngo habeho kubona, gukura no gusangira amakuru.
Ugukoresha ikoranabuhanga mu buryo burengera ibidukikije, rigabanya ikoreshwa ry’ingufu, imyanda y’ikoranabuhanga, n’ihumana ry’ibidukikije.

Itumanaho aho ibikoresho n’ibindi ryifashisha usanga biri aho hafi, bitajya kure mbese, uburyo bwo gutuma umuyoboro wa ATM (Asynchronous Transfer Mode) ukora nk'umuyoboro wa LAN (Local Area Network) usanzwe, bigatuma porotokore na porogaramu za LAN zisanzweho zikora ku muyoboro wa ATM nta guhindura.
Ikoranabuhanga umuntu ashobora gukoresha mu guhanga ibihagararira ishusho bitandukanye nk’iby’ibigega by’amakuru, iby’ihuzanzira ndetse by’izindi mashini zifatika.
Uruhurirane rw’imirimo koranabuhanga igamije guhanga no kugena imiterere no kubaka no kubungabunga inkoranabuhanga ari yo mabwiriza cyangwa gahunda zereka mudasobwa icyo igomba gukora.
Uburyo bw’itahura n’ihanagurwa ry’amakosa mu bikoresho koranabuhanga no mu nkoranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya inyandiko butuma ijambo rikumira ku murongo umwe rikajya ku wundi murongo igihe ridashoboye kwinjira neza ku murongo uriho.
Ihame ry’ingenzi ry’umutekano w’ibikoresho bifasha kumenya ibanga no kuboneka kwa sisitemu y’amakuru.
Itandukanya rifatika, ihuzanzira, n’ibikorwa by’amakuru kugira ngo harindwe ibitero byo hanze ndetse n’iterabwoba ry’imbere kandi birashobora gufata imiterere itandukanye.
Ubushobozi bwo gutandukanya ingero nyinshi z’inkoranabuhanga kugira ngo buri rugero rube rwakwibona runiyangize gusa.

french_terms: Atténuation des dommages | atténuation des menaces
definition_kin: Igabanya ry’iterabwoba rikubiyemo ingamba n'ibikorwa bikoreshwa mu kugabanya ibikorwa bishobora guhungabanya umutekano.

Imikorere koranabuhanga ibuza ihita ry’indemo cyangwa igabanya ubushobozi bwo kugera ku ndemo nk’urubuga rwa murandasi, amashusho, serivisi n’ibindi bitewe n’agace k’isi indemo iherereyemo, hakifashishwa indango IP y’igikoresho kiriho gikoreshwa kugira ngo hamenyekane igihugu kigikoresha, bityo hagahita hamenyekana niba cyemererwa cyangwa gikumirwa.

Inkoranabuhanga yo kwigiraho guhanitse ikora ku buryo ifata itsinda rya mbere ry’ibonakintu igakora ikiranga cyihariye iha buri bonakintu y’ibanze hanyuma igakurikira ibintu byatahuwe iyo bigize aho byerekera mu mashusho ya video.
Imikorere ishingiye ku mikoranire binyuze mu ikoranabuhanga hagati y’ikigo cy’ubucuruzi n’ubuyobozi.
Gukurikirana icyerekezo cya mudasobwa kirimo kumenya no gukurikirana ibintu byinshi mu buryo bwa videwo.
Umuyoboro inyurwamo n’itumanaho nziramugozi.

Igikoresho cyitwazwa gituma umuntu ahagarara aho ashaka kugira icyo ahakora mu irebero, gikoresha akanyerezo ngaragazahantu gahagaze gahumbaguza mu irebero bigatuma umuntu akora igenzura ryoroshye ry’irebero hakoreshejwe ingaragazamashusho ya mudasobwa.
Inyinjizamakuru nziramugozi ituma ukoresha mudasobwa akorana na yo atarinze abangamirwa n’umugozi, igatanga imikoranire yoroshye kandi iboneye.
Impera zigaragaza aho igifotorwa kimwe cyangwa byinshi bigarukira habaye gusesengura amashusho asanzwe cyangwa amashusho ya videwo.
Igikoresho cyabugenewe gikoreshwa mu kubika amakuru y’inyandiko, amafoto, amajwi, videwo na porogaramu ku buryo ushobora kuyasoma cyangwa ukayandika igihe cyose ubishakiye.

english_terms: Computer memory | random Access Memory (RAM) | main memory | memory
definition_kin: Uburyo bukoreshwa mu kubika amakuru na gahunda ku buryo budahoraho cyangwa ku buryo buhoraho kugira ngo mudasobwa izayakoreshe.
Igikoresho cyo kubika amakuru gifatirwa hanze ya mudasobwa, kigahuza na yo binyuze kuri USB cyangwa undi murongo wo kuyinyuza.

synonym_kin: Disike nsomesharumuri (diisîki nsomeesharumuri); disike ya razeri (diisîki ya râzeeri).
definition_kin: Ubwoko bwa disike ibika amakuru akanasomwa hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga urumuri rwa razeri ku buso bwayo nka sede, dividi).

Uburyo bwo gucunga ububiko bwa mudasobwa butuma mudasobwa ikoresha igice cy’ububiko bwo kuri disiki (Hard Disk cyangwa SSD) nk’aho ari RAM, bityo ikabasha gukoresha porogaramu nini cyangwa nyinshi icyarimwe.

french_terms: Système de contrôle d'accès | contrôle d'accès
definition_kin: Urwungano gitoroniki rutuma umukozi ubyemerewe yiinjira ahantu hagenzurwa, hato kandi harinzwe yeretse gusa insomagisobanuro icyuma kimenyetso nsobanuzi, bityo rutuma ibigo birinda amakuru yabyo akomeye bigabanya uburyo bwo kuyageraho n’ibyo bashobora kuyakoraho.

Imbonezanzira y’itumanaho ikorera ku rwego rwa kabiri rw’icyitegererezo cya OSI gifite ibyiciro 7, ikagira umumaro ukomeye mu mpuzanzira z’amakuru yoroshya iyohereza ry’amapaki y’amakuru hagati ibikoresho.

Urwunge rw’amategeko n’amasezerano ayobora iyohereza n’iyakira ry’amakuru mu itumanaho hagati y’ibikoresho by’ihuzanzira ku buryo buhwitse hatitawe ku ihangwa ryayo cyangwa ku nkoranabuhanga zakoreshejwe.

english_terms: iPhone Operating System | IDevice Operating System | iOS
definition_kin: Sisitemu yihariye yo gukoresha telefoni zigendanwa ikoresha telefoni zigendanwa nka iPhone na iPad.
Sisitemu yo gukoresha telefoni igendanwa yakozwe na Apple Inc. ku murongo wayo wa tabuleti iPad.

english_terms: Macintosh Operating System | Macintosh | macOS | mac
definition_kin: Sisitemu y'imikorere ikoresha Mac zose.
Amahame ngenderwaho abafatanyabikorwa bakoresha kugira ngo ikoranabuhanga rikoreshwe neza.

Igikoresho cy’umutekano w’urusobe gihora gikurikirana urusobe rw’ibikorwa bibi kandi kigafata ingamba zo kukirinda harimo gutanga raporo, guhagarika cyangwa kukireka. Imbonezamirimo nyamakuru (imbonezamirimo nyamâkurû)
Imiremekere ihanitse ya mudasobwa igizwe n’ibikoresho, inkoranabuhanga, n’ibikorwa byunganira byakorewe
Igice kimwe mu bigize porogaramu ya mudasobwa kigaragaza amabwiriza ndetse n'amategeko agenderwaho mu bikorwa byose by'iyo porogaramu ya mudasobwa.
Uruhurirane rw’amabwiriza aba agenwe agatuma ibintu bibiri byo mu ikoranabuhanga bishobora kohererezanya amakuru ku buryo bw’ihuzanzira.

Ikoreshwa ry’imikorere nyamibare mu ngeri nyabumenyi zinyuranye nk’ubutabire, ubugenge, ubumenyi bw’insoro ndemabuzima n’ubumenyi bw’isanzure, hifashishijwe ivangwa ry’imibare ihanitse n’ikoranabuhanga mu gusubiza ibibazo by’inkoranabuhanga hifashishijwe uburyo koranabuhanga.
Imbonezanzira y'itumanaho ikoresshwa mu gusangira dosiye y’ifatishanzira mbonera (P2P), ifasha abayikoresha gukwirakwiza no kwakira dosiye nini neza kuri murandasi.
Urwunge rw’amategeko n’amabwiriza bituma inkoranabuhanga zohererezanya ubutumwa mu ihuzanzira zigena ingano y’amakuru n’imikorere y’ihererekanya ry’amakuru hagati inzungano zitandukanye.
Gahunda y’ihuzanzira shusho ryihariye rituma haba ihura ry’igikoresho koranabuhanga n’impuzamakuru hatarinze guhishwa indemo yoherezwa.

french_terms: Protocole de diffusion en continu | protocole de diffusion
definition_kin: Uburyo amakuru y’uruhererekane yoherezwa kuri murandasi mu buryo bw’ikiganiro cy’amashusho cyangwa se bw’amajwi biri kuba ako kanya.

Ijambo banga, urufunguzo banga, ibiranga bya gihanga, amategeko, imbonezanzira y’ihuzamakuru n’iyindi mikorere ihamye, ibyo byose bishobora gukenerwa mu gutuma umukiriya cyangwa undi wese ukoresha ikoranabuhanga ubyemerewe kuba yakwinjira muri izo serivisi.

english_terms: Video adapter | graphics adapter | display adapter | graphics card | video card
french_terms: Adapteur video | carte graphique, carte graphique, carte graphique | carte vidéo
definition_kin: Kimwe mu bigize mudasobwa gishinzwe gutanga no kugaragaza amashusho ku nsakazamashusho.
Igice cya kamera gikora nk’ijisho kigatuma ifoto cyangwa amashusho bifatwa neza.

Imikorere nyabwemge aho umuntu amenya kandi agashyira mu byiciro ibintu, amasura cyangwa ibiba bibaye biciye mu gufindura amakuru nyamboni y’aho ari aboneka mu mafoto n’amashusho, ni kimwe no guha mudasobwa amadarubindi agezweho atuma ibona ikanasobanukirwa iyi si dutuyemo, bigasaba gushobora gutahura ikintu, kuba warigeze kukibona, kugihuza n’amakuru aranga icyo kintu abitse mu mbikamakuru no gushobora kugera mu kigega mbikamakuru no gukurayo amakuru yizewe.
Uburyo bwo
igice cya porogaramu kikuyobora mu ntambwe zimwe na zimwe.
Uburyo bugufasha kuganira n’ubwenge buhangano ukoresheje ururimi uvuga.
Igikoresho gifata kikanabika amashusho mu buryo koranabuhanga, hakoreshejwe imfatamakuru mu guhindura urumuri mo imiraba gitoroniki na yo isesengurwa kugira ngo itange ishusho koranabuhanga
Igikoresho kibika amajwi ku kidongi cy’umugozi mbikamajwi, yaba yoherejwe n’amikoro cyangwa avuye ku yindi mbikamajwi.
igikoresho gihindura amakuru nyabubiri kikayashyira mu buryo bumwe bugezweho.
Igikoresho cya eregitoroniki gikurura cyane urumuri bigatuma gifata amashusho kikayagenera amafishiye koranabuhanga kandi bigakorwa ku buryo bw’amashusho.

Igikoresho cyakorewe gufata no gusakaza amashusho kuri mudasobwa cyangwa ku ihuzanzira koranabuhanga, kigakoreshwa ku buryo bw’imvugisho nyamashusho, igaragazamashusho rifatiyeho, imbuga nkoranyambaga no mu ikoranabuhanga.
Ubwoko bw’umubare ukoreshwa muri porogaramu za mudasobwa kugira ngo ugaragaze imibare nyayo ifite ubuziranenge bwo hejuru.

french_terms: Valeur de place flottante | nombre à point flottant
definition_kin: Ubwoko bw’umubare ukoreshwa muri progaramu ya mudasobwa kugira ngo ugaragaze imibare nyayo kandi yuzuye, akaba ari uburyo bwo kwerekana imibare hamwe n’ibice
ishami rya siyansi ya mudasobwa ryiga uburyo mudasobwa zigomba guhagararira imibare no kuyikorera ibikorwa.

french_terms: Gestion électronique | système de gestion de documents
definition_kin: Urwungano koranabuhanga rucunga inyandiko rukoreshwa mu kubika amafishiye (cyangwa inyandiko), kuyasangiza, kuyakurikirana no kuyacunga.
Imigenere n’imibonereze y’ibikorwa ku ndebero cyangwa mu nyandiko, igategeka imiterere nyamisusire, ikizeza imikoreshereze ibangutse kandi yoroheye umukiriya.
Insinga z’itumanaho zashyizwe ahantu ariko zitarashyirwamo uburyo bwo kohereza iryo tumanaho.
ibisubizo byabugenewe hamwe na serivise zikoreshwa mu buzima bw’imikino yose kandi zateguwe mu buryo bugamije iterambere ry’imikino.
Uruhurirane rw’imirimo ikorwa mu guhanga, kubaka no gutanga ndetse no kubungabunga igicuruzwa cy’ikoranabuhanga cyangwa serivisi y’ikoranabuhanga.
Imikorere ya mudasobwa yita ku miterere n’imyitwarire ya sisitemu ya mudasobwa nkuko bigaragara ku bakoresha.
Isesengura n’ikoreshwa ry’amakuru rikurikije amategeko hagamijwe ibyagenwe nko gusesengura cyangwa gukora raporo, ifatwa ry’ibyemezo, gushakashaka za serivisi no kuzitanga.
Uburyo bwo gushushanya bugamije gutanga ibisubizo byujuje ibyifuzo nyabyo, aho kubona ibikenewe.
Ikintu shingiro mu nzungano z’indoro ya mudasobwa gishobora gukoreshwa ku buryo bwinshi hagamijwe kugera ku bikorwa bitandukanye.
Imiterere ishingirwaho hashyirwaho ibice byose by'ubwenge bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Imiterere n’uburyo inyandiko igaragara, nk’ingano n’isura y’inyuguti.
Uburyo mbonera bwo kwandika amakuru kugira ngo abikwe mu ifishiye koranabuhanga.
Imikorere igena ikurikirana y’ikoresha ry’amategeko muri porogaramu bigatuma hashobora gufatwa icyemezo no gusubiramo.

Ishusho ihagarariye ikimenyetso cy’ijwi cyangwa se ijwi ryafashwe, bigaha ukoresha mudasobwa isura y’ijwi yumva bitewe no kwerekana ingano yaryo (ubuzamuke bw’umuraba) n’igihe rimara (ubutambike cyangwa ubugare bw’umuraba).
Imiterere yihariye y’itunganya, ibika n’ikoresha ry’amakuru muri sisitemu ya mudasobwa, bigatuma kwinjira no kuyikoresha by’ingirakamaro.
imiterere n’imikoranire y’ibice bigize mudasobwa, igaragaza uko ibyuma bikorana n’uko bitegurwa kugira ngo porogaramu zikorwe neza.
Igihe ubuyobozi bwifashisha ikoranabuhanga rigezweho mu miyoborere y’ikigo cyangwa se y’urwego rw’imiyoborere.
Imiyoboro y'itumanaho ifite ubushobozi bwo kohereza ubutumwa mu buryo butaziguye hagati y'ibikoresho by’itumanaho.
Akamenyetso kari ku rwandikiro rwa mudasobwa, gafite umumaro wo guhagarika amashusho by’akanya gato kugeza kongeye gukandwa.
Ububiko buto bw’amakuru ari kuri sisitemu ngengamikorere ya mudasobwa ndetse n’igenga imikorere ya murandasi ku buryo mudasobwa iramutse igize ikibazo yakwifashishwa mu kuyatsa.
Igice cy’imbonezamikorere kigomba gushyira amakuru muri za gahunda n’amasomero.
Mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho
Ahantu herekeza ku gikoresho icyo ari cyo cyose gifatika cyangwa gikoreshwa mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga gihuza n’umuyoboro kandi kikaba ari ahantu ho kugera cyangwa guhanahana amakuru.
Aho umufatabuguzi afatiye ku muyoboro rusange w’itumanaho hakagaragazwa na aderesi ye ifitanye isano n’inomero cyangwa izina ry’umufatabuguzi.
Ibikoresho by’itumanaho nsakazamajwi byifashishwa mu kwakira ibimenyetso by’itumanaho bikabyongerera ingufu ubundi bikongera bikoherezwa.
Urupapuro mpeshafaranga rukozwe mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga, rwifashishwa mu kugura ibicuruzwa na serivisi runaka.
Porogaramu nto ikoreshwa mu ntangiriro igapima ubushobozi bw’intima bwo gukora buri sogonda.

Igikoresho gikoreshwa mu bufotozi gipima iyegerana cyangwa ukwisuganya kw’ifoto, gipima iyegerana cyangwa ikigero cy’ubwijime bwa firimi cyangwa akabaho k’ifoto gafata ingaragaro yayo hakoreshejwe uburyo mboneshwajisho bw’imirase ibiri inganya ingufu.

Agakoresho nyunganizi mu bufotozi kagapima ubukana bw’urumuri kandi kakerekana uburyo bwiza bwo kwitegera urumuri (ihuza ry’umuryango n’umuvuduko wo kwifunga) bijya ku imfatamakuru ya firimi cyangwa y’ishusho yumva ku buryo bwihariye.
Uburyo bwo kwinjiza ikoranabuhanga mu nzego zose z’ikigo, harimo ibicuruzwa, serivisi, n’imikorere, hagamijwe gutanga agaciro ku bakiriya.

english_terms: Fatal system error | fatal error | system crash | stop error | kernel error | bug check
french_terms: Erreur système fatale | erreur fatale | plantage système | erreur d'arrêt | erreur de noyau | vérification de bogue
definition_kin: Ikosa rikomeye riboneka iyo urwungano nyoboramikorere ruhagaze kuko ruba rugeze aho rutagishobora gukora rufite umutekano kuko amakuru akomeye ashobora kuzimira cyangwa urwungano nyobozi rukangirika ku buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose.
Akantu ko kuri mwandikisho ikoreshwa mu kwandika inyuguti nkuru cyangwa kubona ibimenyetso byo hejuru ku tubuto tw’imibare n’utundi tubuto turi kuri mwandikisho.
Porogaramu ikora umurimo wo guhindura inyandiko hagati y’indimi.

Igikoresho cyangwa porogaramu ikora umurimo wo guhindura mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga ikintu kimwe kikajya mu kindi, ariko ikintu nyirizina kigakomeza kuba cyo, hahinduka gusa imiterere cyangwa uko gikoreshwa.

Ibonezabitekerezo rikoreshwa na za mudasobwa mu gutahura niba icyemejwe ari ukuri cyangwa ari ikosa, ni ubwoko rero bw’amakuru bufite gusa agaciro gashoboka k’ubwoko bubiri gusa: ni byo cyangwa ni ikosa, akaba ari inshoza remezo y’ibonezamikorere n’iy’ibonezabitekerezo, bikaba ari iremezo ryifatabyemezo n’igenzura ry’ingano y’amakuru mu rwungano.

english_terms: Quick Response code (QR) | QR code | QR
french_terms: Code de réponse rapide | Code QR
definition_kin: Ishusho ishobora gusomwa na mudasobwa cyangwa imfatashusho ya telefoni, muri uko kuyisoma ibasha kubona amakuru runaka ikeneye kandi byihuse.
Urwungano rufatika kandi ngendanwa, rugenzurwa n’ukoresha mudasobwa hagamijwe kubika amakuru ahishe cyangwa nyamibare kandi akaba yakora imirimo nyamibare, imirimo banga.
Ahantu hafatika habitse za mudasobwa n’ibikoresho bijyana.

Igikoresho gifata amakuru y’ibiba cyangwa bihindutse aho kiri kikayoherereza ibindi bikoresho gitoroniki akenshi aba ari inshobozamudasobwa, kigapima imiterere yihariye, kikohereza umuraba uba atari koranabuhanga ugomba guhindurwamo amakuru
Igikoresho gifata kikanahindura ibimenyetso nyamibare byo shingiro ry’amafoto n’amashusho nyamibare mu bikoresho nk’imfatamafoto, telefoni na sikaneri.
Icyifashishwa gituma habaho ihura ry’ibikoresho ku buryo bunywanye cyangwa icomekwa ry’ibikoresho bibiri rishoboka kandi byari byarakozwe ku buryo bidashobora kurumanywa.
Imiterere y’ibanze y’amakuru ibika itsinda ry’amakuru afite imiterere imwe kandi akagira ibiyaranga kimwe.

french_terms: Lecteur de stockage externe | périphérique de stockage externe | stockage auxiliaire | stockage secondaire
definition_kin: Igikoresho cya mudasobwa kibamo amakuru yose ashobora gukoreshwa ataba mu kigega nyamukuru cyangwa mu mbikamakuru ya mudasobwa.
Itsinda ry’imbuga za murandasi zihuza, zifite gahunda imwe cyangwa inyungu imwe.

french_terms: Dispositif de connexion | Périphérique de connexion
definition_kin: Igikoresho gihuza ibitangazamakuru hagati yabyo kigakora nk‘impuza nkoranabuhanga hagati y’ihuzanzira zitandukanye cyangwa za mudasobwa.
Uburyo bworoshye kandi bufite akamaro ko kwerekana imiterere y'amabara yose y'ishusho.
Dosiye zemerera porogaramu za Windowuzi guhuza murandasi n'izindi mudasobwa.

english_terms: Bayonet Neill– Concelman Connector | BNC connector
definition_kin: Icyuma kiburungushuye kikagira umuringa urimo imbere giherereye ku mpera y’urusinga kikifashishwa mu kurucomeka ku urundi rusinga.
Icyuma gikoze nk’inyuguti ya T giherereye ku mpera y’urusinga kikifashishwa mu kurucomeka ku rundi.
Imbata y’amakuru isobanura uko amakuru abitse muri porogaramu za mudasobwa akoreshwa kandi yitabwaho, harimo: kuyahindura, kuyakwirakiza ku bindi bikoresho no ku mbuga nkoranyambaga.
Igishushanyo mbonera cy'ikoranabuhanga giteye imbere gishimangira umutekano wa sisitemu, imikoranire, n'imikorere.

french_terms: Carte d'acquisition | carte d'acquisition vidéo numérique | capture d'image
definition_kin: Igikoresho cya mudasobwa mu bisanzwe bifata ishusho y’umurongo wa eregitoronike ucomeka mu bubiko bwa mudasobwa bwite.

Urwinjiriro kuri mudasobwa hashobora gucomekwa intwaramakuru hagafatwa nk’urwaguriro rushobora gushyirwa ku ndongozi ya mudasobwa kugira ngo rwakire amakarita y’urwaguriro yongera kuri mudasobwa ibikoresho nkoranabuhanga bigaha ukoresha mudasobwa kwisanzura mu gukoresha icyo ashaka mudasobwa no kuvugurura inzungano ayongeraho ibikoresho nk’ingaragazamashusho, ikarita huzanzira n’ikarita nsohorajwi.
Igikoresho gihuza ibyiciro bibiri by’ibikoresho bifite amakuru, kikaba kigizwe n’inzira nkoranabuhanga ntwaramakuru.
igikoresho cyo gutunganya dosiye kuri mudasobwa yawe.
Igikoresho cy'ikoranabuhanga gifite akamaro ko kohereza ingufu z'amashanyarazi mu bikoresho nka mudasobwa na telefoni. Indanangizi (indânaangizi)
Urukurikirane rw'uduce cyangwa inyuguti zikoreshwa mu gufunga no gukuraho amakuru.

Ijambo, izina, umubare, inyuguti, ikimenyetso, uruhurirane rw’ibintu bikoreshwa mu kuranga ku buryo bwihariye, ikintu, itsinda,umurimo, icyiciro cyangwa ikindi kintu cyagenwe n’ugikoresha, icyo kimenyetso kigahabwa mudasobwa, kigakoreshwa na buri serivisi koranabuhanga kugira ngo mudasobwa imenyekane aho iherereye, ikaba yacomekwaho, igakorerwaho ibikorwa byo kuyibungabunga bisanzwe, no kugira ngo itange serivisi y’ifasha biciye mu yakure, ikaba ari iremezo mu guhanga ururimi rwa mudasobwa.

Agafishiye gato k’inyandiko karimo indanga rukumbi n’amakuru y’ukoresha murandasi koherezwa na mugabuzi y’urubuga rwa murandasi, ikakoherereza inshakisha, kakabikwa ku gikoresho cy’ukoresha ikoranabuhanga, bigafasha urubuga rwa murandasi kubika ku urusurara nk’inshuro yasuye, indimi akunda, ibiri ku rupapuro yaguriyeho, bityo gushaka amakuru yihariye nyayo kandi yakoreshwa biroroha.
Porogaramu runaka ya mudasobwa ishoboza abayikoresha kubona ibikorwa bitandukanye batabanje kujya kubishaka ahabanza.

Ishusho y'ikoranabuhanga igaragaza muri make imiterere y'ubukana bw'ahantu cyangwa ikintu kiri mu ishusho. Ifata amakuru yerekeye urwego rw'ubukana muri ako gace, bigatuma arigoritime (algorithms) zigereranya kandi zigasesengura ibikubiye mu ishusho.
Inyuguti ziba ku mpera y’izina rya dosiye zigaragaza ubwoko bwa fishiye n’uko porogaramu iyifungura.

Indanga yihariye yahanzwe ikorwa iyo ukoresha mudasobwa agiye ku rubuga rwa murandasi cyangwa ku nkoranabuhanga, ikaba ituma urwungano (sistemu) rumenya rukanacunga ibikorwa by’ukoresha mudasobwa ku mapaji menshi cyangwa ku byo yasabye muri icyo gihe ari kuri mudasobwa.

Indangakintu yihariye imbonezamikorere iha ifishi iyo ifunguwe bwa mbere, igatuma za gahunda zishobora gukorana n’amafishiye, urucomekero cyangwa ubundi buryo bwinjiza bukanasohora amakuru, hagamijwe ko imbonezamikorere igira icyo ikora ku mafishi.
Urwungano rw’ibanga ngendanwa rukoreshwa mu iyemeza ry’urwungano.
Ibintu bitandukanye

Igikoresho koranabuhanga cyifashishwa mu gutahura izina ry’igikoresho (nk’inyandiko) n’aho giherereye mu buryo buhamye kandi busobanutse hifashishijwe inyuguti zigize izina rya dosiye cyangwa inzira yerekana aho dosiye ibikwa, bityo indangagikoresho itanga uburyo buhamye bwo gufasha izindi mudasobwa zikabona ibyo bikoresho hifashishijwe ihuzanzira cyangwa murandasi.
Inyandiko ikubiyemo amabwiriza n’imikorere ya porogaramu cyangwa sisitemu runaka.

Intambwe ya mbere mu kuvumbura isano iri hagati y’utunyangingo foto turi mu ishusho koranabuhanga n’ibyo abantu bibuka nyuma kuba bitegereje ishusho cyangwa itsinda ry’amafoto nyuma yaho iminota mike.
Inkoranabuhanga ntangagihe zigaragaza amakuru hashingiye ku masogonda cyangwa imitarukire y’isaha ishingiye kuva igihe runaka kigenewe mudasobwa iriho ikoreshwa cyangwa cy’urubuga ruriho rukoreshwa.

Imikorere ikoreshwa mu ikoranabuhanga mu gufata ibimenyetso nyamiterere rusange y’imiterere y’amafoto mu gusesengura ibigiye bisa nko mu mabara, ibyerekezo, umujyo w’amashusho y’imiterere kugira ngo bitange ishusho mbaruramibare y’imiterere.
Vegiteri ndangamimerereiranga ishusho yose cyangwa cyayo aho kuranga uduce duto twayo.
Imiterere irimo amakuru asobanura amakuru, agakoreshwa mu gukora indundo cyangwa imiterere nyamubyimba muri za mudasobwa, urugero iyo havugwa ahabikwa izina ryayo, izina ry’ifishi n’ahabikwa amakuru.

Uburyo bukoreshwa mu mu kugaragaza intera nyamumaro ya za vegiteri nyinjiza hagamijwe itondeka, hatarinze haba icagagura ry’ishusho mo ibipande kandi bukaba bwiza mu kugaragaza imbibi mu gukosora ishusho.
Ibimenyetso cyangwa amakuru yihariye bifasha kumenya mudasobwa cyangwa uyikoresha mu miyoboro y’ikoranabuhanga.
Icyangombwa gikoresha ikoranabuhanga mu kubona serivisi za Leta no kumenyekanisha umuturage.

Imigaragarire itsitse y’inkosoranyandiko cyangwa ahantu h’ishusho ku buryo bw’urukurikirane nyabubiri buturutse mu igerereranya ry’ubukana bw’utunyangingo foto ku hantu hagenwe mbere hafashweho nk’indango y’inkosoranyandiko.
Umuyobora wo kuri murandasi utanga inzira ikugeza ku handi hantu havomwa amakuru nko ku rubuga rwa murandasi, ku nyandiko cyangwa ku ifishiye,…, rukarangwa no kuranga neza ahafunguwe cyangwa ahagiwe.

french_terms: Intégration de la découverte de description universelle
