definition_kin: Uburyo bukomatanyije abantu bakoresha bahuza ndetse bashyiraho ubucuruzi n’indi mirirmo itandukanye ku buryo bwa murandasi butaziguye.
Akamenyetso gakoreshwa mu gushakisha amafishiye cyangwa porogaramu muri mudasobwa.
Urubuga rw’ikoranabuhanga ry’ikigo cy’ubucuruzi cyangwa urutonde rucapye ruriho amakuru atondeka ibigo mu byiciro bishingiye ku hagaragara ko nta hangana mu bucuruzi rihari.
Insohoramakuru igaragaza amashusho, inyandiko n’amavidewo biri mu mabara atandukanye hakurikije iimpuzamabara ya RGB.
Akadirishya ko kureberamo kari hejuru y’indebero y’imfatafoto gafasha uyikoresha kubona neza ikintu afotora mu buryo bwa nyabwo, adakoresheje ikirahure cy’imfatafoto.

synonym_kin: Ingaragaza ya LCD (ingaragaza ya LCD); ingaragaza nkorwaho (ingaragaza nkôrwahô).
french_terms: Écran à cristaux liquides | affichage à cristaux liquides | écran LCD
definition_kin: Ubwoko bw’indebero bukoresha ikoranabuhanga rya LCD mu kugaragaza amashusho cyangwa inyandiko.
Igikoresho cy’irebero rishashe rikoresha imiraba ya LCD/LED nk’urwungano nyerekanamashusho rwa mudasobwa.
Ubwoko bw’indebero bwakozwe na Sony mu wa 1968, bukaba bukoresha uburyo bwihariye bwo kwerekana amashusho asukuye.

english_terms: Graphical user interface (GUI) | Graphical interface | Graphical control element
french_terms: Interface utilisateur graphique | utilitaire graphique | élément de contrôle graphique
definition_kin: Aho abakoresha mudasobwa baganirira n’inkoranabuhanga hakoreshejwe ibimenyetso biboneshwa amaso aho kuba amategeko y’inyandiko.
Igipimo cy’umwimerere w’ibara.
Ikinyabumwe cy’ibara gito cyane gishobora gukoreshwa mu nkoranabuhanga nko muri gahunda y’irebero rya mudasobwa cyangwa mu ishusho rya mudasobwa.

Ijwi, inyandiko, ishusho riri hamwe, ishusho rigenda cyangwa ubundi buryo bwose bukomatanya amajwi n’amashusho, ubutumwa bukoresha ibimenyetso by’intoki cyangwa uburyo bukomatanya uburyo bwose bumaze kuvugwa bushobora gukorwa, gufatwa, kubikwa, kongera kuboneka cyangwa kugezwa ku bandi mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Igamije kugenzura no guhagarika imeri zishobora guteza ibibazo ziturutse mu bubiko bwanyirayo.
Urwungano ndindamutekano huzanzira rucunga rukanagenzura itambuka ry’amakuru, haba ari ayinjira n’asohoka hashingiwe ku mategeko y’umutekano asanzwe agenwe.
Ikimenyetso gishyirwa ku rupapuro cyangwa inyandiko kigaragara iyo kerekejwe ku rumuri kirinda ko iyo nyandiko cyangwa urupapuro byakiganwa mu buryo butemewe.

Iyandikwa ry’uburyo indindamudasobwa icunga amoko atandukanye y’ibihita, indangambonezanzira n’inkomoko n’iz’aho ubutumwa bujya, imbonezanzira, nomero z’inzira n’icungwa ry’umutekano w’amakuru n’ibiyabaho mu rwego rwo koroshya igenzura ry’igitero.

Ikoranabuhanga rikoresha uburyo bwo kunoza amajwi ku rwego rwo hejuru harimo no kunoza ubwirangire n’ingufu by’ijwi. Ubu buryo bukaba bukoreshwa cyane mu matereviziyo na mudasobwa zigendanwa bigezweho.
Ikintu gikoreshwa mu gushushanya gifasha ekara cyangwa idirishya kugabanywamo ibice byinshi, buri gice kigaragaza ibikubiye mu nyandiko icyarimwe.
Ingamba z'umutekano mu itumanaho mu kurinda amakuru y'ibanga gukoreshwa n’utabiherewe uburenganzira cyangwa agahindura, agahanagura cyangwa agatangaza ayo makuru y’ibanga.
Ikoranabuhanga rigezweho ryifashishwa mu bucuruzi n’ibindi bikorwa bibushamikiraho harimo inganda zitunganya ibicuruzwa n’izitanga za serivisi runaka.
Uburyo bw’isi shusho bwerekana uko amakuru yatangajwe cyangwa yeretswe ukoresha mudasobwa cyangwa se ni uburyo bwo kugaragaza mu rwungano cyane cyane imbikamakuru n’uruganiriro rw’ukoresha mudasobwa.
Uburyo porogaramu ya mucapyi ifasha abayikoresha kureba uko inyandiko iri bugaragare nisohorwa.
Agashusho ndanga kerekana amadirishya yose afunguye kuri mudasobwa.
Imfatashusho isobanura ishusho, ingano n’ibara ry’inyandiko cyangwa igishushanyo bigaragara ku nsakazamashusho.

french_terms: Moniteur de forme d'ondes | oscilloscope de forme d'ondes
definition_kin: Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga gikoreshwa kwerekana no gusesengura imiterere, urwego, n’igihe cy’ibimenyetso bya video cyangwa audio mu ishusho y’imiraba, bigafasha abatekinisiye kugenzura ubuziranenge n’ubunyangamugayo bw’ibimenyetso.

english_terms: Background | desktop background | desktop picture | desktop image
definition_kin: Ifoto cyangwa igishushanyo kigaragara; mu ngaragazamashusho nk’umutako mu gihe ifunguye.

english_terms: Trashcan | recycle bin | trash bin | dustbin | wastebasket
definition_kin: Gahunda ya mudasobwa ibika ibidakenewe mu gihe gito byasibwe, kugira ngo nihabaho kwivuguruza uwasibye abe yabigarura cyangwa abikureho burundu.
Igikoresho gifasha abayobozi gukora imirimo mike biciye mu ruganiriro imbere y’amategeko, bigafasha abakoresha mudasobwa kugarura inshobozi igihe habaye ikibazo gikomeye.
Akantu gakoreshwa mu kugarura inyandiko cyangwa porogaramu kuri mugaragaza.
Icyiciro cy’urumuri kamera ishobora gukomeza gufata amashusho yakoreshwa, uhereye ku hijimye kugera ahabona cyane.
Gutuma igikoresho na mudasobwa bihuzwa bigahererekanya ubwumvikane bw’imikoreranire bitewe n’uko hagenzuwe ko ibyangombwa byuzuye kugira ngo bikorane.
Urwungano rukora imirimo yarwo ku buryo bw’ibice byuzuzanya hifashishijwe ubushobozi buke, bigatuma hakorwa gahunda imwe gusa.

french_terms: Langage de programmation | code de programmation
definition_kin: Ikoraniro ry’amabwiriza yanditswe n’umugenamikorere ya mudasobwa kugira ngo ahe amabwiriza mudasobwa na yo ibashe gukora no gutunganya igikorwa runaka, ayo mabwiriza aba ari nyamibare atumvwa na buri wese, akaba yubatse ku buryo burongoroye afite imiterere ngenamikorere nyandimi aboneye.

Ubwoko bwa gahunda ya mudasobwa usanga ari urukurikirane cyangwa urutonde rw’amategeko akurikizwa na mudasobwa, aba ari mu ipaji yo ku rubuga, agasigurwa kandi agakoreshwa na gahunda ya mudasobwa cyangwa inyandika.
Ururimi rw'ikoranabuhanga n'ikoranabuhanga rikoresha porogaramu zitandukanye, ridafite urubuga, kandi rikoresha ibintu bitandukanye.

english_terms: Computer programming | computer program | Programming Language | computer coding | coding
definition_kin: Uburyo bwa gihanga buha amakuru mudasobwa bukayereka ibikorwa bigomba gukorwa kugira ngo ikibazo cyari gihari gikemuke, ubu buryo butuma umuntu aganira na mudasobwa, akayiha amategeko agennye mu rurimi mudasobwa zishobora kumva.
Igikoresho kigabanya cyangwa se kikongera ingano y’imiyoboro nsakazamashusho idahuye n’ibyagenwe.
Urwungano rugenga amakuru ari ku gikoresho gishyizwe muri mudasobwa.
Serivisi ya sisitemu ishinzwe gucunga no kwerekana amamenyesha ava kuri porogaramu. Ingenzuramikorere (igêenzuuramîkorêre)
Sisitemu ikurikirana uko urubuga cyangwa sisitemu y’amakuru ikora no kumenya ibibazo by’umutekano.
Porogaramu ifasha gusuzuma no gukosora amakosa y’imyandikire mu nyandiko.

Igice cya mudasobwa gitanga ubushobozi kigenzura umutima wa mudasobwa kigakora ibisabwe haba ari ugutanga uburenganzira cyangwa kubukuraho bishingiye ku mabwiriza yatanzwe n’uburyo umutima wa mudasobwa uteguye.

Igikoresho ngaragaza gikozwe cyane cyane ifite ubuso bushashe ibona umuyego n’imihagararire y’intoki z’ukoresha mudasobwa, kikabihinduramo imiyego nyabuso (2D) kugira ngo kigenzure akayoborambeba mu gikoresho cy’amashusho ku irebero rya mudasobwa.
Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga kigabanya urumuri.
igice cy’uburyo bw’itumanaho buhuriweho bukusanya kandi bugatanga amakuru kugira ngo bucunge kandi bugenzure ibintu byinshi. Ingenzuzi y’amashusho (ingeenzuuzi y’âmashusho)
Urukomatane rw’imikorere mu isaba, itunganya, iyemeza n’ishyirwa kuri konti ry’inguzanyo ku buryo bw’iyakure kandi bwihuse ndetse

Serivisi y’imari yo mu ikoranabuhanga ituma abayikoresha basaba bakanemererwa ndetse bakanahabwa inguzanyo nto y’igihe gito biciye muri terefoni ngendanwa hifashishijwe inkoranabuhanga zo muri terefoni, hifashishijwe kode za USSD cyangwa SMS, bitabaye ngombwa kujya ku cyicaro cya banki.

Umuyoboro w’itumanaho ibimenyetso bijyaho bikakirwa n’igikoresho gicometse ku ihuzanzira, bukaba ari uburyo bwo kohererezanya amakuru hagati y’ibikoresho bifatika cyangwa inkoranabuhanga hatibagiranye n’imbonezanzira z’itumanaho, byaba bikozwe muri mudasobwa imbere cyangwa hagati ya za mudasobwa.

synonym_kin: Imbarutso y’ibumoso (imbârutso y’îbumosô); ikanda ry’ibumoso (ikaanda ry’îbumosô).
english_terms: Left click | main click | default click
definition_kin: Akabuto k’ibanze k’imbeba gakoreshwa bagakanda, batoranya imbonera, bakanyereza kugira ngo bagaragazeicyane ijambo cyangwa ikintu kandi gakora nk’akayoborambeba.

synonym_kin: Imbarutso y’iburyo (imbârutso y’îburyô); ikanda ry’iburyoo (ikaanda ry’îburyô).
definition_kin: Akabuto kungiriza ubusanzwe gafungura inzira ya bugufi kaganisha ku ngingo z’ibikorwa, kagatanga amahitamo yerekeye amafishiye, indangabikorwa cyangwa agace k’irebero akanyerezo ngaragazahantu gaherereyemo.
Imiterere myiza y'ingano y'umweru ibuza amashusho kugira ibara runaka, nk'icyatsi kibisi giterwa n'amatara ya fluorescent.
Ubwoko bw'ikoranabuhanga ryo kwerekana, rikunze gukoreshwa mu ndebero ya LCD na OLED, aho buri ndemashusho igenzurwa ukwayo n’intuburamiraba nyatwugara (TFT) n’akabikamuriro.
Igikoresho kirekire gishyirwaho inzungano zitandukanye nka nteni, insakazamajwi, n’insinga z’amashanyarazi.
Ikintu gitwikirizwa insinga cyangwa se aho zinyura kugira ngo bibe byazirinda kwangirika.
Inyandiko yerekana amagambo atandukanye asobanura kimwe mu gihe cyo kunoza inyandiko.

english_terms: World Wide Web | WWW | W3 | web
definition_kin: Urwungano rw’amapaji ya murandasi ahujijwe kandi ashobora kugerwaho ahuza inyandiko n’amashusho bihujijwe byo mu isi yose.
Igikoresho gicapa amakuru koranabuhanga, kigakora kopi y’amakuru ifatika, twavuga nk’incapanyandiko nka mucapyi, fagisi, imashini zandika ku bikoresho cyangwa imyenda, n’ibindi.
Mudasobwa yateguriwe gukora urwunge rw’imirimo yihariye nko gukosora amafoto, gufata amajwi, ikorwa rya za videwo.

english_terms: Computer software | Computing software | software | computer program | Program
french_terms: Logiciel informatique | logiciel | programme informatique | programme
definition_kin: Gahunda iha amabwiriza mudasobwa hifashishijwe ibikoresho koranabuhanga byihariye nk’intunganyanyandiko, ikigega cy’amakuru cyangwa sisitemu y’imikorere, ikaba yakora imirimo yihariye inyuranye.

Ubwoko bwa mbere bw’inkoranabuhanga, yahindagurikaga mu gihe hatangiraga gukorwa inkoranabuhanga, ubu intigenewe abantu muri rusange, ikoreshwa n’abakora inkoranabuhanga mu igeragezwa ry’inkoranabuhanga nshyashya kugira ngo babone imikorere yayo y’imbere ngo barebe ibibazo bikomeye ifite mbere y’uko basoza ikorwa ryayo.
Verisiyo ya porogaramu itarashyirwa ku isoko ku mugaragaro, ihabwa abakoresha kugira ngo bayigerageze, batange ibitekerezo, kandi bafashe kumenya amakosa n’ibibazo mbere y’uko isohoka burundu.
Porogaramu nyabumenyi yerekana amashusho ikomatanya imikorere y’ubushakashatsi hamwe n’ibisubizo by’ikigereranyo kugira ngo ikore neza yerekana imiterere ya sisitemu ifatika.
Inkoranabuhanga ikoreshwa mu guhanga, mu guhindura, mu kugerageza no mu gucunga gahunda z’ikoranabuhanga.
Ubwoko bw’inkoranabuhanga ikorerwa kwangiza urwungano rwa mudasobwa cyangwa ihuzanzira cyangwa se kubyigarurira ikabikoresha.
Inkoranabuhanga yo mu biro ikoreshwa ku buryo bw’iyakure kandi ku buryo bwihuta kandi bwizewe ikagira umumaro wo gutuma
Igikoresho gisesengura ibibazo kugira ngo gifashe ikigo kumva impamvu ikintu runaka cyabaye, twavuga nk’impamvu igicuruzwa runaka kitakoze uko byari byitezwe.

Porogaramu yemerera abakoresha gushakisha dosiye ziboneka kuri seriveri imwe cyangwa nyinshi za FTP, yakozwe mu 1990 na Alan Emtage muri Kaminuza ya McGill, yemereraga abakoresha kubona dosiye zishobora gukururwa kuri murandasi.

Gahunda ituma hatahurwa ibizaba haherewe ku ndundo y’amakuru runaka, ikubakwa n’imbonezamibare y’iyigiraho rigenzurwa hagakoreshwa uburyo bw’ibara bufata amakuru ku buryo mbonera aturutse mu makuru, bidaciye mu nganyagaciro yagenwe mbere.

english_terms: Presentation software | graphics presentation application | presentation graphics program
definition_kin: Porogaramu ya mudasobwa ifasha abayikoresha gutegura ikiganiro cy’imurikabikorwa ry’ubucuruzi yifashishije imbonerahamwe, amashusho cyangwa se inyandiko.

Gahunda ikoranwa n’ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa igashyirwa mu mbikamakuru kugira ngo ibifashe gukora neza, tuyiasanga mu bikoresho bifotora, muri telefoni ngendanwa, mu makarita mpuzanzira, mu nsomamakuru munyaruko, mu ncapanyandiko, mu ntanganzira, mu nyoherezabutumwa za televiziyo.
Igikoresho kigenewe gusesengura amashusho koranabuhanga cyangwa kikayahindura mu ikoranabuhanga, kikanakora n’ibindi bikorwa byo kuyatunganya.

Inkoranabuhanga ishyigikira ibikorwa remezo yagenewe gukora akazi k’umwihariko nko kugenzura, kurinda no kunoza imikorere ya sisiteme ya mudasobwa, ikaba ikinyuranyo cy’inkoranabuhanga nkoresha yagenewe gukora imirimo, yongera ibikoresho nkoranabuhanga muri murandasi nk’indindamudasobwa, inshakishamakuru n’insomamakuru y’amashusho. Inkoranabuhanga nzira nyamamaza (inkôranabûhaânga ihêrekejwe n’îiyâmamaza)

Ingenamikorere yagenewe gukora ibikoresho n’inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa za mudasobwa no gucunga ibikoresho nk’imbikamakuru zayo, intima zayo n’ibikoresho byayo, umurimo nyamukuru wayo ni uguhuza ibikoresho koranabuhanga n’ukoresha mudasobwa, ikamubashisha gukorana na mudasobwa no gukoresha inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa.
Porogaramu yagenewe abantu bose, twavuga nka inkoranabuhanga ya Ofisi, Wadi, Egiseri,...
Inkoranabuhanga ngendanwa ituma abantu bafata amafoto, bakayabika cyangwa bakayahindura hifashishijwe igikoresho gifotora cyangwa ubundi buryo nyinjizamakuru.
Porogaramu yagenewe ibikorwa zihariye cyangwa abakiriya runaka. Urugero inkoranabuhanga z’ubucuruzi, iz’imari, iz’ubuganga, iz’uburezi.
Porogaramu yihariye kandi idasabwa gukoreshwa kuri porogaramu ya mudasobwa isanzwe.
Porogaramu ya Mikorosofuti (MSFT) yemerera porogaramu gusangira imikorere n'amakuru hagati yazo binyuze muri porogaramu za murandasi, hatitawe ku rurimi rwa porogaramu zanditsemo.
Icyegeranyo cy’ibikorwa bigize ishingiro rya gahunda iyo ari yo yose ishinzwe umutekano w'igikoresho kirimo amakuru y'ibanga.
Inkoranabuhanga (Wadi, Egiseri, PawaPowenti) zikoreshwa mu gusesengura inyandiko n’ihanga ry’imbonerahamwe nyamibare, imbikamakuru n’ibindi bikoresho byinshi.
porogaramu za mudasobwa zagenewe gukora kuri mudasobwa, zigafasha mudasobwa gukora imirimo itandukanye nko kwandika inyandiko, kubara, gutumanaho, no gucunga amakuru.

Inkoranabuhanga ikoresha inshakishamakuru kuri murandasi, ikaba ikunda gukoreshwa hagati y’ibigo bihererekanya amakuru na serivisi bitegeranye cyangwa kohererezanya ubutumwa n’abakiriya ku buryo bworoshye kandi bwizewe hifashishijwe ururimi nyamibare.
Porogaramu za mudasobwa zikorwa kugira ngo zikore muri telefoni cyangwa tabureti (tablet), zigafasha abakoresha gukora ibikorwa bitandukanye nk’itumanaho, kwiga cyangwa kwidagadura.
Porogaramu cyangwa sisitemu yihariye yagenewe guhaza ibyifuzo byihariye by'umukoresha cyangwa umuryango, aho kuba igisubizo kidakenewe.

english_terms: Application Program | Application software | software application
definition_kin: Porogaramu ya
Uruhurirane rw’ibikorwa remezo by’ikoranabuhanga byikoresha.
Ubushobozi bwo kwinjira no kugenzura mudasobwa cyangwa sisitemu uri ahandi hantu hatandukanye, ukoresheje murandasi.
Uburyo bwo kugenzurira imashini cyangwa ikinyabiziga kure ukoresheje radiyo cyangwa ibimenyetso by'ikoranabuhanga.
Ikosora ryoroheje rikorerwa kuri sisitemu mbere y’uko inyandiko itangazwa.
Ikigererenyo cy’ibyaturutse mu gice kimwe cy’ubukungu bigiye gukoreshwa kugira ngo bibyare ikigereranyo kimwe cy’ibyakozwe mu cyiciro cy’inganda.
Inkoranabuhanga yakorewe kurinda inzungano koranabuhanga na za mudasobwa bwite inkoranabuhanga zigambiriye ikibi.

french_terms: Insonoriseur | bloqueur de son | hotte acoustique
definition_kin: Igikoresho kitemerera ijwi kwinjira, gusohoka cyangwa kunyuramo.
Uburyo bwo gutanga ubutumwa bumenyesha urubuga ko hari urundi rubuga rwashyizeho ihuriro rijya kuri rwo.
Igikoresho gikoreshwa mu kumenya inzira amakuru anyuramo ku murongo wa murandasi, bifasha mu gusuzuma ibibazo by’itumanaho.

english_terms: Computer graphics | production of images | Graphics
french_terms: Infographie | production graphique | production des images | Fichier graphique
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga rigizwe n’ibintu by’ibanze harimo imirongo, isura, imyubakire, urubuga, amashusho, imyandikire n’ibara, rikaba rigamije kugaragariza abakiriya amashusho ku irebero rya mudasobwa, ry’icyuma gifotora, rya sinema, rya televiziyo, ry’ibyuma ngaragazamikino, no ku ry’ibyuma gitoronike.

Tekiniki y’ibanze ikoreshwa mu mbonezamashusho ituma haboneka amashusho anoze kandi ahuje n’ukuri, ikagabanya imbibi zitanoze mu mashusho akorwa na mudasobwa, igatuma agaragara nk’ayo mu buzuma busanzwe.
Amabwiriza yihariye aguha uburyo bwo kunoza imigaragarire y’ishusho, ukayigenera ibintu ku buryo bwihariye nk’isura cyangwa ikoreshwa ry’urubibi rw’ishusho rutsitse.
Ibwiriza ryatanzwe ryo kohereza
Ikopi ya imeri igenewe umuntu umwe cyangwa benshi uwohererejwe ubutumwa cyangwa abohererejwe ubutumwa babona abohererejwe ubutumwa bose.
Itsinda ry’ibikoresho koranabuhangabihuzwa bigakora inzira imwe ihererekanya amakuru hagati y’intima, imbikamakuru n’ibikoresho.

french_terms: Interpréteur de ligne de commande | interpréteur de commandes
definition_kin: Gahunda koranabuhanga zashyiriweho kumva ikivugwa mu nyangingo z’imirongo y’inyandiko zanditswe muri mudasomwa, zisomwe mu ifishi cyangwa mu yandi makuru.

english_terms: Digital signal processor (DSP) | digital sound processor | sound CP
definition_kin: Inzira koranabuhanga y’intima nto, iyo nzira ikaba yihariye mu gusesengura amakuru koranabuhanga ku buryo bw’ako kanya kandi bwihuse cyane imiraba y’amajwi, y’amashusho, ya videwo cyangwa y’impuririzi.

Uburebure bw’umuzenguruko hagiye habarwa utunyangingo foto, hakifashishwa insesengurarubibi nko kwerekana uburebure, umurambararo, ubuhete, n’insesengurahantu nk’ubuso, umuzenguruko, ubutsitse, agaciro mpuzandengo cyangwa nsanganya, ubusanzwe ingaragazasura y’inyuma itoranywa iyo hibandwa ku bigaragaza isura.

definition_kin: Insesenguzi y’ibiranga ibara ifata icyarimwe indemo mpimabara (igishushanyo bara) n’amakuru ku miterere y’indemo, hatitawe ku mikwirakwirire y’ibara.

Igaragaza nyamibare ry’isaranganya ry’ubukana bw’ibara mu ishusho, bifite akamaro by’umwihariko ku mashusho afite ibisobanuro adahura neza na tekiniki nkorabika, rigasesengura amabara rigaragaza umubare w’utunyangingo foto aho amabara yatwo aboneka ku rutonde rugaragaza ingeri z’amabara agize ahatwikirwa n’amabara mu ishusho.
Inshakishamakuru yakorewe abaturage isesengura ibiri kuri murandasi, ikagaragaza ibiri ku mbuga zinyuranye bikurikije ibyo umuntu yayisabye.
Inshakishamakuru ya murandasi yakozwe na Mikorosofuti.

Igikoresho nshusho kiyobora amafishiye mu gukoresha urwungano nshobozi rwa Windows.

Ubwoko bw’inkoranabuhanga ngome bukangisha gutangaza cyangwa gufunga inzira igeza ku makuru cyangwa ku rwungano koranabuhanga, muri rusange ibikora ihindura amakuru mo imibare kugeza igihe uwatewe yishyuye amafaranga uwamugabyeho igitero.
Inkoranabuhanga ikora inzira nyamibare hifashishijwe
Ibintu byose bikorwa bigahurizwa hamwe kugira ngo ifoto igaragare ku nsakazamashusho.

Igikoresho cyangwa ikindi kintu cyose gifatwa nk’igikoresho cyabugenewe cyateganyirijwe gucomekwa mu buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose, ahantu abafatabuguzi bashobora gufatira inzira ku miyoboro rusange, mu ihuzanzira aho ni mudasobwa, telefoni cyangwa urubuga mpuzanzira bicometse ku ihuzanzira.
Akantu ko kuri mwandikisho gakoreshwa mu gusiba inyuguti cyangwa ikimenyetso kiri iburyo bw’inyoboranyandiko.
Akantu karekare usanga ku murongo wa nyuma wa mwandikisho gakoreshwa mu gusiga akanya mu gihe umuntu ari kwinjiza amakuru muri mudasobwa.

definition_kin: Igikoresho cyohereza amakuru ya mudasobwa hagati y’igikoresho n’abakiriya.
Inkoranabuhanga cyangwa igikoresho gituma abantu bashobora gusoma amafishiye y’amajwi n’amashusho koranabuhanga bivuye ku
Igikoresho cya mudasobwa gifasha mu kubika no gusoma amakuru kuri disike.
Igikoresho gisoma disiki y'urumuri ikoresha urumuri rwa laser kugira ngo isome amakuru ari muri disiki uko izenguruka.
Igikoresho nyinjizamakuru gisoma amakuru y’amakarita atandukanye, nk’amakarita yo kwishyura, furashi, indangamu ntu, ndetse n’ibyoherejwe ku yindi mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho.
Igikoresho kibika amakuru y’ikoranabuhanga kuri kaseti hagamijwe kuyabungabunga no kuyashyingura.
Igikoresho kibika amakuru nyamibare kuri mudasobwa kikaba cyayagaragaza igihe cyose akenewe, kiboneka mu buryo bubiri: imbikamakuru ahoraho (HDD) cyangwa disiki (SSD).

Ibikorwa bitandukanye byerekeye porogaramu ya mudasobwa bishyirwa mu ngiro kesnshi kugeza igihe igerageza rigaragaje ko iyo porogaramu ibasha gukora.
Ibuto yo kuri mwandikisho ikoreshwa mu gusiba inyuguti cyangwa ikimenyetso kiri ibumoso bw’inyoboranyandiko.

definition_kin: Igisubizo nyabuhanga kandi giteguye neza ikigo gikoresha iyo gitewe kuri murandasi.

definition_kin: Indanganzira igaragara mu muyoboro ihuza imiyoboro myinshi yagaragaye.
Igikoresho gitandukanya imiraba yahurijwe hamwe ivuye ku muyoboro umwe igasohokera mu nzira nyinshi.
Ubushobozi bw’ikoranabuhanga bwo gukora, guteza imbere, gutanga, gukosora no gutanga inyemezabuguzi za serivisi z’ikoranabuhanga zahawe ukoresha mudasobwa.

Igikoresho koranabuhanga gikoreshwa mu guhindura amajwi mo amajwi y’amashanyarazi, kikaba gikora nk’icyo abaririmbyi bakoresha, ayo majwi y’amashanyarazi akerekera mu ikarita ntangamajwi aho ahindurwa mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga ku buryo asomwa na mudasobwa.

french_terms: Unité de service de données | unité de service numérique
definition_kin: Igikoresho cyo ku mpera y’umuyoboro w’itumanaho gihindura amakuru y’ikoranabuhanga avuye mu ikoranabuhanga ry’itumanaho rya hafi (LAN) kikayahindura ayo mu muyoboro mugari w’itumanaho (WAN) cyangwa se bikava mu itumanaho rusange biza mu itumanaho ryihariye.
Uburyo bwo gutanga inama bukoresha ubuhanga bw’ubwenge buhangano kugira ngo butange ibitekerezo ku bikubiye mu nyandiko, ibicuruzwa cyangwa ibikorwa bishingiye ku myitwarire yawe n'ibyo ukunda.
Igikoresho cy’ihuzanzira gitu ma ihuzanzira hagati yaryo rihererekanya amapaki y’amakuru.
Imikorere ya telefoni ishyira ku murongo w’itegereza kandi kikanakwirakwiza amahamagara aje hakurikijwe amateeko n’ibigenderwaho byose byagenwe mbere.

english_terms: Digital publishing | electronic publishing | online publishing
definition_kin: Ishyirwa hanze ku buryo bwa murandasi n’iterambere ry’amasoro n’intonde zo mu ikoranabuhanga, harimo gutangaza ibitabo, ibinyamakuru mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga.

french_terms: Accès multiple par répartition en code
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo gukoresha umuyoboro butuma abakoresha benshi bohereza amakuru icyarimwe ku muyoboro umwe w'itumanaho, ukoreshwa cyane muri sisitemu y'itumanaho ridafite insinga na telefoni zigendanwa. Intemberezi inteemberezi).
Intera iri hagati y’isunzu rimwe ry’umuraba wa radiyo n’irindi.

english_terms: Computer processor | Central processing unit (CPU) | Central processor | Main processor | Processing unit | System Unit
definition_kin: Inzira koranabuhanga rukomatanyo ikora imibare y’ibanze ituma mudasobwa ikora biciye mu gusesengura amakuru y’ibanze ayobora mudasobwa, ikaba iyakeneye kugira ngo ishobore gukora umurimo wayo.

Inshobozamudasobwa usanga imikorere n’icungwa ry’intunganyamakuru biri mu nzira mbumbe cyangwa mu tuyira mbumbe duke, igakora ibara, inyoborabikorwa n’ingenzuranzira biba bikenewe kugira ngo ikore nk’inshobozamudasobwa isanzwe.
Urwego ruhanitse mu gutunganya no gukora porogaramu, rwifashishwa mu kuzitondeka.

Uburyo inyandiko zikubiyemo uko amafaranga yinjira n’uko asohokamo bihurizwa hamwe muri sisitemu runaka ku buryo byorohera ababishinzwe gukomeza gukoresha izo nyandiko hatabayeho gusabana uburenganzira hagati yabo.
Umuntu ukoresha ikoranabuhanga na murandasi mu buryo buboneye, butekanye kandi bwubahiriza amahame n’amategeko.
Uburyo buzana itandukaniro hagati y’igishushanyo n’ikikibanziriza kubera ko iriho amakuru yahinduwe, bukaba ari uburyo bwo butsitse bwo kwegeranya amakuru.

Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhangacyongerera ijwi imbaraga, kikaba kigira uruhare runini muri sisitemu y'amajwi, sisitemu y'itumanaho, hamwe n’ibikoresho bitandukanye bya elegitoronike bisaba kongererwa amajwi.
Icyuma gitubura kikananoza imijyanamashusho ya televiziyo mbere y’uko yoherezwa mu muyoboro w’itumanaho.
Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga gikoreshwa mu kongera ingufu z’imiraba y’amashanyarazi cyangwa kuyihindurira icyerekezo.

headword_kin: Amplification de la lumière par émission stimulée de rayonnement
definition_kin: Igikoresho gisohora urumuri rw’imirasire yoroheje mu gukumira udushashi tw’urumuri. Intunganyamajwi (Intûungaanyamâjwi)

Ibice by’inkoranabuhanga bituma ikora kandi abakoresha iyo nkoranabuhanga bakaba badashobora kuyigeraho kuko iba ibitse kure, iryo banga riba rigizwe n’indimi nyinshi zitandukanye za gahunda ya mudasobwa.

definition_kin: Inkoranabuhanga ishobora guhanga, kubika no gucapa inyandiko, ituma uwandika ashobora guhindura inyandiko ye, kuyigaragaza uko ashaka no kuyicapa, hashobora no kwiyongeraho ibindi bikorwa.

french_terms: Circuit intégré | Schéma de circuit intégré | circuit imprimé | Semi-conducteur
definition_kin: Igikoresho koranabuhanga cya sirisiyumu usangamo utuntu duto gitoroniki twitwa taranzisitoro tuba turi muri iyo sirisiyumu n’udusinga tugiye duhuzwa ku buryo bugerekeranye ku kabaho ka sirisiyumu.
Igice koranabuhanga gifite uburyo bwo kwinjiza no gusohora ibintu bitandukanye hamwe n'ibisobanuro biboneza imikorere n'igihe by’icyo gice.

french_terms: Carte-réseau | Carte d'interface réseau | Contrôleur d'interface réseau | NIC
definition_kin: Igikoresho cyihariye gifatishwa ku njyanamakuru gihuza igikoresho ndangizahuzanzira cyangwa ikigega mpuzamakuru n’ihuzanzira rya hafi.

english_terms: Wireless card | Wireless network card | Wi-Fi card
french_terms: Carte sans fil | carte réseau sans fil | carte Wi-Fi
definition_kin: Igikoresho gituma imashini nka mudasobwa cyangwa telefoni igezweho zifata ihuzanzira nziramugozi.
Ubutumva bw’amajwi umuntu yifata kuri telefone iyo uwo ahamagaye atitabye.
Igikoresho cyakira imiraba iturutse ku nsakazamajwi kayihinduramo amajwi yumvikana, kikagezaho abantu ubutumwa mu magambo, umuziki,…
Insakazamajwi ikoranye na telefoni yifashisha imirongo ya radio bigendanye naho iherereye, ikabikora ku mirongo migari.

Umunara w'itumanaho utuma itumanaho rigenda neza, ukegeranya amajwi mu ihuzanzira nziramugozi rya hafi, kandi ukaba wanahuza ihuzanzira nyamugozi n’ihuzanzira nziramugozi, ukaba ugizwe n’inyoherezamajwi ikoresha ingufu nke n’intanganzira nziramugozi.
Icyuma gikora nka anteni gishobora kugendanwa gikoreshwa mu itumanaho ry’icyogajuru.
Ikigo cyangwa serivisi itanga ikoranabuhanga n’aho kubika inyandiko z’urubuga kugira ngo rubashe kugerwaho kuri murandasi.

Buto ziri ku gice cya ruguru cya mwandikisho kandi ziba zifite izindi nyuguti cyangwa ibimenyetso byanditse hejuru y'imibare ku buryo iyo ushaka kwandika izo nyuguti cyangwa ibimenyetso aho kwandika imibare, ukanda buto (SHIFT) ukagumishaho ubundi ugakanda buto y’umubare iriho icyo kimenyetso cyangwa inyuguti ushaka.
Itsinda rya buto cumi n'ebyiri usanga ku murongo wa mbere wo hejuru kuri mwandikisho.
Ikintu kiba gikubiyemo amakuru, nk’imyandiko cyangwa amashusho, igitabo, ipaji biri mu ikoranabuhanga.
Gahunda y’ikigo runaka ishyirwa ku rubuga ikajya isobanurira abashyitsi n’abakiriya imikoreshereze n’imbago ntarengwa ku mwirondoro w’umukiriya.
kopi iyo ari yo yose y'amakuru yacapwe, yanditswe cyangwa yafotowe, nk'ijambo, itangazo rya politiki cyangwa inyandiko igenewe abanyamakuru, abitabiriye inama cyangwa abandi.
Inyandiko, amajwi n’amashusho bikozwe, byoherejwe, byakiriwe cyangwa bibitswe hakoreshejwe uburyo koranabuhanga.

Amagambo asobanura imbamutima aherekeza amashusho ya filimi yakozwe, ahanini ashyirwa ahagana hasi ku kirahure kerekana amashusho mu kugira ngo atange amakuru, akore ihinduranyandiko y’indimi z’amahanga ndetse no mu rwego rwo korohereza abafite ubumuga bwo kutumva.
Amabwiriza ashyirwaho n’utanga
Inyandiko isobanura uburyo sisitemu y’ikoranabuhanga, inkoranabuhanga cyangwa gahunda ya mudasobwa ikoreshwa.
Porogaramu yanditse mu rurimi runaka hanyuma mudasobwa ikaza kuruhindura mu rurimi rwayo.

Igishushanyo cyangwa ikimenyetso gishushanyije gikoreshwa mu ikoranabuhanga ry’itumanaho rigezweho hagamijwe gukungahaza inyandiko, gikoreshwa mu kugaragaza amarangamutima agaragara mu maso, inshoza cyangwa igitekerezo.
Ikimenyetso gishushanyo gitanga ibisobanuro binyuze mu mashusho yacyo asa n’ibintu bifatika, kigakoreshwa mu kwandika ndetse no mu nzungano z’itumanaho.

Umubare umwe umwe wihariye mu rwungano rw’imibare ukava kuri rimwe ukagera ku 9, ariko mu buryo bw’inyabubiri ni 0 na 1, mudasobwa akaba ari imashini zikoresha gusa imibare kuko mu buryo zubatse, zimenya gusa agaciro k’inyabubiri bivuga 0 na 1, 0 bivuga ko umuriro uhita naho 1 bikavuga ko umuriro udahita.

synonym_kin: Biti (biîti); inyangingo nyabubiri (inyaangiingo nyabûbiri); umubare nyabubiri (umubarê nyabûbiri).
definition_kin: Akanyabumwe kanzigirinya mu ihunika ry’amakuru, gashobora gusa kugira agaciro ka 0 cyangwa 1, akaba ari ishingiro ry’inzungano izo arizo zose z’itumanaho n’imibare koranabuhanga, kakaba gashobora kubika gusa inyuguti imwe nk’amakuru.
Imikorere y’urwandikiro ihindura inyuguti yose ikanzwe mo inyuguti nkuru.
Imiterere ya dosiye igufasha gukanda no gushyira dosiye imwe cyangwa nyinshi mu bubiko bumwe.
Akantu gakandwa iyo umuntu ashaka gutangira undi murongo igihe uri kwandika kuri mudasobwa.
Inyemezabuguzi itangirwa kuri imeri cyangwa kuri murandasi.
Inyandiko zigaragaza igikorwa cy’ubwishyu zikoherezwa mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Inyandiko koranabuhanga itanzwe kugira ngo yerekane ko umukono koranabuhanga ushimangira ibiranga umuntu cyangwa ibindi byemeza ko umuntu afite imfunguzo zombi, urwihariye n’urwa rusange.

Igikoresho giha abashaka kujya kuri murandasi uburyo bwo kwinjira mu nkoranabuhanga, mu maserivisi, mu mbuga za mudasobwa ndetse no mu ruganiriro nyubakarurimi rw’inkoranabuhanga, umuntu atarinze gukoresha imfungurahuzanzira uko ashatse kwinjira.

english_terms: Network switch | Switching hub | Switch | bridging hub | MAC Bridge
french_terms: Commutateur réseau | commutateur | concentrateur de commutation | pont réseau | pont MAC
definition_kin: Igikoresho cy’ihuzanzira gihuza imashini mu ihuzanzira hakoreshejwe guhindura inzira kw’amapaki y’amakuru hagamijwe kubona, gutunganya no koherereza amakuru ibikoresho biyakira.
Igikoresho kigaragaza ibiri ku ndebero (amashusho, inyandiko,…) hakoreshejwe urumuri rwayo ku hantu hashashe h’umweru nko ku kibaho, igitambaro cyangwa urukuta.
Igikoresho kigenzura imiyego
Porogaramu ishyirwa mu gikoresho cya mudasobwa mu ibanga, ikaba igamije kwereka uwashyizemo porogaramu amakuru nyiri mudasobwa yakiriye ndetse n’uburyo ki akoresha murandasi.
Igikoresho cyangwa inkoranabuhanga bituma urwungano rwa mudasobwa rwakira rwitwara nk’aho ari urundi rwungano rwitwa umushyitsi.
Uburyo bwo kwerekana imiterere ya morekire mu ishusho yumvikana hakoreshejwe ikigero cyo kwigiraho kwa mudasobwa, nk’urujyano, ishusho cyangwa isura mpandeshatu (3 D).
Porogaramu y'amasomo ifasha kwiga uko ukoresha porogaramu runaka cyangwa uko wakora igikorwa runaka mu ikoranabuhanga binyuze mu ntambwe ku yindi.
Ugutanga imyigire ndetse n’amahugurwa binyujijwe kuri murandasi.

english_terms: Study of the limitations of computation
definition_kin: Igarukiro ry’ubushobozi bwa mudasobwa rirebwa ku buryo bw’ubugenge no mu mikorere rishingiye ku bunini, ingano n’ubwinshi bw’amakuru.
Umurongo ufasha kwimura ibyo ureba mu nyandiko cyangwa muri porogaramu hejuru no hasi ku ndebero ya mudasobwa.
Umurongo ufasha kwimura ibyo ureba mu nyandiko cyangwa muri porogaramu ibumoso n’iburyo kundebero ya mudasobwa.
Igikoresho gitanga amakuru n’imiraba yo kugenzura urwungano rusesengura amakuru, twavuga mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho ntangamakuru.

Igice cya mudasobwa gihuza uyikoresha na mudasobwa, kigatuma ayishyiramo amakuru, amategeko n’ibimenyetso byo gukoresha, kigahindura ibishobora gusomwa n’umuntu, amajwi n’amashusho mu rurimi rwa mudasobwa rwa 0 na 1.

Inkoranabuhanga yihariye ya mudasobwa ikora nk’umusemuzi hagati ya sisitemu mbonezamikorere (OS) bigatuma imenya ibice bitandukanye bigize mudasobwa harimo n’ibiyicometseho nka mucapyi, mwandikisho, imbeba n’ibindi.

Inkoranabuhanga ituma urwungano nkoresha rukorana n’ibikoresho bifatika byihariye kandi rukabigenzura, bityo bigatuma mudasobwa ikorana n’ibikoresho nk’incapanyandiko, inyandikiro n’ikarita y’ihuzanzira.
Inkoranabuhanga yihariye ya

Igikoresho nyinjizamakuru kigendanwa gituma umuntu agenzura imiyego cyangwa ibikorwa by’ikintu koranabuhanga ku irebero rya mudasobwa, kikaba n’urufatiro cyangwa mushyiguzi gishobora kubogamira mu ruhande runaka cyangwa gusunikwa mu byerekezo bitandukanye kugira ngo gikorane na mudasobwa cyangwa urukiniro.
Ibyangombwa kugira ngo amakuru akenewe ku makuru yumvikane, amakuru ashobore gukorerwa incamake, nko gushaka amakuru yayo, kureba aho yavuye, ireme ryayo, uko yubatse no kuba yabasha gusurwa.
Igikoresho cyangwa uruboho rw’amashanyarazi rwemera kwakira cyangwa kohereza imiraba ibiri igendeye rimwe.
Agakoresho gafasha mu kohereza amakuru kuri telefoni avuye kuri mudasobwa kabanje kuyahindura mu buryo telefoni ibasha kuyasoma.
Serivisi yo kohereza no kwakira ubutumwa bwa imeri ushobora gukoresha binyuze mu ishakiro rya murandasi, nta gahunda yihariye yo kohereza imeri isabwa.
Igikoresho gifasha mudasobwa guhamagara kuri telefoni.
Uburyo bwo kohereza amajwi y’ikoranabuhanga hifashishijwe insinga z’urumuri, bikoreshwa cyane mu bikoresho by’amajwi nk’insakazamajwi n’insakazamashusho.

Igikoresho cy’ihuzanzira cyakira ibimenyetso byatakaje ingufu kibyongerera imbaraga kikongera kikabyohereza kugira ngo bigere ahantu hanini mu ihuzanzira ngiramugozi (Ethernet) cyangwa nziramugozi (WI-FI), gikorera ku cyiciro ngaragaro cya mbere (Layer 1/couche 1) cy’urugero mbonera rwa OSI, kikabyara cyangwa kikongerera ingufu ibimenyetso, bigatuma amakuru agenda ahantu harehare atangiritse.

french_terms: Touche accélératrice | touche d'accélération | accélérateur de clavier accélérateur clavier
definition_kin: Inzira y’ubusamo y’urwandikiro iha abakiriya kugubwa neza no kugera ku mikoreshereze ya Windows biciye mu buryo bw’ibyiyumviro bwo guhamagara ibikorwa cyangwa amategeko asanzwe yoroshye hatarinze kuba ishakisha mu ruganiriro mpuza rw’inkoranabuhanga.
Ururenda rubonerana cyangwa ikirahure gishyirwa ku matara ngo hagabanywe ingufu z’urumuri.
Uruhurirane rw’amategeko rutuma haboneka amakuru
Urwego rwa porogaramu za murandasi ku ruhande rwa seriveri rwakozwe na Mikorosofuti rwemerera guhanga imbuga za murandasi zihindagurika, porogaramu za murandasi, na serivisi za murandasi.

synonym_kin: Ekuteri.
definition_kin: Aho inyuguti ya mbere y'igika cya mbere yagutse, ikajya mu mirongo myinshi y'inyandiko cyangwa interuro nke za mbere. Inyumvisho (inyûmviisho)
Igikoresho gikumira imfatashusho yo mu ntoki gutitira kikanayiha gutanga ishusho ikeye.
Gahunda cyangwa imikorere isuzuma amakuru ikayasesengura cyangwa ikayahanagura ku buryo butoranya hakurikijwe ibipimo byagenwe mbere.
Igikorwa cyo guhindura inzira zijyana imiraba zikajya zitwara amakuru.
Umuyoboro ujyana sinyare (signals) ku cyogajuru zivuye ku isi.
Igikoresho cya Mikorosofuti Ofisi (cyane cyane Wadi na Awutuluku) gituma indemo ibikwa ikazongera gukoreshwa (inyandiko, amafoto, imbata) hagamijwe kwihutisha ihangwa ry’inyandiko.
Uburenganzira umuntu ahabwa bwo gufungura mudasobwa agasoma cyangwa agakoresha amakuru arimo.

synonym_kin: Inzira ndangamakuru (inzira ndâangamâkurû); indangamakuru (indâangamâkurû); urwinjiriro (urwîinjiriro).
definition_kin: Inyandiko cyangwa igishushanyo gishyirwa mu nyandiko yo mu ikoranabuhanga ukandaho kikaba imbarutso yo gukora ikindi gikorwa cyangwa kubona indi nyandiko.
Ubwoko bw'uburyo bwo guhuza mudasobwa bukunze gukoreshwa mu guhuza ibikoresho nka mucapyi na sikaneri kuri mudasobwa.
Amategeko abiri cyangwa menshi ya sisitemu ahurije hamwe, bikaba ibiyigize bigufasha

english_terms: Embedded electronic circuit | computer chip | microchip | chip
french_terms: Circuit électronique embarqué | puce informatique | puce électronique | puce
definition_kin: Akantu gato kabwase gakoze mu bikoresho ntwaramashanyarazi gitoroniki karimo intwaramakuru gitoroniki.
Uburyo bukoreshwa mu gutumanaho amakuru, buhoro buhoro, hagati y'ibikoresho.
Imikorere ishyirwa mu bikorwa n’uburenganzira buhanitse muri Lunix na macOS (Macintosh) bungana n’ubw’umuyobozi Windows, bikamuha uburyo bwo gukora igikorwa rwungano icyo ari cyo cyose.
Amakuru ajyanye n’inzira y’itumanaho, igihe bitwara n’isaha ubutumwa bushyikiye biciye mu itumanaho gitoronike, agakoreshwa mu gutwara ibinyabiziga no kubikorera insababwishyu.
Urwunge rw’ibikorwa n’imikorere ya ngombwa mu ikorwa ry’igicuruzwa, hibandwa ku bikenewe mu ngeri no ku isoko, harebwa ibikorwa byose bya ngombwa mu ikorwa kandi gihuye n’itego z’ikigo.
Kwinjira byihuse byoroshya ubushakashatsi bw’ahabikwa amakuru hakoreshwa cyane, habariwemo amasomero koranabuhanga, inzira n’amadosiye asangiwe aheruka gukoreshwa.
Ibimenyetso bitandukanye igihe bihujwe bitanga igisubizo hatabayeho kwinjira ahashakirizwa ibikubiyemo.

Ibyiciro bitandukanye usura urubuga rwa murandasi agomba kunyuramo kugira ngo abe inzobere kuri murandasi; uko ibyiciro by’urubuga rwawe biba binoze niko bigenda biba bike n’uwusura azajya agera aho yifuza vuba.

english_terms: Wireless network | Wireless networking | wireless communication
french_terms: Réseau sans fil | communication sans fil
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga rya murandasi rikoresha amajwi ya radiyo kugira ngo rihuze za mudasobwa n’ibikoresho bindi by’itumanaho, bikorohereza mu kiguzi kuko bunguka ayo bari gutanga ku migozi n’ubukozi bw’itumanaho.

english_terms: Deep neural network | Multilayered neural network
french_terms: Réseau neuronal profond | réseau neuronal multicouches
definition_kin: Intambwe ya nyuma mu guhindagurika k’ubwenge bw’ubuhangano.
Umuntu ku giti cye cyangwa se ikigo bakora, bahugukiwe ibyo gukora no kunoza ibijyanye n’ihuzanzira.
Igikoresho cya mudasobwa gikoreshwa n’amashanyarazi gitanga ijwi ryo hejuru rikebura.

french_terms: Buzzer de carte mère | mini haut-parleur de boîtier intégré
definition_kin: Urusaku rw’indongozi bita « beep » ruranga mu miterere y’urwungano ahashobara kuba hari ikosa cyangwa ikindi kibazo.

headword_kin: Ipaki nyabuhanga nkora nkoranabuhanga kuri murandasi
pronunciation_kin: ipaki nyabûhaânga nkorâ nkôranabûhaânga kurî murâandasî
french_terms: Groupement pour programmation en ligne | POP-1
definition_kin: iIsinda ry’ibikoresho bya porogaramu, amasomero cyangwa amasomo biboneka kuri murandasi bifasha abanditsi ba porogaramu kwandika, gukoresha, kugerageza no gucunga porogaramu mu buryo bwo kuri murandasi.
Itsinda ry’amakuru ya bayiti ashobora kugendera hamwe mu buryo bw’ihuzanzira.
Urukomatane rw’ibyiciro n’inganiriro bishyirwa hamwe mu izina rya JAVA.

headword_kin: Ipaki ya porogaramu za Mikorosofuti Ofisi
definition_kin: Uruhererekane rw’ inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa zikoreshwa mu gusesengura inyandiko n’ihanga ry’imbonerahamwe nyamibare, imbikamakuru n’ibindi bikoresho byinshi.

french_terms: Panne informatique | panne du matériel informatique
definition_kin: Kuba mudasobwa ikora nabi cyangwa hari icyuma cy’imbere cyangwa inyuma ya mudasobwa kidakora, bigatuma itaka cyangwa bidatuma umuntu agera ku makuru akeneye.

Aho ifatishanzira rigenda rihuza ibikoresho by’ihuzanzira, bene aho hantu ni nk’uko twavuga nk’intanganzira, insohoranyandiko n’impinduranzira ku buryo bishobora kubona amakuru kandi bikanayohereza uvuye ku mpera imwe ukagera ku yindi.
Uburyo bwo guhisha amakuru mu yandi makuru, urugero nko guhisha ubutumwa mu ishusho.
Hakoreshwa urugero rw’isesengura ry’imihagararire y’umuntu mu ifotorwa kugira ngo ahantu hangombwa kuri buri rubibi hagaragare.
Gukoresha ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo byorohereze kwigisha uhuza abarimu n'abiga mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga.
Igikorwa cyo gutuma abantu bamenya urubuga rwawe rw’ubucuruzi biciye ku zindi mbuga zigenewe gushakishirizwaho kandi zisurwa n’abantu benshi bashaka amakuru cyangwa ibintu byo kugura.
Inyandiko igaragaza uko abantu basura urubuga runaka kuri murandasi, igihe bamaraho n’ibyo bashakisha.
Ahantu umufatabuguzi ashobora gufatira inzira imuhuza n'umuyoboro rusange, ni aho umuntuarebera agakoresha za buto, indebero n’imbariro z’ibikorwa.
Mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga, ni icyumba gisukuye cyane kandi gikoreshwa mu gukora ibikoresho bishobora kwanduzwa n’ibyanduzwa.

Urukomatane rw’amategeko ashyirwaho akarema imyitwarire y’urwungano ku buryo buriho nyakuri atari ishusho agakora imigaragarire y’urwungano nyakuri, ikigezweho kigenda gihindagurwa kugira ngo hamenyekane ingaruka zabyo ku myitwarire y’urwungano.
Imiyoboro y’ubwenge buhangano igufasha gukorana n'ikoranabuhanga ry’ubwenge buhangano kugira ngo ukore cyangwa ugere ku nshingano.

english_terms: Application Program Interface (API) | Application Programming Interface
definition_kin: Urutonde rw'amabwiriza, imikorere, na porotocole abakora porogaramu bashobora gukoresha mu gukora porogaramu za sisitemu runaka y'imikorere.

english_terms: Common gateway interface (CGI) | Common Gateway protocol
french_terms: Interface de passerelle commune | protocole de passerelle commune
definition_kin: Igipimo kigena imbaraga z’urubuga rwo kuri murandasi zo gushakisha gahunda za mudasobwa cyangwa inyandiko zibitswe kuri mudasobwa nini.

english_terms: Mobile payment | mobile money | mobile money transfer | mobile wallet
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo kohereza, kwemeza ubwishyu cyangwa kwishyura amafaranga ku mucuruzi n’undi ufite serivisi runaka atanga, ibyo byose bigakorwa hifashishijwe telefoni ngendanwa.
Ukurinda amakuru akomeye akarindwa gutakara no kwangirika.

Uburyo bwo kugenzura ko inyandiko koranabuhanga cyangwa umukono koranabuhanga ari iby’umuntu runaka; cyangwa kuvumbura ikosa cyangwa icyononekaye mu itumanaho, ibigize cyangwa ibibitswe mu nyandiko koranabuhanga guhera igihe runaka, bigasaba gukoresha ibimenyetso cyangwa inyandiko y’ibanga bigaragaza amagambo, imibare, ibisubizo byabonetse cyangwa uburyo buzwi cyangwa n’ibindi birebana no kurinda umwimerere w’inyandiko.
Ikoreshwa ry’uburyo bw’ubuyobozi, bwa tekiniki, n’ubw’ubugenge bihwitse kugira ngo twirinde itangazwa, ihindurwa, n’iyangizwa

Ikoreshwa ry’uburyo bw’ubuyobozi, bwa tekiniki, n’ubw’ubugenge bihwitse kugira ngo twirinde itangazwa, ihindurwa, n’iyangizwa ry’amakuru ryaba rigambiriwe cyangwa bibaye ku bw’impanuka kandi nta burenganzira.

french_terms: Protection contre la pourriture des bits
definition_kin: Iyo hari imyanya nkoranabuhanga yangiritse izakosorwa mu gihe cy’itunganywa ry’isomwa ry’imbikamakuru ahoraho cyangwa mu gihe cy’itunganywa ry’urwungano rw’amafishiye igihe cyose abantu bafite disiki ebyiri cyangwa zirenze muri rusange.
Uburyo bwo gushyira ku murongo ubwiyongere bw’amajwi no kuyashyira ku bipimo bitandukanye kugira ngo urwunge rwayo runogere amatwi bitewe n’uko yifuzwa kumvwa.
Iringaniza ry’amabara rihindura ibara rusange rivanze mu mashusho kandi rikoreshwa mu gukosora amabara.
Tekiniki ikoreshwa mu nzungano koranabuhanga mu kugenzura umuvuduko ubusabe bwoherezwamo cyangwa bukorwamo hagamijwe kugumishaho umutuzo n’umutekano w’urwungano.
Igikoresho gishyirwamo porogaramu ikagiha ubushobozi bwo gukora ikimwe cyose umuntu nawe ashoboye gukora.
Igikoresho mbaragihe cyifashisha ibuye ry’isarabwayi
Inzira yo gukwirakwiza, kwaguka, gukwirakwizwa cyangwa gukwira hose.

Umuraba ugiye umujyo umwe ushingiye ku ikoranabuhanga aho ubarwa ko ushobora kuba uhari (1), urugero nta kugonga umusozi cyangwa ntawo (0) tuvuge wagonze umusozi ukazimira, mu ikoranabuhanga 1 bivuga ko bimeze neza naho 0 bikavuga ko nta gihari.
Umuraba ugenda uhindagurika, ugabanura ingufu uko ugenda cyangwa ukagenda wongera ubukana.

Iyoherezwa cyangwa ihererekanywa ry’amajwi cyangwa amashusho hakoreshejwe uburyo bw’inyakiramajwi cyangwa inyakiramajwi n’amashusho bwabugenewe, rishobora gukoresha umurongo wa radiyo, urusinga, icyogajuru cyangwa se ubu buryo bwose buhurijwe hamwe.
Uburyo isakazamakuru ryohereza amakuru icyarimwe kuri radiyo na televiziyo.
Ahantu runaka handikwamo ibyerekeranye n’ubuhinzi bugezweho.
Urusaku ruterwa n’ikibazo kuri muhuherezi cyangwa ku mbikamakuru zihoraho ariko hari n’ubwo biterwa na gahunda runaka ifite ikibazo.
Gutuma umutungo w’amakuru ushobora kugerwaho ku bantu benshi, gukoreshwa n’inkoranabuhanga cyangwa imiryango kandi hizewe ubudakemwa n’umutekano w’amakuru.
Kuba umuntu asura urubuga akarusangiza abandi, bigatuma rumenyekana, rukagerwaho n’abantu benshi.

english_terms: SharePoint | Share Information | shared resource | network share
definition_kin: Urubuga rw’amakuru y’ikigo rwakozwe na Mikorosofuti rushobora gushyirwa muri mudasobwa rugateza imbere imikorere y’ikigo rworoshya icungwa ry’amakuru, rugacunga imbuga zihariye n’iziri rusange ndetse na murandasi.

english_terms: Share | Share Information | shared resource | network share
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo gusangiza abantu amafishiye n’amadosiye kuri mudasobwa icometse kuri murandasi.
Aho abantu bashobora kugera ku muyoboro w’itumanaho bakoresheje wifi na rawuta ihujwe n’abatanga serivisi z’itumanaho.
Igice gito cy’uburyo amajwi atunganywa kireba uburyo bwo gukoresha amajwi mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo gukoresha mudasobwa mu gusesengura no gusobanura amakuru kugira ngo havemo ibisubizo bifite umumaro.
Ingeri y’ikoranabuhanga ikoresha tekiniki y’icukumburamakuru cyangwa ubundi buryo hagamijwe kugenza cyangwa gutahura no kubungabunga gihamya zikoreshwa mu butabera zivuye mu gikoresho koranabuhanga.

Ishami ry’ubugenzabimenyetso koranabuhanga bwita ku kugarura gihamya cyangwa amakuru bikoreshwa mu butabera, bivanywe muri telefoni (mudasobwa nto, mudasobwa ngendanwa, ibikoresho biri kuri murandasi, ibikoresho ngendanwa) mu buryo ngaragazabimenyetso by’amajwi bwemewe mu butabera.

french_terms: Analyse criminalistique des réseaux | analyse médico-légale des réseaux
definition_kin: Agashami k’ubugenzabimenyetso koranabuhanga kibanda ku kugenza no gusesengura imiyoboro ya mudasobwa kugira ngo hegeranywe amakuru n’ibimenyetso nkenerwa mu butabera cyangwa itahura ry’igitero kuri murandasi.

french_terms: Analyse criminalistique des bases de données
definition_kin: Akazi ko kwegeranya no gusesengura ibimenyetso koranabuhanga bivuye mu mbikamakuru, habariwemo amakuru abonejwe n’atabonejwe.
Igikorwa cyo kwegeranya gihamya uhereye ku rwungano koranabuhanga ruriho rukora bidasabye ko uruhagarika cyangwa ngo ugire icyo uhindura ku mimerere yarwo.

french_terms: Criminalistique par intelligence artificielle | intelligence artificielle et criminalistique
definition_kin: Imikoreshereze y’ubwenge buhangano n’ubuhanga bwo kwigiraho bwa mudasobwa bikoreshwa mu isesengura no gutoranya amakuru uyavana muri za gihamya koranabuhanga mu rwego rwo gushakisha ibimenyetso by’ibyaha mu ikoranabuhanga.

french_terms: Analyse criminalistique des systèmes de fichiers
definition_kin: Uburyo bw’isesengura ry’imiterere, indemo n’inyobozi y’amakuru by’urwungano rw’amafishiye hagamijwe gutahura amafishiye yahanaguwe, ayahishwe n’ayangiza.

french_terms: Analyse des données médico-légales | analyse criminalistique des données
definition_kin: Isuzuma ry’amakuru yo mu ikoranabuhanga hashakishwamo ibimenyetso by’ibyaha byakorewe kuri murandasi cyangwa ku buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga, haba harakoreshejwe telefoni, mudasobwa, mugabuzi n’ibindi bikoresho mbikamakuru kandi hagakurikiranwa ndetse hakanasesengurwa amakuru anyura mu ihuzanzira.

Uburyo mudasobwa zikoresha mu gukora imirimo isubiramo amakuru kandi minini buri gihe, bikubiyemo gukusanya amakuru, kuyatunganya mu byiciro, no kubika ibisubizo, aho kuyatunganya buri gice cy'amakuru ukwacyo mu gihe nyacyo.

french_terms: Analyse du système des fichiers | analyse du système
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo gusesengura imiterere n’indemo by’urwungano rw’amafishiye hagamijwe gutahura amafishiye yahanaguwe, yahishwe cyangwa yangiza.
Ifatwa ry’amakuru ngirakamaro aturutse ku mashusho cyane cyane biturutse ku mashusho koranabuhanga hifashishijwe tekiniki y’isesengurwa ry’amafoto koranabuhanga.

english_terms: Search toolbar | search bar | search box
definition_kin: Aho wandika amagambo aranga icyo ushaka kugira ngo murandasi ibishakishe, akaba ari igikoresho kiguha ubushobozi bwo kwandika muri mudasobwa amagambo y’ingenzi cyangwa imvugo biguha gushakisha amakuru yihariye ku rubuga rwa murandasi, inkoranabuhanga cyangwa inshakishamakuru.
Igikorwa cyo gushaka cyangwa gukura amakuru kuri mudasobwa, umuyoboro cyangwa isoko yo kuri murandasi.
Imbonezamikorere gitoroniki itanga ikarita mu buryo bufatika ahabarizwa ikintu muri ako kanya n’amategeko akurikizwa rimwe ku rindi kugira ngo umuntu agere ahifuzwa hasabwe.
Uburyo bwo kubona amakuru ku bantu uri imuhira hanyuma ukayohereza ku kazi wifashishije ikoranabuhanga.
Ikoranabuhanga rikoresha ubwenge buhangano mu gutuma abahaha bakora ubushakashatsi kuri murandasi bakoresheje ubwoko ubwo ari bwo bwose bw’ishusho aho gukoresha inyandiko cyangwa ijambo ry’ingenzi.
Ishusho igaragaza ikintu cyafashwe n’ingaragazafoto isanzwe cyangwa koranabuhanga.
Urumuri ngaragazamashusho mpandeshatu rushobora kubonwa hadakoreshejwe ibikoresho byihariye nka kamera cyangwa amadarubindi.
Ishusho iyo ari yo yose idatundanyije kandi idatsitse, iba itari yahinduka kuva ifotowe ariko ntifatwa nk’ifoto ahubwo ni negatifu koranabuhanga itarakorwaho n’inkoranabuhanga ngo iyitunganye.

Ingano y’ishusho aho buri ngirangingo cyangwa agasoro foto gahagarirwa n’umwanya nkoranabuhanga umwe, bigatuma amakuru abikwa ku buryo buhanitse kandi hakaba n’isesengura ryihuse kurushaho ry’imikorere nyabubiri mu nkoranabuhanga ngaragazashusho za mudasobwa.

Uburyo bukoreshwa n’inkoranabuhanga za Mikorosofuti Ofisi (Wadi, Pawa Powenti, Egiseri na Awuturuku) bugatuma abakoresha mudasobwa bahanga, bagaha umwihariko ibyo bakora, bakabishyira mu bishushanyo cyangwa bakabiha amashusho akurura abantu kugira ngo abantu bahererekanye amakuru ku buryo bunoze aho gukoresha inyandiko isanzwe ku buryo bwihuse kandi bworoshye.
Sisitemu ya mudasobwa isesengura kandi ikagaragaza amakuru yerekeye imiterere y'isi mu buryo bw’amakarita.
Igishushanyo ngaragazamakuru gitanga amakuru koranabuhanga mu buryo busesenguye.
ishusho igaragaza umukoresha, imiterere ye cyangwa ubumuntu bwe.

english_terms: Startup screen | Start screen | boot-up screen
definition_kin: Inyandiko cyangwa amashusho agaragara igihe porogaramu runaka iri gukoreshwa.

Uburyo bwo kugaragaza ishusho cyangwa ifoto ngari mu gace gato hagamijwe kwerekana mu buryo bwihuse ibikubiyemo, akaba ari agashushanyo gato k’ipaji cyangwa agashusho gatuma umuntu amenya ifishi bishingiye ku ndemo.

Uburyo bwikoresha bwo gutunganya amakuru bwite butuma hifashishwa amakuru bwite mu gusuzuma imiterere imwe n’imwe iranga umuntu, by’umwihariko mu gusesengura no guteganya imiterere iranga imikorere y’uwo muntu mu kazi, uko ahagaze mu rwego rw’ubukungu, ubuzima bwe, ibyo akunda kurusha ibindi, inyungu ze, uburyo yizerwa, imyitwarire ye, aho aherereye cyangwa ingendo akora.

Ishusho koranabuhanga (ifoto cyangwa igishushanyo) ikoreshwa mu gutaka indiba y’indebero ya mudasobwa cyangwa ya terefoni igezweho cyangwa y’uruganiriro rw’igikoresho koranabuhanga, iba iri inyuma y’amashusho ndanga n’amadirishya yo kuri mudasobwa bigatuma uyikoresha ashobora gutaka uko abyifuza aho umuntu aserukira ageze ku ndebero.
Isura y’ikintu kibitse kuri mugabuzi koranabuhanga kandi gishobora gusurwa kikagaragazwa kuri murandasi.

english_terms: Computer terminal | Data terminal | Dumb terminal | Terminal
french_terms: Terminal informatique | terminal de données | terminal
definition_kin: Igikoresho koranabuhanga, akenshi kiba ari indebero cyangwa mwandikisho, gifasha mu kwinjiza amakuru no kwakira ibisubizo bivuye mu rwungano koranabuhanga remezo ruri kure (mudasobwa remezo cyangwa mugabuzi), kikaba ari
Kwinjiza porogaramu ikoresha mudasobwa, isimbura izindi porogaramu zose ziri kuri mudasobwa isanzwe.

synonym_kin: Isi baringa ((isî bariînga); ihuzanzira ry’amasi shusho (ihuuzanzira ry’âmasî shusho).
definition_kin: Ahantu hadafatika rusange ngandi hasangiwe havuka mu ihuriza hamwe rituruka hagati ukuri gufatika kunganiwe n’ukuri kudafatika, n’ibidukikije nyamibare bihora bigaruka, bituma umuntu acubira mu isi mpande eshatu aho abantu bashobora gukorana, kugirana ibiganiro, gukorera hamwe, gukina no guhanga hifashishijwe amashusho nsimbura nyamibare, akenshi hakoreshejwe uburyo bw’ukuri shusho (RV) cyangwa bw’ukuri kwisumbuye (RA).
Uburyo bwo gusimbuza amakuru y’ibanga ibimenyetso ndangamakuru byihariye bibika ibisobanuro by’ingenzi byerekeye amakuru bitabangamiye umutekano wayo.

Isobanukirwa neza rituruka ku isesengurwa ry’amakuru ryerekana ingero ngenderwaho, ibyerekezo n’amasano ashobora gukoreshwa mu gufata ibyemezo binyuze birenga cyane cyane amakuru adasesenguye hakavumburwa ubumenyi buhanitse ku miterere y’ikintu cyangwa imyitwarire y’ugikoresha, bikaba ari igihe umuntu avumbuye ikintu gikomeye biturutse ku guhuza ingingo zo mu makuru.
Inzira yo guhindura amazina mo indanga mbonezanzira kugira ngo hatume haba iyumvikana rya zamudasobwa bikorohereza abakoresha mudasobwa kubona ihuzanzira yihariwe cyangwa ya murandasi.
Uburyo bwohereza icyarimwe imiraba myinshi cyangwa amakuru menshi mu ihuzanzira tumanaho ku buryo bw’umuraba umwe w’urusobe.
Porogaramu yo gutunganya inyandiko za mudasobwa mu buryo urupapuro rumenyerewe rw’inyandiko rusohorwa mu mazina atandukanye.
Ugucuruza no guhererekanya ibicuruzwa bishya, serivisi, n’uburenganzira bw’ubwenge bijyanye n’iterambere ry’ikoranabuhanga.
Isoko ryifashisha ikoranabuhanga mu guhuza abaguzi n’abagurisha imigabane.
Isoko ryo kuri murandasi ryemerera abaguzi kugura no gukuramo ibintu bitandukanye.
Ihuriro ry'inyandiko, fayilo zishobora kongera gukoreshwa ndetse n'amakuru abitse muri mudasobwa akaba ashobora gukoreshwa umunsi ku munsi.
Isomero rifite ibitabo n’inyandiko biboneka hifashishijwe murandasi.
isosiyete mpuzamahanga yo muri Amerika itanga serivise zo kubara ibicu, imikino yo kuri videwo, ibyuma bya mudasobwa
Itegeko rikoreshwa mu gushyiramo agace k'umurongo mu nyandiko cyangwa kuko rimwe na rimwe iyo ukanze urufunguzo rwa "Enter" kuri mwandikisho yawe, uba ukoze agace k'umurongo.

Amafaranga akoreshwa muri politiki, ibikoresho, n’ibikorwa bigamije kugarura cyangwa gukomeza ibikorwa remezo by’ikoranabuhanga, inkoranabuhanga, n’inzungano shingiro nyuma yuko habaye icyiza gisanzwe cyangwa cyatewe n’umuntu.
Ubuhanga busesengura bwo kuvuga uburyo ikigo kizavumbura igitero cyo kuri murandasi, kikagisubiza kikanagarura amakuru yariyagabweho igitero cyangwa kigatsinda ibindi byahubanganyije amakuru.
Ikimenyetso shusho shingiro cyerekana isura y’umuntu umwenyura, wishimye, ugaragaza urukundo n’urugwiro.
Ingaragaro y’igihangano gishobora gukorwa nk’inkoranabuhanga kuri mudasobwa.
Igikorwa cyo gufungura ingingo

english_terms: Review | product review | customer review | user review
definition_kin: Igaragazwa ry’uko ukoresha mudasobwa abibona, agatanga igitekerezo cye.
Ubwoko bwo kuvura aho umuganga asuzumira akanavurira umurwayi we batari kumwe, ibyo bigakorerwa kuri telefoni.

Uburyo bwibanda ku gusuzuma ibikoresho bifatika (hardware) cyangwa inkoranabuhanga (software) cyangwa se byombi icyarimwe, hakabanziriza ku gusuzuma ibibazo rusange bishoboka mbere, hanyuma hakagenda hagaragazwa ibibazo bidasanzwe, hatangwa inzira ifatika yo gukemura ibyo bibazo kandi hashobora gukoreshwa ku bwoko bwinshi bw’ibikoresho koranabuhanga.

french_terms: Programme de diagnostic | mode de test
definition_kin: Agace k’igenamikorere nyamwikoresha kerekana imiterere y’imikorere y’inkororanabuhanga cyangwa y’igikoresho cyangwa se ry’urukomatane mu gikoresho, urwungano cyangwa ihuzanzira ry’inzungano.
Ubwoko bwihariye bw’amakuru akoreshwa mu ishakishamakuru n’isuzuma ry’ibibazo by’urwungano koranabuhanga, ubushobozi bw’ihererekanyamakuru, amakosa cyangwa ibyagezweho bikosheje.
Uburyo bwo gukoresha inkoranabuhanga n’ibikoresho kabuhariwe mu isuzuma ry‘ubushobozi n’imimerere y’inzungano zitandukanye z’imodoka.
Inzira ituma umuntu atahura ko hari icyakozwe mu nkoranabuhanga ya SAP, ikibaye, uko ibyabaye byakozwe muri porogaramu ya SAP.
Uburyo bwo kubona ibintu bituma umukozi w’ubwenge buhangano ashobora kugira icyo akora ku mpinduka mu isi nyayo, akamenya ibidukikije bihindagurika, kandi agakemura neza imirimo igoye.

french_terms: Reconnaissance de l'écriture manuscrite | reconnaissance de texte manuscrit
definition_kin: Ubushobozi bwa mudasobwa bwo kwakira no gusoma amakuru yandikishije intoki yumvikana aturutse mu nyandiko ku mpapuro, ku mafoto, kuri mwandikisho ikorwaho no ku bindi bikoresho.
Tekiniki y’ibona rya mudasobwa ituma hatahurwa ibintu mu mashusho asanzwe cyangwa mu mashusho ayega, bishingiye ku gushyira mu matsinda
Igikorwa cyo kubona kwa mudasobwa kigamije gutahura aho umuntu cyangwa ikintu biri n’aho bireba.
Ubushobozi bw’igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga nka mudasobwa, bwo kumva no kumenya icyo ijwi ryumvikanye rimenyesha bityo kigatanga igisubizo gikwiriye.
Uburyo bwo kuvumbura ubutumwa burimo amakosa ashingiye ku kongera ingano y’amakuru yisubiramo bigafasha mu kubona amakosa ashobora guhindura indemo yari yoherejwe mu gihe cy’itumanaho.
Uburyo bwo kumenya cyangwa kwemeza ibiranga umuntu hifashishijwe ishusho yo mu maso he, haba hagamije ku mumenya ku buryo nyabwo, ku mafoto cyangwa mu mashusho.

Igikorwa cy’igenzura ry’ibiba mu rwungano koranabuhanga cyangwa mu ihuzanzira koranabuhanga no kubikorera isesengura kugira ngo hatahurwe ibibazo bishobora kuvuka, ari byo kuvogera cyangwa bigaragara ko henda kuvogerwa kw’amabwiriza y’umutekano mu ikoranabuhanga, amabwiriza y’imikorere ishoboka cyangwa imikorere ngenderwaho ijyanye n’umutekano.
Igihe udupaki tumwe na tumwe tw’amakuru twoherejwe mu muyoboro w’itumanaho tutagera aho twagombaga kugera, bikaba bikunze guterwa no kuzura k’umuyoboro, ikibazo
Uburyo bugezweho butambutsa amakuru mu buryo burombereje kandi ari amajwi yonyine.
Imikorere ya televiziyo igenda ku kigero kiri hasi birenze ibimenyerewe.
Icyerekezo cy’imyumvire ihindagurika mu mibare y’amahugurwa.
Itandukaniro riri hagati y’abafite amahirwe yo gukoresha ikoranabuhanga n’abatayafite.
Inzira zo guhitamo inzira mu miyoboro iyo ari yo yose.

Imikorere yo koherereza abareba indemo ry’amashusho n’amajwi ku buryo bw’ako kanya cyangwa bwenda kuba nyakuri, bigakoreshwa mu biganiro byo kuri televiziyo, mu gutangaza imikino kuri televiziyo, amashusho yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga no gutangaza imikino nyamashusho.
Urwego rw’ikoranabuhanga rukoresha ibikoresho bya mudasobwa n’imiyoboro mu gukusanya, gutunganya, kubika, kohereza, no gucunga amakuru.
Iyoherezwa cyangwa ihererekanywa ry’amajwi cyangwa amashusho hakoreshejwe uburyo bw’inyakiramajwi cyangwa inyakiramajwi n’amashusho bwabugenewe.
Uburyo bwo gusoma amakuru abitse ku gikoresho runaka mu buryo burombereje hatabayeho kwifashisha intima.

Itangazwa ry’indemo tangazamakuru hakoreshejwe imiraba aho gukoresha itangazamakuru gakondo hakoreshejwe amajwi ya telefoni, bigatanga ijwi n’ishusho byiza ku buryo bwisumbuyeho, hakaba n’amakuru yinyongera bitanga imirebere ya televiziyo myiza, hakoreshejwe uburyo bw’icyogajuru.
Urwungano nyakiramashusho ya televiziyo aho imiraba iva mu bikoresho biri kure yakirwa n’anteni remezo ikohererezwa inyakiramashusho fatabuguzi bishyura binyuze mu nsinga.
Uburyo butuma hatangazwa gahunda za televiziyo mu rugo hashingiwe ku iyoherezwa ry’amakuru hakoreshejwe icyogajuru cy’itangazamakuru kiri mu kirere.
Itangazamajwi rimwe na rimwe riherekejwe n’inyobozi y’amakuru mperekezamajwi, hakoreshejwe amajwi ya radiyo yoherezwa ku nyakiramajwi z’abantu ku giti cyabo.
Isakazamakuru rikoresha imbuga zo kuri murandasi.
Uburyo bw’itangazamakuru bwa radiyo aho umuraba wa televiziyo woherezwa ku buryo bw’amajwi biturutse ku nsakazamashusho yo ku isi yoherereza inyakiramashusho ya televiziyo ifite anteni.

Itangazamashusho (itaangaazamashusho
definition_kin: Uburyo bw’ikwirakwizamakuru burimo buri nkuru umuntu abona biciye ku rubuga rwa murandasi, harimo imbuga nkoranyambaga, buri cyanditswe gishobora gutangazwa nk’inkuru, bityo ba nyiri ibinyamakuru mu ikoranabuhanga bagombye kugenzura ibyinjira mu mbuga zabo. Itangazamashusho (itaangaazamashusho).
Isakazwa ry’amafishiye nyamajwi kuri murandasi hakoreshejwe uburyo bucunga inyandiko nshya zije.

Ukwigiraho kwa mudasobwa hagamijwe gutahura ibyerekezo mu byabaye mu bihe byashize kugira ngo hagenwe ikekwa ry’ibizaba mu gihe kizaza, bigakoreshwa mu kohereza amakuru mu ihuzanzira hagabanywa amapaki y’amakuru yatakara kandi bikagabanya igihe amakuru yamara mu nzira.
Ibwiriza ryihariye rihabwa
Umwanya uri hagati igihe imiyoboro y’itumanaho igerageza guca mu nzira, bikagaragazwa n’ishyirwamo ry’amakuru rigenda gahoro, gusubiza bitinze mu mikino cyangwa kuzambagatana kw’amashusho.
Umwanya ntegerezamakuru, igihe mudasobwa iba iri gushaka amakuru mu bubiko bwayo yerekeye icyo isabwe muri ako kanya.

Amakuru nyobozi akorwa ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho koranabuhanga, akagaragazainkomoko y’itumanaho rikozwe, aho ryerekera, inzira riciye, isaha ribereyeho, igihe rimaze n’ingano yaryo hatabariwemo indemo y’ubutumwa nyirizina, akaba akubiyemo.

english_terms: Moving graphics animation | Motion graphics animation
definition_kin: Igishushanyo mbonera gifite amashusho agenda bikoreshwa mu gutanga amakuru cyangwa kubara inkuru mu buryo bw'amashusho.

Uburyo bw’igenamiterere, igena ry’ibiranga, igenamikorere, igenagahunda, igerageza, ikosora ry’amakosa yabaye mu ihanga n’ihindura ry’inzungano ntangamakuru n’inkoranabuhanga hamwe n’ibikorwa by’icunga bikenerwa muri iryo korwa.
Ukuvuga gukoresha ikoranabuhanga mu guteza imbere imibereho y’abantu, serivisi, uburezi, ubuzima n’ubukungu.

synonym_kin: Ibonakintu (ibonakiintu); itahura ry’ikintu (itaahuura ry’îkiintu).
definition_kin: Tekiniki ikoresha ihuzanzira rimeze nk’iry’ubwonko mu itondeka ry’amashusho, rituma umuntu atahura ibyiciro nyamyumvire nk’abantu, inyubako, ibinyabiziga ku mashusho ndetse no ku mashusho ayega koranabuhanga, bigakoreshwa mu bumenyi buhanitse nk’iyigamashusho rya kiganga, iyega ry’imodoka zigenza, ikaba ishingiye ku itahura ry’aho ikintu giherereye ku mashusho koranabuhanga.
Igikorwa cyo gutondeka amashusho mu byiciro bitandukanye hifashishijwe urugero rutashyizwe mu buryo busesuye ku makuru agendeye ku ngero zahawe indango zo muri ibyo byiciro byihariye.

english_terms: Few-Shot Classification | Few- Shot Image Classification | Few-shot learning
definition_kin: Igikorwa cya mudasobwa cyo kubona gishingiye ku gutoza mudasobwa kumenya ingero mbonera zigiweho zo gushyira amashusho mu byiciro byagenwe mbere hakoreshejwe ingero nke zahawe indango kuri buri cyiciro.

english_terms: Coarse-grained classification (CG) | Coarse-grained model | Coarse-grained system | Coarse-grained description
french_terms: Classification à gros grains | modèle à gros grain
definition_kin: Isesengura rito ry’inyiganamiterere nyamorekire ritanga uburyo bwiza bw’isobanura n’uburyo bw’igerageza ritanga umusaruro ry’amatsinda mato, usanga ibiyagize bitajishwe cyane kandi bishobora gukorana bihagije mu gusobanura imikorere ifatika itanga inyungu.
Ishyirwa mu matsinda kw’ibintu buri kintu gifite itsinda ry’ibikiranga hashingiwe ko bishushe kimwe cyangwa bidahuza isura, buri kintu gifite itsinda ryacyo.
Imbonezamibare yifashishwa mu gufasha mudasobwa kwigiraho,
Itonde ry’inyuguti n’ibimenyetso byifashishwa n’abakora imbuga zitandukanye zerekana ibyo bakoze byose n’aho biherereye.
Uburyo bwo kwerekana imvugo yumvikana ukoresheje ibimenyetso n’ibihindura aho gukoresha imvugo karemano, nk’Ikinyarwanda, kugira ngo ukureho ibidasobanutse neza.
Uruhurirane rw’amakuru agiye afite aho ahuriye akenshi atondetse mu buryo mbonera.
Inkoranabuhanga izana na mudasobwa iba yashyizwemo mbere y’igurishwa iba irimo ipaki y’amayinite ashobora guhita akoreshwa mudasobwa ikigurwa bikayitera kugira ubushobozi nkoranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya inyandiko butuma inyuguti ziba nini kandi zijimye kugira ngo zigaragare cyane.
Ukongera cyangwa kugabanya ingano y’ibyo umuntu areba ku ngagarazamashusho.
Agace ku bumenyi muri siyansi na tekinoloji kigisha gukora, gutunganya, kongera no gutubura ibinyabutabire bya ‘atome na molekile’ bikaba byakwifashishwa mu gukora ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa.
Ishami ry’ikoranabuhanga rigezweho ryibanda ku itangamakuru hifashishijwe amajwi ya telefoni n’ibindi bikora nka yo.

Uburyo bwose bujyanye n’isakaza, iyohereza cyangwa iyakira ry’amakuru hakoreshejwe umuyoboro w’itumanaho, inyandiko, amashusho, amajwi, amakuru ashyinguwe ku buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga n’andi makuru yose atanzwe uko yakabaye cyangwa igice cyayo hakoreshejwe insinga, radiyo n’ubundi buryo bunyuranye bukoreshwa mu itumanaho koranabuhanga.

synonym_kin: Ihuzamudasobwa (ihûuzamûdasobwâ); isangiramugozi (isâangiramûgozî).
definition_kin: Inyangingo ya
Umuyoboro w’itumanaho rikoreshwa mbere na mbere mu itumanaho, aho igikoresho cya nyuma gifatira ku muyoboro rusange hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa radiyo.
Itumanaho iryo ari ryo ryose rishobora gushyirwa mu bikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga rikabifasha kwikoresha hatabayeho umusanzu wa muntu.
Igikorwa cy’ ufotora cyo kuboneza yita gusa ku ishusho ry’igifotorwa.

Igikorwa cyo kwegeranya amakuru no kuyahindura ashobora gukoreshwa bikozwe na mudasobwa, amakuru akirundanyije agakurwamo inyandiko isomeka mu mashini, kandi binyuze mu nshobozamudasobwa no mu mbikamakuru bikaba byasohokera mu bikoresho bitandukanye, bikaba byahindurirwa imiterere n’imisusire.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya amashusho cyangwa videwo byafashwe hakoreshejwe tekiniki zitandukanye harimo gutunganya ingano yayo, urumuri, amabara n’ibindi hagambiriwe imiterere yayo yifuzwa.
Uruhurirane rwa porogaramu zifite imikorere runaka ifasha uyikoresha guhitamo imirongo, ingano y’urupapuro n’indeshyo y’urupapuro ashaka gufotora.
Ururimi ruhanitse ahanini rukoreshwa mu kugena amabwiriza atandukanye cyangwa amakuru ajyanye n’ubuhanga bugezweho.
Igikorwa cyo gukoresha ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa mu guhindura, gusesengura, no kunoza amashusho ya digitale hagamijwe kuyongerera ireme cyangwa kuyakuramo amakuru y’ingirakamaro.
Ahantu hakorerwa umurimo wo gutunganya amashusho hakaba hari n’ibikoresho koranabuhanga byabugenewe byifashishwa mu gutunganya amashusho no gukuramo igihangano gikenewe.
Igikorwa cyo gucukumbura no gukoresha imbikamakuru nta ruhushya ubiherewe.

french_terms: Violation de données à caractère personnel
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo kuvogera umutekano w’amakuru bwite mu buryo bunyuranyije n’amategeko gituma amakuru yangirika, atakara, ahinduka, atangazwa mu buryo butemewe cyangwa abantu babona amakuru bwite yahererekanyijwe, abitse cyangwa yatunganyijwe mu bundi buryo.
Uburyo bwo gukoresha ijwi n’amashusho kugira ngo habe itumanaho nyamijyo ibiri, amajyo n’amagaruka.

french_terms: Mise à jour de l’information | Actualité
definition_kin: Amavugururwa akorwa kuri dosiye ikongerwamo amakuru mashya, kuri gahunda za mudasobwa, sisiteme y’ikoranabuhanga hamwe n’inkoranabuhanga hagamijwe guteza imbere no kunoza imikorere yabyo.
Ikoreshwa rya tekiniki nshyashya kandi z’ubwenge mu kurwanya uburiganya ku buryo butanga umusaruro kurushaho.

french_terms: Acquisition d'images | prétraitement en traitement d’image
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo gufata cyangwa kwakira amashusho avuye ahantu hatandukanye hakoreshejwe
Ikoranabuhanga rifasha abantu kuganira imbonankubone batari kumwe ahubwo bakoresheje ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa nka mudasobwa, telefoni n’ibindi.

Uburyo bw’iyamamaza mbonera aho umucuruzi yegera abaguzi boshoboka kugira ngo bagure ibicuruzwa cyangwa serivisi haba hakoreshwa telefoni, haba ari imbona nkubone cyangwa habaye guhana gahunda y’inama kuri murandasi habaye ihamagara.
Gutangaza ibicuruzwa hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga ryo kohererezanya ubutumwa bwamamaza ku rubuga nkoranyambaga, mu tuntu bita udusanduka tw’ubutumwa cyangwa imeri.
Urubuga rwagenewe korohereza abakoresha kwandika inyandiko hakurikijwe uko zagiye zikurikirana.

Ikintu kiboneka muri porogaramu nyinshi za mudasobwa (nk'izikoreshwa mu kwinjiza amakuru, gutunganya ubutumwa koranabuhanga, ubushakashatsi kuri murandasi cyangwa gutunganya amagambo) zigerageza guhanura no kurangiza ijambo cyangwa interuro uko byanditse n'umukoresha wa porogaramu.
Uburyo
Uburyo bwo kwandika amakuru ku gikoresho gikoresha ububiko bw’amakuru hifashishijwe imirasire ityaye.
Igikorwa cyo kwandikisha, gukoresha cyangwa kugurisha izina ry'urubuga rwa murandasi hagamijwe kungukira ku kirango cy'undi muntu cyangwa ku izina ry'ikirango cye.

french_terms: Cryptage des données | Chiffrement des données | Chiffrement
definition_kin: Igikorwa cyo guhindura inyandiko iri mu buryo busanzwe mo inyandiko y’amarenga (ihishe) cyangwa icurikanze hagamijwe kurinda indemo yayo ngo itavogerwa.
Igabanuka rya gahoro gahoro ry’ubushobozi bw’inkoranabuhanga kuri mudasobwa bigaragazwa n’igenda gahoro ryayo cyangwa imikorere isimbagurika.

french_terms: Dégradation des données | pourriture des données | pourriture des bits
definition_kin: Isenyuka rya gahoro gahoro ry’amakuru koranabuhanga itewe no kuba igikoresho mbikamakuru cyarapfuye inshuro nyinshi ku buryo budakomeye.

english_terms: Chromatic aberration | axial chromatic aberrationcolor fringing | aberration
french_terms: Aberration chromatique axiale | aberration chromatique | aberration
definition_kin: Ukwangirika kw’amashusho ya televiziyo bitewe no kubura cyangwa kugira ingufu nke z’ikimenyetso ntangamashusho cyangwa kuba cyashyizweho nabi.
Igabanuka y’isubiza, ry’ifatanzira n’ubushobozi bw’imikorere rusange, bigatera iyangirika ry’ireme ry’ihuzanzira.

english_terms: Bit rot | bit decay | code rot | code decay | data decay | data degradation | data deterioration | data rot | silent corruption
french_terms: Pourriture des bits | dégradation des données | pourriture des données | pourriture du code | dégradation du code | corruption silencieuse
definition_kin: Iyangirika rya gahoro gahoro ry’amakuru yo mu ikoranabuhanga uko ibihe bigenda bihita, bigatera itakara ritari irya burundu cyangwa se rya burundu ry’amakuru.
Icengeramafishiye rikorwa n’inkoranabuhanga mbi ikorwa n’abagome bo kuri murandasi kugira ngo bibe amakuru kandi bangize cyangwa bagasenye za mudasobwa n’inzungano koranabuhanga.

synonym_kin: Icana nkenerabushyuhe (icâana nkênerabûshyuûhe); ihagurutsa nkenerabushyuhe (ihâgurutsa nkênerabûshyuûhe).
definition_kin: Ukongera gutangiza mudasobwa itazimye burundu.
Ukuba amakuru yanditse kuava aho abitse ajya aho yoherejwe, hakagenzurwa itanganzira anyujijwemo, ihinduka ryayo n’icungwa rihamye ryayo.

english_terms: Computer-generated animation | Computer-generated imagery (CGI) | Computer animation | digital animation | animation
french_terms: Animation par ordinateur | animation numérique | animation
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo gukora amashusho agenda bwa mudasobwa (CGI), akaba ari ikoranabuhanga yihariye ikoresha ibishushanyo bya mudasobwa mu buhanzi, icapiro, n’imikino ya videwo hakoreshejwe inkoranabuhanga ya mudasobwa.
Inzira ikoreshwa mu gukora amashusho agenda mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo kwemeza umwirondoro w’umuntu hifashishijwe amakuru asanzwe ari ku ikarita cyangwa sisitemu y’ibyangombwa bigezweho.
Uburyo bwo kwemeza umwirondoro w’umuntu hifashishijwe amakuru ari muri sisitemu y’ibyangombwa bigezweho hakoreshejwe murandasi muri ako kanya.

french_terms: Reconnaissance de l'iris | balayage de l’iris
definition_kin: Uburyo nyamwikoresha bwo gutahura igice cy’umubiri hafatwa ibishushanyo byihariye mu gice kimeze nk’uruziga kizengurutse imboni ya buri jisho.
Inyigo y’ukuri mbonezamitekerereze igatandukanya imitekerereze mbonezakuri n’imitekerereze itari ukuri n’isesengura ndetse n’iboneza ry’amasano hagati y’imiterere yemewe.
Igikorwa cyo kugenzura ibiranga umuntu hakoreshejwe cyangwa hadakoreshejwe murandasi, hakurikijwe amakuru yanditswe muri sisitemu ya SDID.
Uburyo bwo kwemeza hakoreshejwe ishusho igaraza imitere y’udutsi tw’amaraso tw’indiba y’ijisho y’umuntu nk’ikimenyetso simusiga cyangwa cyihariye cyemeza ko afungurirwa inzungano zirinzwe.
Kwinjira mu ihuzanzira no gusesengura amakuru y’itumanaho nta burenganzira ubifitiye.
Gukura amakuru runaka muri porogaramu imwe ya mudasobwa ajyanwa ahandi.
Igitero kibi gikoresha ikibazo cy’umutekano mbere y’uko ikibazo kimenyekana.
Itegeko rikoreshwa mu igenamikorere rya mudasobwa, imbikamakuru n’inkoranabuhanga zikoreshwa z’imbonerahamwe nyamibare kugira ngo zongere amakuru mu rwego ruhasanzwe.

Inkoranabuhanga cyangwa igikoresho ntangamakuru kandi nsesenguzi cy’ingirakamaro cyakorewe gufasha umuntu kumva no gukurikirana imimerere/impumeko rusange y’igikoresho cyifashisha Android, iguha amakuru ya tekiniki ya mudasobwa yawe kugira ngo umuntu ashobore gufata icyemezo adahubutse ku bijyanye n’ubushobozi n’umutekano byayo.
Gutunganya amakuru bwite ku buryo aba atakibashije kwitirirwa nyiri ubwite wihariye hadakoreshejwe ibisobanuro by’inyongera bibitswe ukwabyo.
Sisitemu yifashishwa mu bumenyi n’ubuhanga bugezweho mu gusembura imikorere myiza y’ubwonko, uko bwiga ikintu ndetse no gukomeza kukibuka.

Igikorwa cyo kohereza amakuru, inkoranabuhanga cyangwa mu mbikamakuru (RAM) biturutse mu bubiko kugira ngo ntima ishobore kubikoresha kukoidashobora gukoresha amakuru zisanzwe keretse izinyuze mu mbikamakuru ya RAM gusa.

Inzira y’ikorwa ry’igenamikorere rya mudasobwa, habarirwamo igenamiterere, igenamikorere, igenzurabuziranenge n’icungamikorere, bivuze ko hagomba gutahurwa ibikenewe, iteganywa ry’ibisubizo n’ikoreshwa ry’imbonezamibare z’igenamikorere no guteganya imikorere iboneye hifashishwa ikosora koranabuhanga n’igerageza.

Akazi ko gutegura urubuga rwo kuri murandasi, bihera ku gukora ipaji imwe ukagera ku gushyiramo inkoranabuhanga za murandasi n’ibindi byorohereza umuntu gukora ubucuruzi no kubona serivisi y’imbuga nkoranyambaga.

synonym_kin: Ihinanzira rya porogaramu (ihinanzira ryaa porogaraâmu); inzira y’ubusamo (inzira y’ûbusâmo).
definition_kin: Inzira yihuse yo kugera kuri porogaramu cyangwa dosiye, akaba ari uburyo bwa mudasobwa bufasha uyikoresha gushyira akamenyetso ndanga ka porogaramu runaka ku kirahure kugira ngo igihe ayikeneye ntibimugore ajya mu kuyishakisha ahubwo akande kuri ako kamenyetso.
Igikorwa cyo gushungura amashusho no kugabanya inzira yerekeza ku makuru, ku ndemo cyangwa ku makuru hakurikijwe amategeko cyangwa amabwiriza yagenwe mbere.
Igihe umuyoboro w’itumanaho wakiriye amakuru menshi kurenza ubushobozi bwawo, bigatuma amakuru atinda kugera aho agomba kugera, amwe akabura, kandi imikorere ya sisitemu ikagabanuka.
Arugoritime zikoreshwa mu ntanganzira aho buri paki yinjira isohorwa n’inzira zose zisohora uretse inzira zinjiriyemo.

Uburyo inzira ya murandasi ibyiganirwamo n’amakuru menshi bitewe n’uko amakuru y’abakiriya aba aruta ayo inzira iba ishobora gutwara cyangwa gucunga, bityo akagenda ahana umwanya, bigatuma abakiriya bategereza umwanya ko abageraho.
Gushyira amakuru ahabugenewe ngo adatakara cyangwa ngo yangirike kugira ngo azifashishwe mu gihe andi azaba yangiritse cyangwa yabuze.
Inyito ihabwa igikoresho kugira ngo kimenywe n’umuntu.

english_terms: Username | user name | account name | User ID
french_terms: Nom d'utilisateur | nom de compte | identifiant utilisateur
definition_kin: Inyito igaragaza ku buryo bwihariye umuntu ku rwungano rw’ikoranabuhanga iyo afunguye ihuzanzira, rigatuma imbonezamikorere igera ku mafishi ye ngo ayafungure.

english_terms: Wireless data connection | wireless connection | wireless | wi-fi
french_terms: Connexion de données sans fil | connection sans fil | wifi
definition_kin: Uburyo bwa murandasi budakoresha umugozi ahubwo hagakoreshwa amajwi ya radiyo kugira ngo ibikoresho koranabuhanga byoherereze za mudasobwa amakuru zikeneye.
Ururimi rukoreshwa mu kubaka inkoranabuhanga hakoreshejwe za kodi zifashishwa mu gukora sisitemu igamije kurema no gutunganya za inkoranabuhanga.

Igikoresho koranabuhanga gituma abagikoresha bafata ku buryo bw’amakuru ibibaye, amatariki n’amasaha ariko habura ibiranga ibikorwa by’imbaraminsi isanzwe ikoresha udupapuro, inyandiko iri mu mabara cyangwa imigereka.
Igikorwa cyo gukanda cyangwa kurekura ibuto y’imbeba, akenshi bikorewe kuri mudasobwa.
Gukoresha igikoresho ngaragaza nk’imbeba, kugira ngo ujishe indangagikorwa ku irebero hanyuma uyimurire ahandi wifuza.
Igikorwa cyo ku mbeba ya mudasobwa aho uyikoresha akanda akanarekura vuba (akanda kabiri yihuta), agakanda agace k’ibumoso k’imbeba, akabigira kabiri gakurikiranye.

english_terms: Tape | Tape storage | Magnetic tape storage
definition_kin: Igikoresho gifite umumaro wo kubika no gushyingura amakuru ku gihe kirekire hifashishijwe ikidongi cy’umugozi ubikwaho amajwi, amashusho cyangwa byombi, bikaba byasomwa mu byiciro.
Kaseti ikoreshwa mu kubika amashusho n’amajwi, haba ari kuri televiziyo cyangwa se amashusho bwite.
Akantu gakoreshwa mu kugaragaza urubibi hagamijwe kwerekana intangiriro n’iherezo ry’agace k’inyandiko.

english_terms: Dialling code | Country calling code | country dial-in code | international subscriber dialing code (ISD) | telephone country code
french_terms: Indicatif téléphonique | indicatif d'appel de pays | code d'appel de pays | code de numérotation d'abonné international | indicatif téléphonique de pays
definition_kin: Imibare yihariye igize nomero yifashishwa mu guhamagara mu kindi gihugu cyangwa umugi.
Kohereza ubutumwa butasabwe, budafite aho buhuriye cyangwa busubirwamo, ubusanzwe mu bwinshi binyuze kuri imeri, imbuga nkoranyambaga cyangwa urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa.
Igikorwa cyo guhererekanya ku buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga amakuru, ubutumwa cyangwa fishier biva ku wohereza bijya ku wakira biciye mu ihuzanzira.
Ubutumwa bugufi bwandikwa n'umukoresha w'impuza, bugizwe n'inyandiko, amafoto cyangwa amashusho bugashyirwa ku rubuga kugira ngo busangizwe abandi.
Iyoherezwa ry’ubutumwa, inyandiko, amashusho cyangwa amafishiye biva kuri mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho bijyaku kindi biciye mu ihuzanzira nka murandasi, hifashishijwe inzira ya SMTP.
Gushyira inyandiko cyangwa amashusho ashushanyije ku rupapuro nyuma y’uko byari byakuwe cyangwa byatiwe ahandi.

french_terms: Compte par défaut | utilisateur par défaut
definition_kin: Sisitemu y’uruganda iha igikoresho ubushobozi bwo gusuzuma imyirondoro y’ushaka kuyikoresha bwa mbere ikimara gutunganywa.
Bivugwa kuri mudasobwa cyangwa igikoresho ngendanwa cyafashe ihuzanzira.
Igikorwa cyangwa ikintu cyose kibangamira imikorere isanzwe ya sisitemu ya mudasobwa.
Gushyira mu bubiko impinduka yose ibaye ku ifishi.

french_terms: Enregistrement des données à caractère personnel
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo kubika ibikorwa byakozwe mu itunganwa ry’amakuru bwite mu gihe runaka hagamijwe kubikurikirana no kubigenzura hifashishijwe uburyo koranabuhanga bwikoresha. Kubika mu(ri) (kubîika mu(rî)).

Bivugwa iyo mudasobwa itari guhuzwa n’izindi cyangwa ibindi byuma by’ikoranabuhanga, ariko cyane cyane kuba idahura na murandasi cyangwa mudasobwa remezo, binavugwa kandi iyo incapanyandiko, sikaneri n’insomamakuru yo hanze bicometse kuri mudasobwa ariko bitakije cyangwa bitari muri gahunda yo gukora.
Ugukoresha murandasi, imeri, imbuga nkoranyambaga cyangwa ubundi buryo bwo gutumanaho mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo utoteze, utere ubwoba cyangwa utere ubwoba umuntu kenshi.
Ubushobozi cyangwa uburenganzira bwo kureba, gukoresha cyangwa gukura amakuru yabitswe muri mudasobwa, mu bubiko bw'amakuru cyangwa mu rusobe rw’iyoherezwa koranabuhanga urwo ari rwo rwose.
