Uburyo ufite umuyoboro yorohereza undi wifuza gutanga servisi z’itumanaho akoresheje uwo muyoboro, hakurikijwe ibisabwa byagenwe, haba mu buryo bw’umwihariko cyangwa bwa rusange mu gutanga serivisi z’itumanaho.
Uburyo bwo gushyiraho ikintu kigahora kigaragara kundebero ya mudasobwa.
Uburyo bwo gukuraho ikintu cyagaragaraga ku ndebero ya mudasobwa.

french_terms: Violation de la confidentialité des données
definition_kin: Igihe amakuru runaka ageze kub’abatayemerewe mu buryo butifuzwaga ndetse ko iyo bibaye ayo makuru ashobora kwifashishwa n’abayafite mu bikorwa bitemewe n’amategeko.
Uburyo bwo kureba amafaranga asigaye kuri konti ukoresheje murandasi.
Ukuba igikoresho cyangwa urwungano bicometse ku ihuzanzira rya murandasi.

Uburyo bwo kuriha butuma umuntu yishyura biciye mu kwiyandikisha mu ikoranabuhanga rifite umutekano (urubuga rwa murandasi, serivisi nkoreshajwi cyangwa serivisi ya telefoni), biturutse ku utanga ibicuruzwa, na nyuma y’uko ugura amaze kubyemeza, amafaranga akavanwa kuri konti y’ugura.
Kumva, gufata
Igikorwa cyo kuyihagarika neza ikareka gukora.
Igikorwa cyo kwerekana imigaragarire y’inyandiko cyangwa porogaramu kuri mugaragaza.
Igikorwa cyo gutangira kwandika ubutumwa bushya bwa imeri.
Igikorwa cyo gucana mudasobwa kugira ngo itangire gukora.
Uburyo bwo kwiga ukoresheje mudasobwa na murandasi aho kuba mu ishuri risanzwe.
Uburyo bwo kwiga kwa mudasobwa aho sisitemu ishakisha imiterere n’isano mu makuru atarashyizweho ibisobanuro.

pronunciation_kin: kwîigira ku makurû nyakûri kwaa siisiteêmu
definition_kin: Uburyo bwo kwiga kwa mudasobwa aho sisitemu yigira ku makuru yashyizweho ibisobanuro kugira ngo ishobore gutanga ibisubizo.

Uburyo bwo kwiga mudasobwa aho sisitemu yiga gufata ibyemezo binyuze mu gukorana n'ibidukikije, kwakira ibitekerezo mu buryo bw'ibihembo cyangwa ibihano, no guhindura ibikorwa byayo kugira ngo igere ku nyungu nini mu gihe kirekire.

Ubushobozi umufatabuguzi afite bwo kugumana nomero akoresha kubera amasezerano yashyizeho umukono, mu gihe ahinduye uwamugezagaho serivisi z’itumanaho koranabuhanga cyangwa aho yakoresherezaga serivisi z’iryo tumanaho koranabuhanga.
Gushyira ibice by’amakuru nk’umubare w’ibanga mbere yo kujya muri mudasobwa cyangwa muri porogaramu zayo.

Kohereza amafaranga ku buryo koranabuhanga biciye muri murandasi, bikaba hagati y’umucuruzi n’uhaha, haba ku buryo bw’ikarita ya banki, ku bw’inkoranabuhanga ya banki cyangwa biciye ku rubuga rwa banki, hadakoreshejwe amafaranga afatika cyangwa sheki, bigakorwa ku buryo bubangutse kandi bwizewe.
Uburyo bwo kwishyura imisoro ya RRA na RSSB hakoreshejwe murandasi.
Uburyo bwo kwishyura fagitire z’amazi, umuriro, imisoro n’izindi serivisi ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga.
Ibikorwa bikubiyemo imicungire, ibikwa ry’amakuru cyangwa kongera kubona amakuru abitswe muri mudasobwa.
Igikorwa cyo gukora konti nshya utanga amakuru yose asabwa.

Uburyo umuntu ushaka gukoresha murandasi yiyandikisha agahabwa amakuru amufasha kugira ibyangombwa bimuranga nk’izina rimuranga kuri murandasi cyangwa aho abarizwa bikajya bituma inkoranabuhanga zimenya ko ari we mu rwego rwo kwirinda kwinjirirwa, bityo bigatanga umutekano w’inyongera.

Guhimba imyirondoro itariyo hakoreshejwe imyirondoro y’undi muntu hagamijwe guhanga ikarita mbikuramafaranga cyangwa gusaba inguzanyo mu myirondoro y’undi muntu, bishobora kugira ingaruka kuri nyir’imyirondoro.
Izina rya mudasobwa zakozwe na Apple Computer.
Igipimo cy’ingano y’amakuru abikika ku gikoresho runaka, icyo gipimo kingana na bayiti igihumbi kirengaho.
Igipimo cy’ubwisubiremo bw’amajwi, bingana n’inshuro miliyoni ku isogonda.
Igikoresho gitanga inzira igera kuri za gahunda, igenabikorwa, incapanyandiko n’ibindi.
Igikorwa cyo kumva cyangwa kumenya byinshi kurushaho.
Indangururamajwi ifite ubushobozi buhambaye bwo gukurura amajwi, yifashishwa mu gufata amajwi yihariye mu yandi menshi ari kumvikana ahantu runaka.
Ubwoko bwa mikoro yakira amajwi ifata aturutse mmu byerekezo byose.
Ubwoko bwa mikoro yakira gusa amajwi ifata aturutse gusa mu cyerekezo yerekejwemo.

english_terms: Lapel microphone, lavalier microphone, tie-clip microphone, clip mic | body mic | collar mic | neck mic
definition_kin: Ubwoko bwa mikoro nto yakira amajwi aturutse mu byerekezo byose, ikaba yakwambarwa ku gice cy’umwenda kiri hafi y’umunwa cyangwa igashyirwa ku kintu kiri hafi y’aho abantu bavugira.
Amabwiriza akoreshwa mu nkoranabuhanga no mu gukora imikino.

english_terms: Mobile broadband modem | wireless modem | cellular modem
french_terms: Modem à haut débit | modem sans fil | modem cellulaire
definition_kin: Ubwoko bwa modemu butuma mudasobwa bwite cyangwa intanganzira byakira murandasi nziramugozi biciye mu ihuzanzira ngendanwa ryihuta aho gukoresha imiyoboro ya telefoni cyangwa ya televiziyo hakoreshejwe imigozi.

Igice cy’urwungano gituma itumanaho rishoboka biciye mu bikoresho nyakira koranabuhanga, kigashyikirana n’urwungano ruri kure ndetse kikaba cyafata ihuzanzira rusange biciye mu bikoresho bisanzwe bitari koranabuhanga.
Modemu ikoreshwa mu gushyiraho uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru hakoresheshejwe icyogajuru cy’itumanaho nk’impererekanyamakuru.
Igikoresho gicomeka urwungano koranabuhanga kuri murandasi binyuze mu muyoboro wa televiziyo hifashishijwe urusinga.

french_terms: Dial-up Modem | accès Internet par ligne commutée
definition_kin: Ifata ihuzanzira biciye mu ihuzanzira rya telefoni rusange zahinduwe hagamijwe gukora ifatishahuzanzira ku utanga ihuzanzira hakoreshejwe kwandika nimero ya telefoni ku murongo usanzwe.
Imashini yohereza amakuru mu buryo bugufi bwohereza amakuru y’umwimerere y’ikoranabuhanga rigezweho bitandukanye no gukoresha imihuzanzira ya radiyo.
Igikoresho cyohereza imiraba minyaruko ku yindi miraba y’imbonezanzira biciye mu gikoresho cy’inyoboratumanaho.
Igikoresho gituma mudasobwa yohereza amakuru ku miyoboro ya telefoni isanzwe itari koranabuhanga.

Igikoresho cyigenga gitandukanye na mudasobwa gituma itumanaho hagati ya mudasobwa n’ihuzanzira rishoboka, igafatira inzira kuri mudasobwa biciye mu mugozi akenshi yinjiriye mu nzira rutonde, USB cyangwa Ethernet.

Inkoranabuhanga nkomatanya iyobora ibikoresho nkoranabuhanga bikoreshwa mu bwenge buhangano, igatuma bishobora gusoma amakuru, kuyakuramo amasomo no guhanga ibisubizo cyangwa ibikorwa bishingiye kuri ayo makuru.
Inshakishamakuru ya murandasi y’ubuntu kandi ifite amakuru agenewe abantu bose yakozwe n’ikigega Mozilla hamwe n’isosiyete igikomokaho Mozilla Corporation.
Inkoranabuhanga ishobora gukora ibikorwa byo kubara nko guteranya, gukuba, gukuramo cyangwa kugabanya hakoreshejwe inzira koranabuhanga n’igenamikorere ya nkoranabuhanga.
Ahantu nyamukuru ho kubika amakuru muri mudasobwa, ikabikwamo sisitemu n’amadosiye, nk’akabati kabikwamo impapuro.
Ubwoko bw’imbikamakuru ruziga nsomesharumuri bubika amakuru menshi bwaje busimbura DVD, bukagira amashusho meza (1080p) cyangwa arenzeho (4K) bushobora no kubika ubundi bwoko bw’amakuru nyamibare.

Igikoresho cyandukura inyandiko n’amashusho ku mpapuro cyangwa ibindi bikoresho kiba gicometse kuri mudsobwa, bityo kigafasha gusesengura inyandiko, inyandiko nyamibare, n’izindi gahunda kugira ngo hakorwe inyandiko n’amashusho bicapye bishyashya.
Ikigo cyangwa se abantu bafasha ibigo by’ubucuruzi n’abikorera bose babyifuza gufungura urubuga kuri murandasi.
Igikoresho koranabuhanga cyakira amakuru ku buryo bw’imibare kikabihindura ku buryo kibona igisubizo hakoreshejwe gahunda, inkoranabuhanga cyangwa itsinda ry’amategeko bikibwira ibigomba gukorwa.

english_terms: Individual computer | Personal computer | Desktop PC
definition_kin: Igikoresho icyo ari cyo cyose kigamije kubara gikoreshwa n’umukoresha w’umuntu ku bw’inyungu z’umukoresha.
Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga cya mudasobwa kibona

Igikoresho cya mudasobwa nto ishobora kugendanwa cyangwa umuntu akayikoresha iri ku bibero, ifite irebero n’urwandikiro rurimo imbeba, irebero n’urwandikiro bikora ikintu kimwe gihinwa ku buryo irebero ripfundikira urwandikiro, igakora nka mudasobwa isanzwe, ikagira akarusho ko gukora idacometse ku mashanyarazi igihe runaka kuko iba ikoresha ayo ifite muri batiri.

synonym_kin: (indeebero nkôranabûhaânga).
definition_kin: Mudasobwa bwite ngendanwa nziramugozi ifite indebero nkoranabuhanga yumva urutoki, iba ari nto kuri mudasobwa isanzwe ariko ikaba nini ho gato kuri telefoni igezweho (simatifoni), uruhande rw’imbere rwose ni ikirahure cyumva ugikabakabye ku buryo ahashinzwe urutoki ireba ubutumwa buhasanzwe ukanze aba avuze ikabukurikiza, icyo kirahure ni irebero n’urwandikiro.

Urwungano rugari rwa mudasobwa rufite ubushobozi bwo gukoreshwa mu bikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga bifite ububiko buhanitse, n’ibigarura amakuru yatakaye ndetse no mu zindi porogaramu kandi bikorewe icyarimwe.
Mudasobwa ziba zifite isanduku ya mudasobwa ifatanye na mugaragaza.

Mudasobwa cyangwa sisitemu nk’inkoranabuhanga cyangwa igikoresho cyo kubika bitanga ibyo gukoresha, amakuru, serivisi na gahunda bibiha izindi mudasobwa biciye mu ihuzanzira, bityo bibika amakuru, bikayohereza, bikanayakira, bikanakora n’indi mirimo.

Uruhande rw’inkoranabuhanga ngendanwa rucomekwa ku kigega mpuzamakuru rw’inkoranabuhanga ngendanwa rutanga rugatuma hashobora gukoreshwa ibice by’inkoranabuhanga nko kuyobora no gucunga umutekano w’inkoranabuhanga cyane cyo mu bijyanye n’irangabikoresho n’ababikoresha ndetse no kuranga inkoranabuhanga, kandi bigaha inkoranabuhanga ngendanwa yawe gushobora kugera ku ndakomwa y’inkoranabuhanga biciye mu mpuzabikoresho.

french_terms: Serveur d’Échange de Microsoft | Échange Microsoft
definition_kin: Porogaramu ikorana n’iyitwa Windows 95, igena uburyo ubutumwa butandukanye bwoherezwa ndetse bukanakirwa kuri mudasobwa.

Mudasobwa ikoresha sisitemu z’ihuzanzira igihe iri gukoreshwa ndetse ikaba yanabasha gukoresha porogaramu zisanzweho icyarimwe (nk’intima, imbikamakuru ya RAM, ububiko bwa mudasobwa n’ubushobozi bw’umuyoboro mugari) biba bisaranganyijwe abakoresha serivisi, inkoranabuhanga cyangwa imbuga za murandasi.
Mudasobwa ibasha kubika ubutumwa bwinjira ikabwohereza kuwo bugenewe ndetse ikabika ubugenewe koherezwa hanyuma ikaza kubwohereza kuri mudasobwa ibubika ikoresha murandasi.
Mudasobwa ibika amapaji y’ikigo agakora urubuga rwo kuri murandasi.
Mudasobwa ifasha ibikorwa by’ihuzanzira gukora ndetse ikagena n’imikorere yabyo y'ibanze.
Mugabuzi ifatika yahawe ikigo kimwe.

english_terms: Optic fiber | fiber optics | optical fiber, fiber optic cable
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga ryohereza amakuru mu buryo bw’imiraba y’urumuri ku mugozi w’ikirahure cyangwa wa pulasitiki.

Ubwoko bw’urusinga runini rukoresha diyode nyarumuri ikoze muri purasitiki idahenze mu gutwara amakuru ikoresheje urumuri ruturutse muri Lazeri iri ahantu hagenwe, urumuri rugakwira mu mutima w’urusinga rugenda rwihonda ku mbibi zarwo, rugatwara ibimenyetso nyamiraba biturutse cyangwa bigana mu bikoresho bito cyane bikabije by’insinga minyaruko.

Ihuzanzira y’isi yose ihuza za mudasobwa, ibigega mpuzamakuru, telefoni, n’ibindi bikoresho nkoranabuhanga bihujwe mu itumanaho hakoreshejwe impuzanzira y’itumanaho TCP kugira ngo habe ihanahana ryihuse ry’amakuru, inyandiko n’izindi serivisi.
Uburyo bwo gukoresha murandasi yihuta ituma amakuru yoherezwa vuba.
Imibonere ya murandasi aho ibintu bigaragara bivuye mu buso bikagara mu buryo bw’ubunini.
Umuvuduko w’amakuru y’itumanaho ubarirwa hagati ya bayiti 2400 na 9600 ku isogonda.
Porogaramu ifasha kureba, gutunganya no gucunga amafishiye, ububiko n’ibikoresho by’ingenzi bicometse kuri mudasobwa.
igikoresho gisanzwe cya mudasobwa gikoreshwa mu gusoma amafirimi, ishyirwamo ry’inkoranabuhanga n’ibikwa ry’amakuru, isoma ikanandika amakuru ku madisiki koranabuhanga nzira nyinshi (DVD).
Agakoresho gato kagendanwa kabika kandi kakanakina umuziki na videwo.
Ahantu kuri mudasobwa hacomekwa ibikoresho byo hanze.

english_terms: Hard Disk Drive (HDD) | Hard Drive | Local Drive | Storage drive | Hard Disk | Disk drive
definition_kin: Igikoresho cy’imbere muri mudasobwa ariko hari nubwo kigurwa ukwacyo, kikaba gifite akamaro ko kubika amakuru nka sisitemu y’imikorere, inkoranabuhanga n’amafishiye.

english_terms: Compact Disk (CD) | Compact Disk Read-Only-Memory (CD ROM) | Digital Versatile Disk drive) | DVD-ROM, (DVD-R), DVD-R/W
french_terms: Disque compact | disque compact à mémoire morte (CD-ROM) | Lecteurs de disques numériques polyvalents, DVD-ROM (DVD-R), DVD-R/W
definition_kin: Igikoresho gito cyitwazwa gishobora gufatwaho amakuru akabikwaho, agasomwa ku buryo bw’amajwi, amashusho cyangwa ubundi buryo koranabuhanga.

french_terms: Navigateur | navigateur Web | moteur de recherche
definition_kin: Inkoranabuhanga cyangwa gahunda ya mudasobwa yifashishwa mu gushakisha amakuru kuri murandasi hifashishijwe amagambo y’ingenzi cyangwa imvugo, igatanga ibisubizo ku buryo bwihuse.

synonym_kin: Urwandikiro rwa mudasobwa (urwaandikiro rwaa mûdasobwâ); urwandikiro (urwaandikiro).
definition_kin: Igikoresho cyifashishwa mu kwinjiza amakuru muri mudasobwa hakoreshejwe gukanda inyoborakimenyetso ya mudasobwa haba iy’inyuguti, iy’imibare cyangwa iy’ibimenyetso byihariye.
Uburyo bwo kwandika bwifashisha utudomo tubyimbye mu gushushanya inyuguti ku buryo umuntu ufite ubumuga bwo kutabona akoraho agasoma ibyanditse.
Nomero iranga umuntu ishyirwaho ku buryo bwa tombola, yihariye kandi ihoraho ihabwa umuntu wanditswe muri CRVS bikozwe n’umukozi ubishinzwe.

english_terms: Single Digital Identification number | SDID number
definition_kin: Nomero y’indangamuntu koranabuhanga, ari yo nomero itangwa mu buryo bwa tombola, yihariye kandi ihoraho, iranga umuntu wayihawe.

Urwungano nyamibare rwa mudasobwa rukoresha imibarwa ibiri 0 na 1 (igicumbi 2) rukoreshwa mu kubika amakuru no kubara ingiro, akaba ari urwungano shingiro mu ihunika ry’amakuru kuko ari ho isesengurira amakuru ikagaragaza byose, yaba ari inyandiko, imibare, amabwiriza, amashusho byose mu buryo bw’amatsinda agizwe n’iriya mibarwa ibiri.

Iigikoresho kiri mu bwoko aho ingano zihoraho zihindagurika, nk'ubushobozi bw'amashanyarazi, umuvuduko w'amazi cyangwa ingendo za mekanike, zigaragazwa mu buryo busa n'ingano zijyanye n'ikibazo kigomba gukemurwa.
Ikoranabuhanga ry’itumanaho rihuza mudasobwa n’ibindi bikoresho mu muyoboro wo mu gace kamwe (LAN) hifashishijwe insinga, bikabafasha guhanahana amakuru ku muvuduko mwinshi.

Inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa yikoresha ishobora gukurikiza amategeko amwe namwe ihawe iyo yinjijwemo ubutumwa runaka, igakoreshwa mu bikorwa bigaruka kenshi kandi buri kanya, igakora yigana umuntu cyangwa ikamusimbura kandi ikabikora neza kumurusha, byaba bigambiriye ikiza cyangwa ikibi.
Porogaramu cyangwa inyandiko kuri seriveri ya imeri isubiza imeri mu buryo bwikora.
Ukwisubiramo gutandukanya amajwi bitewe n’aho asekuye, nko ku rukuta cyangwa no ku musozi, bibaho no mu majwi ya mudasobwa.
Ijwi ry’ubuduha ritangwa no guhungabana kw’amajwi gutewe n’uko indangururamajwi yakiriye amajwi ava ku nsakazamajwi irigushyira bityo amajwi akinyuramo kugeza insakazamajwi itakibasha kuyakira.
umuntu runaka ufitanye isano n’amakuru runaka.
Umuntu usanga amakuru ye bwite yarakusanyijwe kandi agatunganywa.
Paji y’urubuga rwo kuri murandasi itanga amakuru ku ngingo runaka.

french_terms: Pages par session | profondeur de page
definition_kin: Inshuro uri kuri murandasi akanda ku rwandikiro, izo nshuro zikaba zikenewe kugira ngo agere ku ipaji runaka avuye ku ipaji y’ahabanza akoresheje inzira ya bugufi.

synonym_kin: Pake (paâke)
definition_kin: Indundo y’amayinite agurishirizwa hamwe ku giciro cyagenwe.
Ikinyabumwe cy’ihunika ry’amakuru kingana na bayiti 1000000000000000 cyangwa terabayi 1000 cyangwa jigabayiti miliyoni.

Porogaramu ya mudasobwa cyangwa igikoresho koranabuhanga cyangwa ikindi gikoresha uburyo bwikoresha, bikoreshwa ku buryo bwigenga mu gutangiza igikorwa, mu gusubiza ubutumwa, mu gukora byose cyangwa igice, bikozwe ku buryo byikora.
Inkoranabuhanga iri hagati y’imbonezamikorere n’inkoranabuhanga ziyikoresherezwamo.
Gahunda ya mudasobwa igaragara mu yindi porogaramu, ikaba igenewe gukora akazi runaka, akenshi ishyirwa muri porogaramu nini cyangwa urupapuro rwa murandasi.

Inkoranabuhanga ituma ibikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga cyangwa ibya elegitoronike byegeranye bishobora guhererekanya amakuru atandukanye (mu majwi, mu nyandiko cyangwa mu mashusho) mu buryo bw’inziramugozi, hadakoreshejwe insinga.

english_terms: Microsoft Access | Access application | MS Access
definition_kin: Inkoranabuhanga y’ikigega cy’amakuru igenewe abantu bose bakoresha Windows, akaba ari urwungano rucunga ibigega mbikamakuru bya Mikorosofuti, igafatanya inshakisha y’imbikamakuru zifitanye isano za agisesi hakoreshejwe uruganiriro rukoresha ibishushanyo, amashusho n’ibikoresho byo gukora inkoranabuhanga, bityo igatunganya amakuru y’abantu, igahanga imbata, ibishushanyo, igahanga ubutumwa, inyandiko zuzuzwa, na za raporo zo gusesengura amakuru ku buryo buhwitse.
Porogaramu yakozwe na Mikorosofuti ikoresha impapuro za mudasobwa mu gutunganya imibare n’amakuru hakoreshejwe forumire na fongisiyo.

Porogaramu ya murandasi yahanzwe na Google ituma usura imbuga za murandasi, ikaba yaradutse muri 2008, igakoreshwa kuri Mikorosofuti Windowuzi, ikaba yifitemo ibice by’inkoranabuhanga by’ubuntu byakozwe na Apple WebKit n’ibya Mozila Fogisi.
Serivisi y'ifatabuguzi kuri murandasi itanga ipaki ya porogaramu za Ofisi.

Inkoranabuhanga y’incungamakuru usanga ari igikoresho cy’agasanduku k’ubutumwa koranabuhanga, cya karendari cyangwa imbaraminsi kandi cy’igenamigambi bikubiye mu kintu kimwe, gikorerwa muri Windows, Mac, n’inshakishamakuru ya Office, ikaba ishobora gukorana na konti y’amakuru y’amashuri n’amakuru y’impuguke, kohereza no kwakira ubutumwa, gukurikirana igenabikorwa, inama, n’ibiriho biba.
Porogaramu ikoreshwa mu kwandika, guhindura no gutunganya inyandiko.
Inkoranabuhanga yakorewe gutangaza amashusho cyangwa ibishushanyo ku buryo bw’amapaji yihariye bita amafoto ntayega. Porogaramu ya Kitikonegiti (porogaraâmu ya kitîkonegîti)

Inkoranabuhanga ikoresha cyane ubwenge buhangano kuri murandasi yifashishwa mu gukora inama imbonankubone mu buryo bw’iyakure, gukora cyangwa kunoza inyandiko abantu batari hamwe ariko buri wese ayibona ku ndebero ya mudasobwa ye bikoroshya gukorera ikintu hamwe abantu bari ahatandukanye.
Raporo y’ibikorwa bya konti ishyirwa kuri imeri cyangwa porogaramu ya banki.
Serivisi koranabuhanga zitangwa hakoreshejwe ibikoresho byo ku murongo.
Porogaramu ihuza abakoresha bakora mu biro, amashami bakoresheje umuyoboro w’itumanaho.

Inkoranabuhanga nk’igikoresho ifasha abayikoresha kugira ihuzanzira no gukoresha inkoranabuhanga nyagicu biciye muri murandasi, haba mu butumwa bugufi, karendari, ibikoresho byo mu biro nka Mikorosofuti Ofisi 365.
Uburyo bwo kugeza amakuru kuri rubanda hakoreshejwe amajwi cyangwa amajwi n’amashusho ku gice cy’abantu
Serivisi zitangwa ku buryo bwa rusange zishyuriwe, zigizwe zose cyangwa igice kinini, no kohereza amakuru n’ibimenyetso koranabuhanga mu miyoboro y’itumanaho koranabuhanga.
Serivisi izo ari zo zose zitangwa n’inzego za Leta hakoreshejwe uburyo bw’ikoranabuhanga.
Uburyo bwo kugenzura no gukoresha konti ukoresheje urubuga rwa murandasi rwa banki.

headword_kin: Serivisi zitangwa ku baturage hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga
pronunciation_kin: seriviîsi zitaangwâ ku batuûrage hâkoreeshejwe ikôranabûhaânga
french_terms: Services de la société de l’information
definition_kin: Serivisi zishyurirwa, zikorwa uzikorerwa n’uzikora bategeranye, hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga kandi bisabwe n’ukeneye guhabwa izo serivisi ku giti cye.
Igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga gifata inyandiko, amafoto, n’ibindi bikoresho byacapwe bikabikwa nka dosiye koranabuhanga, inyandiko ishyingurwa isa na kopi mu buryo ikintu cya mbere cyasaga.
Uburyo bwo kubika amakuru ya konti n’ibikorwa bya banki mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga.

Igikorwa cyo guhuriza hamwe ihuzanzira ry’inzungano nyinshi hagamijwe guhanga urusobe koranabuhanga rumwe kandi ruhujwe, rukora nk’ikintu kimwe, ruhuza inkoranabuhanga n’inkoranabuhanga nkoreshwa zigakorana, abantu bagakorera mu makipe bakoresha ibikoresho bitandukanye no ku kazi kanyuranye.
Uburyo inyandiko iyo ari yose igaragara ku ndebero.
Mudasobwa usanga yemerera abayikoresha gufungura porogaramu imwe icyarimwe.
Igitabo kimwe cy’indangamuntu koranabuhanga, ari bwo bubiko butanga mu buryo bwa tombora nomero ya SDID n’umubare uranga nomero ya SDID, kandi bukabika amakuru yose yinjijwe.

Urwungano nyoboramikorere rukoreshwa na bose kuri mudasobwa zo mu biro no kuri mudasobwa ngendanwa, rugacunga ibikoresho n’inkoranabuhanga kandi rugatanga uruganiriro rutuma umuntu ashobora gukorana na mudasobwa.
Uburyo bwo kwishyura cyangwa kwakira amafaranga hakoreshejwe murandasi.
Igikorwa gikorerwa kuri mudasobwa cyangwa murandasi kigamije gukuraho icyakozwe, kikagarura ibintu uko byari biri mbere y’icyo gikorwa.
Telefoni igendanwa yifitemo mudasobwa n’ibindi bikoresho ubundi bitajyanaga na telefoni, twavuga nk’urwungano nsesenguzi rwa OS, ishakishamakuru kuri murandasi no kuba hakorwa inkoranabuhanga.

english_terms: Internet phone | broadband phone | Net phone
french_terms: Téléphone Internet | téléphone à large bande
definition_kin: Telefoni ikoresha murandasi mu kubona rezo ndetse no kohereza ubutumwa bw’amajwi.
Telefoni itagendanwa ihuza radio n'muyoboro wa telefone rusange, urwego rukora rufite aho rugarukira, mu bisanzwe ku nyubako imwe cyangwa mu ntera ngufi uvuye ku munara fatizo.

english_terms: Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) | IP telephony
definition_kin: Uburyo bw’itumanaho bwifashisha murandasi mu guhamagara bitandukanye n’uburyo bwa gakondo bukoresha imbangikanyamiyoboro.
Ububiko buteguye neza bushora guhuza inyandiko nyinshi cyangwa fayîlo nyinshi zikabikwa hamwe nkaho ari ikintu kimwe.
Uburyo bwo kubika no gushyira ahagaragara ibyemezo cyangwa amakuru afitanye isano na byo harimo urutonde rw’abambuwe ibyemezo, inyandiko zikoresha ibyemezo, politiki z’ibyemezo n’ibindi.
Igice cya sisitemu ya mudasobwa ikoreshwa mu kubika amakuru n'amabwiriza agomba gutunganywa.
Ahantu habikwa amadosiye umukoresha aba aheruka gufungura mu kanya gato gashize.

french_terms: Système de stockage de masse | stockage de masse
definition_kin: Ubushobozi bw’igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga bwo kubika amakuru mesnhi ashoboka no kuyatanga igihe akenewe.
Ibika ry’amafishiye ahantu hafite umutekano umuntu ashobora kugera ku buryo bworoshye kandi bwizewe.
Ububiko cyangwa igice cya sisitemu ya mudasobwa kibika amakuru na porogaramu kugira ngo bizakoreshwe mu gihe kizaza.
Icyumba cyihariye cy’amakuru y’ibikoresho bya mudasobwa, kibika porogaramu zikoreshwa igihe cyose akoresheje Windows.

Igikoresho cyihariye mbikamakuru, twavuga nk’imbikamakuru ihoraho, imbikamashusho, imbikamakuru ntaremya, kikarangwa no kugira urwungano rw’amafishiye mudasobwa ishobora kubona, rukayibwira uko amadosiye n’amafishiye bitunganyije muri icyo gikoresho.

english_terms: Digital memory buffer | Buffer memory | buffer
definition_kin: Ahantu ho gushyira amakuru y’igihe gito hagakoreshwa mu kugabanya ubucucike bw’amakuru
Serivisi y’imbikamakuru y’iyakure ya Mikorosofuti ihuza mudasobwa n’amafishiye ayibitsemo, ikayasangiza abandi kandi ikabashoboza kuyigeraho aho uri hose ufite mudasobwa n’ihuzanzira rya murandasi.
Ububiko bubarizwa imbere mu bundi bubiko, bukifashishwa mu gutunganya neza dosiye.
Ububiko bw’amakuru bwifashishwa mu gihe gito.
Inzira y’ihangwa rya kopi y’amakuru kugira ngo hateganywe irindwa n’igarurwa ry’amakuru igihe haramutse habaye iyangirika cyangwa gupfa k’urwungano.
Uburyo bw’imikorere bushingiye ku koshya cyangwa kubeshya no kurimangatanya uwo bashaka guhemukira hagamijwe kugenzura urwungano koranabuhanga cyangwa kwiba amakuru bwite cyangwa y’imari.

english_terms: B2C commerce | business-to-consumer (B2C, B- to-C) | business-to-consumer commerce | business-to-customer (B2C, B-to- C)
definition_kin: Ubucuruzi bukorerwa mu ikoranabuhanga hagati y’ikigo cy’ubucuruzi n’umuguzi.
Sosiyete ikora ibikorwa byayo binyuze kuri murandasi.
Ubucuruzi bukorwa hakoreshejwe telefoni igendanwa ikorana na murandasi.
Igikorwa cyo kugura hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga cyangwa kugurisha ibicuruzwa kuri serivisi ku murongo cyangwa ku rubuga rwa murandasi.

english_terms: B2B commerce | business-to- business (B2B, B-to-B) | business-to-business commerce | business-to- business transactions
definition_kin: Imikoranire y’ubucuruzi hagati y’ibigo binyuze mu ikoranabuhanga.
Gufasha buri wese kugira amahirwe yo gukoresha ikoranabuhanga.
Uburyo butuma hashobora kwizerwa ko amakuru ari ay’ukuri, yuzuye, kandi arinzwe ihindurwa iryo ari ryo ryose ritatangiwe uburenganzira n’uyakoresha.

headword_kin: Ibimenyetso koranabuhanga bishingiye ku bumenyi n’ubuhanga bikoreshwa mu butabera
pronunciation_kin: ibimenyeetso koranabuhanga bishiingîye ku bumenyi n’ûbuhaânga bikorêeshwa mu butâbeêra
definition_kin: Ishami ry’ubuhanga bushingiye ku kugaragaza ibimenyetso nkomokabumenyi n’ubuhanga bikoreshwa mu butabera ryibanda ku gutahura no kugarura amakuru yabisanzwemo, kuyasuzuma no kuyasesengura.
Urwego rugari rw’ubumenyi n’ubuhanga rwahariwe gushushanya, kubaka no gukoresha imashini zikoresha imashini.
Ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa rigezweho rifite porogaramu zitandukanye rikusanya, rikabika ndetse rigasesengura amakuru; yerekeye ubuhinzi.

Imvugo ikubiyemo ibikorwa byose bidakurikije amategeko bibera kuri murandasi cyangwa muri imeri nk’ubujura bw’amakuru y’irangamimerere, koherereza umuntu ubutumwa bwo muri imeri bumusaba ku mayeri amakuru ya konti ye y’amafaranga, n’ibindi bikorwa byose by’uburiganya bigamije kwambura abantu amafaranga.

headword_kin: Ubukungu bushingiye ku mikorere y’ikoranabuhanga n’ubucuruzi bwo kuri murandasi Ubukungu bushingiye kuri murandasi
english_terms: Net economy | network economy | new economy
french_terms: Économie en ligne | économie en réseau
definition_kin: Ubukungu usangamo kwibanda ku ihererekanya ibintu na serivisi, bigakorwa kuri murandasi hifashishijwe tekiniki z’ikoranabuhanga.
Ubumenyi kuri porogaramu za mudasobwa.

Igikoresho cyohereza amakuru cyangwa amakuru hagati ya mudasobwa cyangwa ibikoresho bidahuzwa n’imigozi ahubwo bigahuzwa n’ihuzanzira nziramugozi, biboneka kuri mudasobwa nziramugozi, inziramugozi, incapanyandiko nziramugozi, n’ibindi.

french_terms: Vision informatique | Vision par ordinateur | Intelligence artificielle visuelle
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga rikoreshwa n’imashini kugira ngo zitahure ku buryo bwikoze amashusho kandi ziyasobanure nta kwibeshya kandi ku buryo buboneye.
Ikosa rituma umwanzi agera kuri sisitemu cyangwa umuyoboro w'itumanaho mu buryo butaziguye.

Ahinjirirwa hagenewe imikorere y’inkoranabuhanga ishyiraho uburenganzira bwo gukoresha urwungano n’ibindi bijyana kugira ngo usome, wandike, uhindure cyangwa ukureho amakuru kandi ukoreshe inzira z’inkoranabuhanga zifite ubushobozi butandukanye.

Tekiniki ituma umuntu agerageza kubona amakuru akomeye nka nimero za konti za banki, hifashishijwe gutitiriza bya kijura, biciye muri imeri cyangwa ku rubuga rwa murandasi, aho nyiri ukohereza ubutumwa yiyitirira ikigo gifitiye uburenganzira ubutumwa cyangwa umuntu w’agaciro.

Uburyo bwa siyansi cyangwa uburyo busanzwe bukoreshwa mu gukusanya, gusesengura no gusobanura ibimenyetso kugira ngo bikemure ibyaha cyangwa gukemura amakimbirane cyane cyane mu iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko, umutekano w'ikoranabuhanga cyangwa iperereza ry'amategeko.

Imikorere yihariye yemewe n’inzego z’umutekano nk’igikorwa gishoboka ku kintu kuko ubwinjiriro buba bugengwa n’inzira y’inkoranabuhanga ishyiraho uburenganzira bwo gukoresha urwungano n’ibyo rukoresha: gusoma, kwandika, guhindura cyangwa gusiba amakuru cyangwa gukoresha inzira y’inkoranabuhanga hamwe n’ubundi buryo cyangwa ubushobozi.

Imiterere ya mudasobwa ubwayo n’ubundi buryo bukoreshwa mu kurinda umwimerere w’inyandiko kugira ngo itinjirwamo, itononekara cyangwa bwubahiriza ubundi buryo bwemewe muri rusange mu kurinda umutekano w’amakuru.
Uburyo bwemerera abantu kohereza no kwakira amafaranga bakoresheje telefoni ngendanwa.
Uburyo bwo guhuza amakuru mu nyakira ku buryo bw’umujyo w’amakuru nyandiko asakajwe.
Inzira y’ibikorwa byo kugaragaza no gukosora amakosa y’itangamakuru cyangwa ibikwa ry’amakuru bityo bigatuma bigira ubudakemwa n’ubwiringirwe.

Uburyo bwongerwa k’ubwari busanzweho cyangwa bukoreshwa bufatanyijwe n’umuyoboro cyangwa na serivisi by’itumanaho koranabuhanga kugira ngo izo serivisi cyangwa uwo muyoboro bishobore gukora cyangwa kugira ngo izindi serivisi zitangwa n’uwo muyoboro cyangwa iyo serivisi zishobore kugera ku baturage.

Igice cy’inkoranabuhanga gifite umumaro runaka gikora, nk’ubushobozi bwo kwandika no guhindura inyandiko, ubushobozi bwo kubika amakuru, ubushobozi bwo kugarura neza amakuru n’ubushobozi bwo gushyikirana n’umukiriya.

french_terms: Capacité du canal | débit de données maximal
definition_kin: Ubushobozi bw'umuyoboro C, busobanurwa nk'umuvuduko ntarengwa amakuru ashobora koherezwaho binyuze muri uwo muyoboro.

Ingano nini y’amakuru ari mu gipimo cya bayiti mu isogonda ashobora koherezwa mu ihuzanzira mu gihe gito kigenwe, ari mu gipimo cya bayiti mu isogonda cyangwa mu gikubo cyayo nka megabayiti mu isogonda cyangwa jigabayiti mu isogonda,

headword_kin: Ubushobozi bwo hasi ntarengwa bwo guhitisha videwo
pronunciation_kin: ubushobozi bwô haasî ntareengwâ bwô guhîtiisha videwo
definition_kin: Ikoranabuhanga rya murandasi ziri kure, uburyo bwo gufata amashusho ahanini bukoreshwa mu ngo za rubanda bitari ku rwego rw’insakazamashusho z’itangazamakuru.
Ubushobozi bw’urwungano koranabuhanga bwo gukora ibikorwa no gusesengura amakuru, kugaragaza intambwe yatewe, mu gihe runaka bigaragaza umuvuduko n’ubwiyongere bw’imikorere myiza mu bikorwa by’ikigo.

Ingano nyayo y’amakuru yashoboye kunyura neza muri sisitemu cyangwa mu muyoboro w’itumanaho akagera aho agenewe mu gihe runaka, ikaba ikunze gupimwa mu bipimo nka biti (bps), kilobiti (kbps) cyangwa megabiti (Mbps).
Urwunge rw’amakuru yimuwe agashyirwa mu bubiko ngo abungabungwe mu gihe kirekire kandi aikagenda atandukanywa kugira ngo agumane umwimerere cyangwa se agakurwa mu cyo yari abitsemo cy’ibanze.

Ibyoherejwe mu bubiko bw’ubutumwa koranabuhanga, uwandikiwe atabuhaye uruhushya rwo kwinjira, ahubwo yavogerewe, bukaba bwinjiye ku mayeri yo kuza mu ipaki yohererejwe abantu benshi icyarimwe, bushobora kuba burimo inkoranabuhanga ngome nka virusi cyangwa umunyorogoto koranabuhanga.
Ubutumwa bugufi bwo kumenyesha umukiriya ibyakozwe kuri konti ye.

synonym_kin: imeri (imêeri).
definition_kin: Uburyo bwihuse kandi bw’ako kanya bwo kohereza no kwakira ubutumwa bwanditse hagati y'abantu babiri. Ubutumwa koranabuhanga (ubutumwâ kôranabûhaânga)
Ubutumwa bwerekanwa na sisitemu runaka cyangwa ibishinzwe yerekana ko hari igikorwa runaka kimaze gukorwa.
Ikoranabuhanga ryo mu itumanaho ry’ako kanya hifashishijwe ijwi ry’uwohereza ubutumwa mu kohereza ubutumwa.
Amagambo ashyirwa munsi cyangwa ku ifoto, igishushanyo kuri filime ndetse n’ibindi.
Ikoreshwa ry’ikoranabuhanga mu gutanga serivisi z’ubuvuzi cyangwa ubuvuzi bukorerwa kure, aho abaganga n’abarwayi bashobora kuganira, gupimwa cyangwa kuvurwa batari ahantu hamwe.
Ikoranabuhanga ryifashishwa mu gusuzuma, kuvura

english_terms: Health and Safety | Safety and emergency
definition_kin: Ukureba cyane cyane uburyo bwo gukora ufite umutekano wuzuye kuri mudasobwa n’ibindi bijyana na yo.

Sisitemu z’ikoranabuhanga zishobora kwigana ubwenge bw’umuntu zigakora ibikorwa bikomeye ubusanzwe usanga ari umuntu wabishobora nko gutekereza, gushyira mu gaciro, gutahura ingero ngenderwaho, gufata ibyemezo, gusobanura amahurizo, imirimo izi sisitemu zikora ni nko gukora sisitemu mpuguke, kumenya ururimi rw’abantu (NLP), gutahura ijwi no kubona bikorerwa mu ruganda.
Sisitemu z’ubwenge buhangano zishobora kurema ibintu bishya nk’inyandiko, amafoto cyangwa umuziki, zishingiye ku kwiga amakuru menshi yari asanzweho.
Ikoranabuhanga ry’ubwenge buhangano rishyirwa mu gikoresho cyangwa muri sisitemu, bugakora nta murandasi.
Imikorere y’ubwenge buhangano iba iri hafi y’umuntu, ikamenya icyo ukeneye hashingiwe ku byo uri gukora, ikagufasha itakubangamiye.
Ukatagira umucyo cyangwa ukutabonerana ku ishusho mu nkoranabuhanga ishushanya.
Serivisi cyangwa umuntu ku giti cye utanga ubufasha n'amakuru, ubusanzwe ku bibazo by'ikoranabuhanga cyangwa ibya mudasobwa.
Ukuba ibikoresho bishobora gukorana ku muyoboro kandi bikanakorana ku bikoresho bituma umufatabuguzi agezwaho serivisi z’itumanaho.
Inzobere mu kazi ukorera mu rugo akoresheje itumanaho n’ikoranabuhanga.
Uwo uwateguye ubutumwa yifuza ko bugeraho.
Ibyifashishwa by’ibanze mu gupima ubwiza amashusho, amafoto na videwo koranabuhanga, utunyangingo twansi ???? dusobanura ko ifoto iba igaragara neza
Ubushobozi bwo hejuru bwerekana urwego rw'ibisobanuro birambuye n'ubusobanuro bw'ishusho, videwo cyangwa ekara.
Umuhanga mu gukora ibitangazamakuru by’amashusho n’amajwi, akora porogaramu za mudasobwa, ahuza ubuhanga mu gutegura porogaramu n’ubuhanzi buboneka mu mashusho n’ibindi bice byerekanwa.
Umuntu ukoresha sisitemu y’ikoranabuhanga bitandukanye n’ibice by’inyuma bya mudasobwa n’ibindi bitaboneshwa amaso.
Umuntu ukoresha inzungano koranabuhanga cyangwa inkoranabuhanga mu rwego, ni ukuvuga umuntu uwo ari we wese ushobora kugera kuri mudasobwa, ku nkoranabuhanga n’ihuzanzira mu mirimo y’ubunyamwuga.
Umuntu ukoresha cyangwa usaba gukoresha serivisi rusange z’ikoranabuhanga mu itangazabumenyi n’itumanaho.

Uburyo mbonera butegetswe ko buri hererekanya ry’amakuru runaka rigomba guhindura amakuru yakozweho gusa ku buryo buteganywa n’amategeko, amakuru yanditswe mu kigega agomba kuba yemejwe hakurikijwe amategeko yagenwe habariwemo agahato, itondeka ry’ibikoresho cyangwa ihuza ryabyo.
Uburyo ikigo gikoresha gihaha ibicuruzwa na serivisi cyifashishije ikoranabuhanga.
Kuba umuntu ashobora kubona amakuru ku buryo bwizewe ndetse no kugera ku zungano (sisitemu) bibaye ngombwa bigatuma imikorere n’imikoreshereze yabyo byorohera ababikoresha babifitiye uburenganzira.
Ishusho ya mudasobwa ifite urumuri ruhindagurika vuba ku muvuduko ugaragara bitewe n'umuvuduko muto wo kuvugurura amashusho cyangwa kwangirika kw'ibimenyetso.
Igikorwa gishushishije gikoresha ikurikirana ry’imigaragarire ya mpandeshatu (3 D) hafi y’amaso kugira ngo ukoresha iyi serivisi yumve yacubiye mu isi ishushisha.

synonym_kin: Ihagurutsa (ihâgurutsa); icana (icâana).
definition_kin: Inzira usanga urwungano cyangwa imbonezamikorere yakirizwa ikinjizwa mu mbikamakuru hifashishijwe imbonezamikorere nto kandi yoroshye, yifitemo ubushobozi bwo kwihagurutsa.
Akabazo ka
Kimwe mu bigize kwigiraho kwa mudasobwa gikoresha ihuzaturandaryi rikomeye mu kwigana ububasha mpitamo buhanitse bw’ubwonko bw’umuntu.
Uburyo mudasobwa ifite ubushobozi bwo kwigana ubuhanga n’imyitwarire y’abantu, bigakoreshwa mu gukora imirirmo igoye mu buryo busa n’ubwo abantu babikoramo.
Uburyo bwo kwimura uburyo busanzwe bwo gusakaza radiyo na televiziyo bugasimbuzwa uburyo bushya bugezweho bwo gusakaza amakuru n’amashusho.
Ukugaruka kw’ibintu bisa cyangwa kw’inzungano za ngombwa kugira ngo habungwabungwe imikorere no kugabanya icikagurika kw’itangamakuru mu gihe habaye gupfa k ‘urwungano.

english_terms: Digital identification | Digital ID | Security identification
definition_kin: Uburyo sisitemu ya mudasobwa yifashisha mu gutandukanya amakuru yinjiza, ayo makuru ashobora kuba yerekeye ku muntu, ikigo cyangwa urubuga runaka.
Umubare ukoreshwa nka nomero ya SDID utangwa mu buryo bwa tombora, wihariye kandi ufitanye isano na nomero ya SDID.
Umubare wongerwa mu nyandiko yatanzwe hagamijwe gukosora amakosa.

Imvugo yo mu mibare ihagarariye umubare udafite ibice, ikaba ikoreshwa cyane mu rurimi nyamudasobwa, ukarangwa no kutagira akitso cyangwa umugabane, urugero ni nk’imyanya koranabuhanga ya 32 cyangwa 64.
Izinandanga rya porogaramu ya mudasobwa rihabwa porogaramu ya mudasobwa ikorwa n’ikigo cya Mikorosofuti.
Ugenzura urubuga rukorera kuri murandasi.
Umuntu ukora ubucuruzi ku bantu bari kure akoresheje ikoranabuhanga.
Umuntu ufitanye amasezerano n’utanga serivisi z’itumanaho rusange rikoresha ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ahabwe izo serivisi.
Umuntu ukora umwuga wo gufata amafoto akoresheje imfatafoto ari na yo bita kamera, akayatunganya akanayasohora byaba ari mu buryo bw’impapuro cyangwa bwa dijitari.
Ushinzwe guteza imbere ikigo ku buryo bwagutse akoresheje itumanaho.

Umufatabuguzi wifitiye ibikoresho bituma abona serivisi zitangwa n’umuyoboro w’itumanaho koranabuhanga ariko udatanga imiyoboro y’itumanaho rusange cyangwa udaha abantu serivisi z’itumanaho koranabuhanga.

english_terms: Mail transfer agent (MTA) | message transfer agent | mail relay
french_terms: Agent de transfert de courrier | agent de transfert de messages (MTA) | relais de courrier
definition_kin: Porogaramu ya mudasobwa igenga uburyo ubutumwa bwa imeri busakazwa ku ihuzanzira.
Umuntu usaba, ukusanya, uhuza, ucunga cyangwa ubika amakuru ya nyir’ubwite hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga.
Umugozi uhuza intima (CPU) n’indebero ufite utwinyo twinshi.

english_terms: Power cable | power cord | AC cord | mains cable
definition_kin: Ubwoko bw’umugozi w’amashanyarazi ugaburira amashanyarazi ibyuma biyakoresha uyakuye mu rucomekero rw’amashanyarazi (mu rukuta), imigozi ya USB ishobora gukoreshwa nk’umugozi w’amashanyarazi cyangwa umugozi ngaburamakuru.

Umunyamwuga w’iyamamaza ukora akazi ko gukora inkuru ku mbuga nkoranyambaga cyangwa se inkuru z’abamamaza, agahanga indemo koranabuhanga cyangwa se asanzwe yandika inyandiko zidatinda z’iyamamaza, amashusho, ikwirakwiza ry’amajwi, n’itangazwabintu ku mbuga nkoranyambaga.

Umuntu ugenzura itsinda rya mudasobwa cyangwa ibikoresho byanduye kandi akabikoresha mu kugaba ibitero kuri murandasi, kohereza ubutumwa budakenewe, kwiba amakuru cyangwa gukora ibindi bikorwa bitemewe kuri murandasi.

Igice cya mbere mudasobwa icamo ihaguruka mu kwaka kigizwe n’urukurikirane rw’ibikorwa mudasobwa ikora mu kwitegura gukoreshwa harimo gukangura ibikoresho, igashyira umuriro mu rwungano nyoboramikorere, igategura mudasobwa gukorana n’uyikoresha, bifatwa nk’ibikorwa bya buri munsi byayo mu kwaka.

Umukino utuma umuntu akorana na mudasobwa cyangwa ibindi bikoresho by’ikoranabuhanga nk’urukiniro, telefoni igezweho (simatifoni) biri kuri murandasi biciye mu ihuzanzira rya hafi cyangwa hadakoreshejwe murandasi.
Ijambo ryagutse ku bikorwa byose by' ikoranabuhanga byerekana ko yemeye amasezerano cyangwa inyandiko.
Umurimo cyangwa igikorwa cy’umwihariko gishyirwa mu ngiro hifashishijwe inzungano koranabuhanga n’ikoranabuhanga nyunganizi.

Icyubakwa kirekire cyane, cyubakishijwe ibyuma, akenshi gisize amabara y'umweru n'umutuku gishinzwe gufata ubutumwa bw'igikoresho k'itumanaho kiri hafi kikabwohereza ku kindi gikoresho kiri ahandi hantu kure.

french_terms: Tour de téléphonie cellulaire | site cellulaire
definition_kin: Ahantu hubatse ibikoresho by’itumanaho bikoresha amashanyarazi n’anteni bituma hafi aho abantu bakoresha ibyuma by’itumanaho nziramugozi nka telefoni na radiyo.
Inyubako ishyirwaho anteni n’ibindi bikoresho by’itumanaho nziramugozi usanga ari ingenzi mu gutanga serivisi z’itumanaho nziramugozi zizewe kandi rusange.
Ikimenyetso koranabuhanga kijyana amakuru, akenshi haba havugwa umuraba wa radiyo kuko utangiza umubiri w’umuntu, bityo ukaba ari wo mwiza mu itumanaho.
Urugero rw’igerageza rwiza rukoreshwa kugira ngo bamenye ku buryo bwihuse igisubizo nyamiraba cy’urwungano rw’amashusho, ikaba ari imisuzumire y’imiyoboro y’insakazamajwi cyangwa televiziyo.

french_terms: Signal en bande de base | bande de base
definition_kin: Ikimenyetso cy’umwimerere cyo kohereza amakuru kitarahindurwa cyangwa ngo gicibwe ku murongo wacyo wa mbere.

Igikorwa cy’inkoranabuhanga gikubiyemo kode yacyo, amakuru yacyo, n’ibyifashishwa by’urwungano bikigenewe, ni inkoranabuhanga iri mu gikorwa, igacungwa n’urwungano nyoboramikorere mu guhindura amakuru yinjijwe ataboneye ngo azasohokee akoreshwa.

french_terms: Interface en ligne de commande | ligne de commande
definition_kin: Uruganiriro rukoresha inyandiko rugatuma ukoresha mudasobwa ashobora gukorana n’urwungano nyoboramikorere cyangwa inkoranabuhanga za mudasobwa hakoreshejwe amategeko yayo.
Nomero y’umurongo wa terefone yakirwaho ubufasha buri kure ariko bushobora guhita bukoreshwa.
Itumanaho rya radiyo usanga ritarenga muri metero 60.
Umuryango mugari w’abantu batumanaho bifashishije ikoranabuhanga.
Iterambere rirangwamo ubushobozi kuri buri wese bwo gukora, kugera, gukoresha no gusangira n’abandi amakuru n’ubumenyi kugira ngo bagere ku iterambere rirambye kandi bihindure n’ubuzima bwabo.
Umuryango mpuzamahanga washinzwe kugira ngo uhuze ibihugu mu guteza imbere ikoranabuhanga, gusangira ubumenyi no guteza imbere ubukungu bushingiye ku ikoranabuhanga.
Umuntu wese uba mu bikorwa byo gushakisha uburyo yacengera mu buryo butemewe muri sisitemu za mudasobwa yifashishije murandasi, agashobora kurenga uburinzi bwazo.
Umuntu ushyira ubutumwa butera amakimbirane cyangwa uburakari ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, agamije kubangamira abandi.

Uburyo bugezweho bwo gutahura no kwemeza ikintu hakoreshejwe ibimenyetso by’umubiri byihariye nk’ibimenyetso by’intoki (igikumwe), itahurasura, imbengeza y’ijisho, indiba y’ijisho, kugira ngo hatahurwe umuntu uwo ari we.
Ibikorwa n’ingamba zifashishwa mu kurinda no gukumira ibitero n’ubujura bukorerwa kuri murandasi.
Icyitegererezo cy’umutekano gishingiye ku ihame ryo gukomeza kugenzura neza uburyo abantu binjiramo no kutagira uwo bizera, ndetse n’abari mu gice cy’umuyoboro w’itumanaho.
Uburyo bwo kurinda amakuru koranabuhanga mu gihe cyose azamara kugira ngo arindwe kwangirika, kwibwa cyangwa ikindi gikorwa kidafitiwe uburenganzira.

Kurinda ibikoresho biri ku mpera y’ihuzanzira cyangwa urwinjiro rw’ibikoresho by’abakoresha ihuzanzira ba nyuma twavuga nka za mudasobwa zo mu biro, mudasobwa ngendanwa, hahashywa abiba ihuzanzira cyangwa inyigisho zigamije ikibi, ibikoresho bishobora kurindwa biri ku ihuzanzira cyangwa mu gicu huzanzira, babirinda ibitero bivuye kuri murandasi havumburwa inkoranabuhanga iyo ari yo yose yaba igamije kwangiza ibikoresho.

Politiki zashyizwe mu bikorwa mu kurinda no gukurikirana abinjirira ihuzanzira batabyemerewe, abarikoresha nabi, abarihindura cyangwa abazibira mudasobwa gufata ihuzanzira, akaba rero ari ugukumira abavogera ihuzanzira bakarinda ibikoresho bigize umuyoboro w’ihuzanzira hagenzurwa uburyo bwo kwinjira, bagakumira amavirusi bakoresha inkoranabuhanga nkumiramavirusi, inkoranabuhanga zicunga umutekano n’ubundi bwoko bw’ihuzanzira rifite isano no kurinda umutekano, twavuga nk’ibikoresho byo ku mpera y’ihuzanzira, urubuga, inziramugozi, indindamudasobwa, ihuzanzira si shusho ryigenga, n’ibindi.

french_terms: Protection par mot de passe | sécurité du mot de passe
definition_kin: Sisitemu runaka yagenewe gusaba ugiye gukoresha mudasobwa kubanza gushyiramo ijambo banga mbere yo kuyikoresha.

Uburyo bwo kurinda amakuru abitse mu gikoresho ngendanwa yaba ari amakuru bwite, nk’amafoto, ubutumwa, n’amakuru agomba kwitonderwa nk’ibiranga amabanki cyangwa amagambo banga, ibirindwa rero ibitero bivuye kuri murandasi (gusiba amakuru, kwiba amagambo banga, kwangiza amakonti), ni telefoni zigezweho, irebero mudasobwa, na mudasobwa ngendanwa.

Igikorwa cyo mu iyubakwa ry’inkoranabuhanga cyangwa kuzongera mu ihuzanzira ndetse no kuzigenzura imikorere hagamijwe kwirinda ko zagira imibare yuzuye (idafite ibice) mike mu byerekeye umutekano zirwanya ibitero, twavuga nko kwinjira no guhindura amagambo banga nta ruhushya.
Urwunge rw’amategeko y’imikorere n’ikoranabuhanga byakorewe gutanga igisubizo ku byahungabanya umutekano byo hanze cyangwa imbere bishobora kuboneka ku mutekano w’ikigo.
Ingamba z’ubwirizi za nyuma zibanda ku kurinda no guha ibikoresho abakoresha ibikoresho by’umuryango, inkoranabuhanga hamwe n’amakuru.

english_terms: Computer security | Computational Security | cyber security | digital security | information technology security
definition_kin: Ingamba n'ubugenzuzi byemeza ibanga, ubunyangamugayo no kuboneka kw’amakuru yatunganijwe kandi abikwa na mudasobwa.
Ijambo ry’ingenzi risobanura ibikoresho n’ingamba birinda ibikoresho bihujwe n’ibicu n’imiyoboro bikoresha kugira ngo bihuzwe.
Igikorwa cyo kurinda cyangwa gukumira ikoreshwa ry'amakuru ritemewe, cyane cyane amakuru y'ikoranabuhanga cyangwa ingamba zifatwa kugira ngo ibyo bigerweho.
Uburyo bwo gukora cyangwa guhuza ibikorwa by’ingenzi by’akazi nko kubungabunga, kugena n’ibindi.
Inyandiko ishyirwa hejuru y'urupapuro, mu gihe agace k'inyuma gashyirwa hasi.

english_terms: Network head device | head end device | output layer | head node
definition_kin: Igikoresho gihuza imiyoboro, gituma haba ihererekanya rinoze ry’amakuru hagati yayo.

Igipimo cy’amakuru ku rugero ruto rushoboka atambuka mu gihe cy’isogonda, akaba ari umuvuduko amakuru asesengurirwaho, akoherezwa cyangwa agahindurwa mu rurimi rwa mudasobwa ku gihe runaka gipimwa mu mabayiti ku isogonda, yaba ari amakuru y’amajwi, ay’amashusho, ay’imibare cyangwa ay’inyandiko, uko umuvuduko ari mwinshi ni ko n’amakuru aba ku gipimo kiza.
Imiterere y’imbeba zimwe na zimwe za mudasobwa usanga umuvuduko wazo uhinduka bitewe n’uri kuyikoresha, uburyo ari kwihutamo bitandukanye n’aho yaba iherereye.
Umuvuduko isaha ishobora gukoresha mu kubara.
Inzira ya za sinyare ikoreshwa mu gutwara amakuru ava hamwe ajya ahandi.
Uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru anyuze mu yandi masano y'itumanaho bigafasha gukoresha inzira zizewe cyangwa kurinda amakuru anyura mu muyoboro.

Ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho hagati ya mudasobwa ziri kure ahanini zikoresha telefoni isanzwe, usanga ari ihuzanzira rigamije kohereza amakuru ahantu harehare akenshi harenze km 1000, akaba ari uruti rw’umugongo rw’itumanaho ruhuza imigi minini, ibihugu cyangwa imigabane, rikaba ritwara amakuru menshi harimo amajwi, amashusho n’amakuru asanzwe.

english_terms: Local area network (LAN) | Ethernet local area network
french_terms: Réseau local d’internet | adaptateur de réseau local
definition_kin: Murandasi usanga ihuza za mudasobwa ziri aho hafi kandi hamwe nko mu nzu imwe, inyubako imwe, ibiro, ishuri, raboratwari, ikigo cya kaminuza cyangwa inzu ikoraniyemo ibiro.
Urusobe rwuzuye rw’itumanaho rushyira hamwe ibikoresho bisangiye umuyoboro.
Umuyoboro washyizweho igihe kimwe kandi ntusaba rawuta cyangwa sitasiyo y’ibanze idakoresha insinga.
Umuyoboro w’itumanaho wubatswe ku mpamvu z’umutekano rusange, ukoreshwa mu rwego rw’ubutabazi cyangwa mu kurwana ku baturage.

synonym_kin: Ingiramugozi (ingîramûgozî); ihuzanzira ngiramugozi (ihuuzanzira nyamûgozî); umuyoboro ntayega (umuyoboro ntayegâ); ihuzanzira ryo mu butaka (ihuuzanzira ryô mu butaka); umuyoboro wo mu butaka (umuyoboro wô mu butaka); urusinga rwo mu butaka (urusiînga rwô mu butaka).
english_terms: Wired network | Fixed network | Landline Network | Landline
definition_kin: Umuyoboro uhuza ibikoresho nka mudasobwa ngendanwa cyangwa zo mu biro, murandasi cyangwa irindi huzanzira hakoreshejwe insinga, haba ari uguhamagara cyangwa se kohererezanya amakuru igihe bakoresha ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa ryabugenewe.

synonym_kin: Impuzanzira ya munyaruko (impuuzanzira ya mûnyaruko); umuyoboro munyaruko (umuyoboro munyâruko).
definition_kin: Imbonezanzira yohereza amakuru inyaruka kuri murandasi ku buryo bw’insakazamakuru nyuramugozi yakorewe ihuzanzira ribika amakuru ryakorewe guhuza amatsinda y’amakuru hagati y’ibikoresho nkoranabuhanga mbikamakuru na mugabuzi ku buryo buboneye kandi haciyemo igihe gito.
Igice cy’ihuzanzira ryagutse,
Imiyoboro igenewe kugeza ku baturage itumanaho rigendanwa n’iritagendanwa.
Uburyo bukoresha insinga z’amashanyarazi mu gutanga ibimenyetso, imiyoboro ya radiyo na televiziyo, hatitawe ku bwoko bw’amakuru bitwaye.

english_terms: Broadband | High speed network | Broadband communication device
french_terms: Internet à haut debit | Appareil de communication à large bande
definition_kin: Sisitemu yemerera igikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga kuba cyakohereza ubutumwa bwinshi kandi icyarimwe mu gihe gikoresha murandasi, iri itumanaho rigira umuvuduko w’ihuzanzira urengeje megabayiti 25 ku isogonda.

Umuyoboro wagutse wa WAN wakira abakoresha mudasobwa ndetse n’ibyifashishwa ugatuma bashobora guhana amakuru biciye mu ikoranabuhanga ry’igicu mpuzanzira, ukabarirwamo intanganzira shusho, indindamudasobwa n’inkoranabuhanga ncungahuzanzira.

synonym_kin: ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho (ihuuzanzira ry’îitûmanahô) ; ihuzanzira ry’itumanaho (ihuuzanzira ry’îitûmanahô).
french_terms: Réseau de télécommunicatio | réseau de communication électronique
definition_kin: Uburyo nyoherezabutumwa butuma haba ihererekanya ry’amakuru ku buryo bw’analoge cyangwa nyamibare ahantu hatandukanye hakoreshejwe ibimenyetso cyangwa urumuri hakoherezwa amakuru y’amajwi cyangwa amashusho.
Umuyoboro rusange w’itumanaho ukoreshwa mbere na mbere mu guhitisha cyangwa mu gutanga porogaramu za radiyo na televiziyo.
Umuyoboro w'itumanaho ufite ubushobozi bwo kohereza ubutumwa mu buryo butaziguye hagati y'ibikoresho by’itumanaho.

Insinga zifashishwa mu gukwirakwiza itumanaho rya murandasi zinyujijwe mu butaka akaba ari urwungano rw’itumanaho runyaruka rukoresha umugozi munyaruko mu kohereza amakuru mu ihuzanzira ritandukanye ryo ku isi, hifashishijwe guhindura imiraba y’amashanyarazi igenda mu makamba y’imiyoboro minyaruko hatakajwe utuntu duke kandi ku musaruro wo mu rwego rwo hejuru.

Ikoreshwa ry’ikoranabuhanga mu ikoranabuhanga ry’amakuru mu guhanga, gufata amajwi, gutunganya, kubika, gusakaza no kumva umuziki hifashishijwe mudasobwa, porogaramu n’ibikoresho koranabuhanga. Umuzindaro (umuziindaaro) Loud speaker; multimedia speaker.
Igikoresho gifatira ihuzanzira kuri sisitemu y’ikoranabuhanga ikoreshwa mu gutanga amajwi.
Utanga serivisi zo kwandika amazina ndangarubuga mu cyiciro yaherewe uburenganzira bwo gucunga n’umwanditsi fatizo.
Igikoresho gito gikoresha ububiko burimo ububiko bwa mudasobwa kandi kiboneka hakoreshejwe porogaramu.
Aho uwandikisha mudasobwa ashyira amakuru iyo yandika muri mudasobwa.
Umurongo munini ugaragara hejuru ya porogaramu ugizwe n’utundi duce n’ibikoresho bifasha gukora imirimo itandukanye.
Umurongo muto ukozwe n’utumenyetso ndanga, akenshi uba hasi ku irebero rya mudasobwa, ukagaragaza amadirishya cyangwa gahunda zifunguye ushobora gukoresha.

english_terms: Memo field | data field | memo data type
french_terms: Champ de données | champ de mémos
definition_kin: Agace mu mbikamakuru cyangwa mu idirishya rya mudasobwa kaba muri porogaramu iyo ari yo yose ifasha abari gukoresha mudasobwa gutanga ibitekerezo byabo ku byanditswe.

Igihe umuntu adashobora gutanga amakuru y’ibipimo ndangamiterere y’umuntu yuzuye cyangwa iyo amakuru yuzuye ariko akaba atujuje ikigero shingiro ngenderwaho, ayo makuru akaba yandikwa muri sisitemu ya SDID.
Umwirondoro ukoreshwa ku mbuga za murandasi mu kubona serivisi.
Uburyo umwishingizi yifashisha ikoranabuhanga agatanga ifatabuguzi kandi akagenzura amasezerano bitumye ajya ku cyicaro cy’ubwishingizi.
Umuntu uzi kandi wandika indimi za porogaramu kugira ngo ategeke mudasobwa gukora imirimo yihariye.
Urutonde rw’ibikorwa bitandukanye bigaragarira hejuru cyangwa hasi ku kirahure cya mudasobwa mu buryo butambitse.

Ikintu gikoreshwa mu gukoresha amashusho, gikoreshwa muri porogaramu za mudasobwa n'imbuga za murandasi kugira ngo kibashe gusohorera ibikubiye mu nyandiko birenga igice kigaragara cy'idirishya cyangwa ikintu gikodeshwa.
Igikoresho cy’igenzura ry’amashusho gikoreshwa hagamijwe kureba imigendekere y’igikorwa koranabuhanga kirambuye, twavuga nk’ikurura ry’ifishi, iyoherezwa ryaryo cyangwa ishyirwamo ryayo.
Idirishya rigaragaza umurongo w’amategeko abakoresha mudasobwa bifashisha batoranya amahitamo bashaka cyangwa batanga amategeko cyangwa babona amakuru bifuza bafunguye gahunda runaka.
Idirishya risa n’iry’urubariro rw’ibikorwa bya Windows.

english_terms: Toolbar | standard toolbar | system toolbar | bar
definition_kin: Igikoresho cy’igenzuramikorere hifashishijwe utumenyetso ndanga, gituma ukoresha mudasobwa ashobora kuvugana na yo, kikaba akenshi haruguru h’irebero.
Urwunge rw’amahitamo yerekwa ukoresha inkoranabuhanga kugira ngo afashwe kubona amakuru cyangwa gukora igikorwa runaka.
Umwihariko wa sisitemu y'imikorere ya Windows, yagenewe guha abakinnyi uburyo bworoshye bwo gucunga ubunararibonye bwabo mu mikino mu gihe ibafasha gukora ibikorwa bitandukanye.

Urubibi rurinzwe ruba hagati y’ahihariye hatari rusange hagenzurwa n’ihuzanzira rya hafi, akenshi ni ihuzanzira ry’ikigo n’uruhande rugenewe abantu muri rusange akenshi aba ari murandasi, rukagirwa n’intanganzira ngenarubibi zikora nk’ibyapa ngaragazanzira mu ihuzanzira.
Umuzenguruko uboneka ku buso bw’ishusho, ukagaragaza ihinduka ry’ingirangingo foto z’ikintu zikagitandukanya n’ikindi. Urubuga 2.0 (urubûga 2.0).
Ahantu kuri murandasi hahora havugururwa hashyirwaho inkuru nshya, akenshi mu buryo bw'inyandiko zisanzwe.
Uburyo bwohereza umuyoboro w’ihuzanzira ku yandi mahuriro.

Ikoranabuhanga ryashyizweho ku buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga, abantu baganiriraho mu buryo bw'amajwi ndetse n'ubutumwa bugufi bwanditse, bityo bagashobora kohererezanyaho amashusho n'amafoto, bikaba uruhurirane rw’imbuga na porogaramu zigamije koroshya ubusabane n’ibiganiro hagati y’abantu, inshuti, imiryango.
Urubuga rwo kuri murandasi rufasha abantu guhanahana amakuru cyangwa serivisi.
Urubuga rwa mudasobwa rwo guhanahana amakuru ajyanye n’igice runaka cy’ibikorwa by’ubukungu.
Porogaramu yakozwe na “Mikorosofuti” kuri “Windowuzi 10” yemerera abakoresha kubona ibikubiye mu kuri kuvanze hamwe n’udukandara dukwiriye.

Urubuga nkoranyambaga mpererekanyamakuru rwifashisha murandasi mu gutanga ubutumwa (amakuru magufi) haba mu nyandiko, mu mafoto cyangwa mu tuvidewo, rugatangirwaho amakuru mu buryo umuntu ashobora kugira icyo ayavugaho.
Urubuga nkoranyambaga

Urubuga nkoranyambaga rwifashisha murandasi rwatangiye mu wa 2010 rwakorewe abantu ngo bazajye baruganiriraho ngo banashyireho amafoto n’amashusho (amavidewo) ku buryo arebwa n’abaruhuriyemo, ariko na bo bakaba bashobora kureba ay’abandi bashyiraho. Urukoresha aba ashobora guhindura ibyo ashyiraho, kongeramo ibindi, kuganira n’inshuti cyangwa kugirana ubucuti bushingiye ku gutanga ibitekerezo ku byo ashyiraho cyangwa bakagaragaza ko byabanyuze.

Urwaguriro rwa murandasi rufite izindi mbuga muri rwo zishinzwe gukora ibintu bitandukanye cyangwa se ni uruhurirane rw’amafishiye agerwaho uciye ku ndangarubuga rukibanda ku ntego cyangwa ikintu kimwe kandi rugacungwa n’umuntu cyangwa ikigo cyahariye, kikarangwa no kugira urwakiriro rwitwa ahabanza.

synonym_kin: Urubuga mpuza (urubûga mpuuzâ); urubuga koranabuhanga (urubûga kôranabûhaânga).
definition_kin: Ikoraniro ry’ikoranabuhanga ryakozwe ku buryo bw’ibigenderwaho byasangijwe bose by’ikigo cy’insomanyandiko za murandasi n’ibindi bigo by’imboneza koranabuhanga, bitanga uruhurirane rw’ibikoresho na serivisi hagamijwe guhanga, gucunga no guteza imbere inkoranabuhanga za murandasi n’izi’imbuga za murandasi.
Urubuga nkoranyambaga abantu bifashisha bagakora, bakareba cyangwa bakanashyiraho utuvidewo tugufi, tukaba dushobora kurebwa n’abarukoresha bifashishije terefoni cyangwa kuri murandasi.
Urubuga nkoranyambaga rwifashisha murandasi, rufasha abantu kuganira bohererezanya ubutumwa bwaba ubwanditse, ubw’amajwi, ubw’amafoto n’amashusho ako kanya.

Urubuga rwa murandasi rwa kimwe mu bigo bikomeye, ikaba imwe mu nshakishamakuru bwite zikomeye kuri murandasi, intondekamapaji ya murandasi hakurikijwe ingeri z’ibivugwa n’izindi serivisi z’imbuga bijyana nk’ubutumwa koranabuhanga, amakuru agezweho, iteganyagihe n’ibindi.
Urubuga rwa mbere ku isi rusangiza abantu amashusho (videwo), akaba ari uwa Google, abantu bakaba bareba amashusho y’abandi ku buntu, bakayakurura bakanayasangiza abandi ku buntu.
Ahantu bigaragara ko abahari babasha gukoresha ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa byinshi bitandukanye, nka telefoni, mudasobwa, ibyuma bijyana amakuru n’itumanaho n’ibindi byinshi.
Isoke cyangwa agace gateye kuri mudasobwa, kifashishwa mu kohereza.
Inzira iboneka kuri za mudasobwa n’ibikoresho bimwe na bimwe bifitanye isano na mudasobwa, igatuma habaho guhuza ibikoresho bikoreshwa mu kugenzura imikino ya videwo nk’agakoresho nyobozi.
Igikoresho cy’ihuzanzira cyohereza kikanakira amakuru ahantu hafi nta mugozi, kikaba gihuza ihuzanzira nziramugozi rya hafi n’ihuzanzira ngiramugozi ntayega.
Akabuto kaba kuri mwandikisho gakoreshwa mu kwinjiza inyuguti, imibare cyangwa amabwiriza muri mudasobwa cyangwa ikindi gikoresho cy’ikoranabuhanga.
Urusobe rw’inyuguti cyangwa ibimenyetso biguha uburenganzira bwo kwinjira muri mudasobwa no kuyikoresha.
Urufunguzo rwihariye n’urufunguzo rusange rugenzura umukono ukozwe mu buryo koranabuhanga wakozwe n’urufunguzo rwihariye.
Ikintu gihagararira ko umuntu afite uburenganzira bwo gukora igikorwa runaka.
Urufunguzo rumwe rukoreshwa mu kugenzura umukono w’ikoranabuhanga ukozwe mu mibare.
Urufunguzo rumwe rwagenewe gukora umukono koranabuhanga ukozwe mu mibare.
Ahantu umufatabuguzi ashobora gufatira inzira imuhuza n'umuyoboro rusange.
Imiyoboro y’ubwenge buhangano igufasha gukorana n'ikoranabuhanga ry’ubwenge buhangano kugira ngo ukore cyangwa ugere ku nshingano.

french_terms: Interface | Interface homme- machine (IHM) | Interface utilisateur
definition_kin: Inkoranabuhanga itanga serivisi ituma bakenera serivisi y’inkoranabuhanga, kwinjira mu ihuzanzira no gukoresha inkoranabuhanga z’igicu nkoranabuhanga, izo serivisi ni nko kohererezanya ubutumwa bugufi, kureba indangamisi, Mikorosofuti Ofisi 365.

Ikigerwaho gihindagurika hakoreshejwe imbonezamibare (itsinda ry’amategeko adahinduka) ku makuru yihariye, hakaba habaho amoko atatu y’ingero zigirwaho: itondeka nyabubiri, itonde ry’ibirango n’isubiranyuma.
Ubwoko bw’ububiko usanga kode n’amakuru bishobora kurenga kilobayiti 64 gusa byahurizwa hamwe ntibirenge megabayiti 1.
Inyandiko iteguye nk'ibaruwa
Imikorere ishoboza mudasobwa ko abayikoresha bemejwe neza bashora kugera gusa ku bikorwa nyirayo yabahereye uruhushya gusa.
Impushya z’ubucuruzi ziza mu buryo butandukanye, buri wese ufite amategeko n'amabwiriza yashyizweho n’uwamamaza inkoranabuhanga cyangwa uwateza imbere.
Abasura urubuga rwa murandasi, bukaba ari uburyo bwo gupima ireme ry’ubucuruzi bwo kuri murandasi no gukurura abasura.
Igiteranyo cy’amakuru nk’ubutumwa na za sinyare anyura muri sisiteme y’itumanaho cyangwa ikoranabuhanga runaka.
Urukurikirane rw’ibinyabumwe by’ururimi rwa mudasobwa, uburebure bw’urukurikirane bungana n’umubare w’ibinyabumwe nyarurimi mu cyiciro.

Igikoresho gitoroniki cyakozwe mbere kigenewe gushyirwa ahantu kitayezwa mu rugo cyangwa ahandi, kigacomekwa ku irebero nk’irya televiziyo cyangwa mudasobwa, kikanacomekwa ku muriro hakoreshejwe umugozi, kikaba gikinwaho imikino y’amashusho hakoreshejwe ingenzuzi imwe cyangwa nyinshi z’imikino y’amashusho.
Urukurikirane rw’imyanya nyantera ikoreshwa kugira ngo ishyirwemo amakuru nk’amashusho, amajwi n’ibindi byo mu itangazamakuru.

domain: Ikoranabuhanga rya mudasobwa. (Biotechnology, imaging ikoreshwa kwa mugaganga).
definition_kin: Urumuri rwihariye ngaragazashusho ritabonwa n’amaso rutangwa n’igikoresho cya lazeri.

french_terms: Langage formel | syntaxe interprétable par machine
definition_kin: Uruhurirane rw’urukurikirane rw’ibimenyetso bisobanuwe n’amategeko cyangwa ikibonezamvugo cyihariye, rukoreshwa mu kuranga imyubakire n’insobanuro z’indimi z’ibonezamikorere, z’imbonezanzira z’itumanaho n’izindi sisitemu z’ikoranabuhanga.
Ururimi rukoreshwa mu gusobanura imiterere y’ibikorwa mu mikoreshereze ya mudasobwa mu buryo bunoze kandi busobanutse.

english_terms: Beginner's All-purpose Symbolic Instruction Code (BASIC) | BASIC programming language
french_terms: Code d'instruction symbolique polyvalent pour débutant
definition_kin: Umuryango w'indimi zo ku rwego rwo hejuru kandi zikoreshwa muri rusange zagenewe koroshya ikoreshwa rya mudasobwa ku batangizi.

Ikinyabumwe mbumbe cy’ururimi rwa mudasobwa kiba gitegereje gukoreshwa mu kubaka gahunda ya mudasobwa, kikaba gikomoka ku ifishi imwe cyangwa menshi kikabamo amabwiriza y’imashini, amakuru n’inyobozi y’amakuru biba ari ngombwa kugira ngo mudasobwa ikoreshwe.

french_terms: Module de mémoire double en ligne
definition_kin: Ubwoko bw’imbikamakuru koranabuhanga bwabanjije kuba bufite imibare nyabubiri 64, bugatuma haba iyoherezamakuru ryihuse, bugakoreshwa muri mudasobwa zo mu biro, izigendanwa n’impuzamakuru, ikarangwa no kugira inzira nkoranabuhanga z’imbikamakuru nyinshi ku ikarita y’intwaramakuru.
Ururimi bwite mudasobwa ikoresha ruhuriweho n’amabwiriza itanga ku buryo porogaramu zayo zikora ku buryo burambye.
Ururimi rukomeye kandi rufite ubushobozi bwo gukoresha porogaramu, ruzwiho imikorere n'uburyo bworoshye bwo guhindura ibintu.
Ikintu remezo cyubaka gahunda koranabuhanga cyahanzwe n’umugenarurimi rwa mudasobwa.

Umuyoboro ucishwamo ibikoresho by’urusobe bikoreshwa mu guhuza igikoresho kimwe cy’urusobe n’ibindi bikoresho by’urusobe cyangwa guhuza mudasobwa ebyiri cyangwa nyinshi kugira ngo zisangire ibikoresho nk’incapanyandiko cyangwa imfotorashusho nyandiko.

Uruhurirane rw’abantu, ibigo n’inzungano bikoresha ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo bikorane, bigaca mu nzira eshatu: urusobe rw’ishyira mu ikoranabuhanga, urusobe rw’imbuga n’urusobe rw’impuzambuga, ibyo byose bihurira ku ishyirabintu mu ikoranabuhanga hifashishijwe gukorana n’abafatanyabikorwa b’abacuruzi, ariko hanagamijwe icungwa ryabyo ryoroshye.
Uburyo bwo kubika amakuru mu buryo bwizewe kandi butavogerwa.

Ubushobozi bwa mudasobwa cyangwa igikoresho runaka bwo kwihuza n’urusobe rutanga uburyo bwo kugera kuri murandasi, bigatuma uyikoresha ashobora kureba imbuga, kohereza no kwakira ubutumwa bwa imeri, no gukoresha serivisi zo kuri murandasi.
Uburyo bw’ikoranabuhanga bukoresha urusobe rw’intangamakuru: inyandiko, amakuru, amashusho, amajwi, hamwe na videwo yerekana amashusho.

Ikoraniro rya mudasobwa zisangiye ibyangombwa bitangwa n’ipfundo huzanzira, ibyo byangombwa bikaba bigizwe n’ibikoresho n’inkoranabuhanga bituma hashobora gushyirwaho ihuzanzira, icy’ingenzi akaba ari intanganzira.
Urwunge rwa za mudasobwa zandujwe n’inkoranabuhanga y’ingome kandi zigenzurwa n’imwe yazigabyeho.

english_terms: Network backbone | backbone network | backbone | core network
french_terms: Réseau fédérateur | réseau central | cœur de réseau
definition_kin: Igice cy’ihuzanzira koranabuhanga gihuza ihuzanzira ritandukanye, kigatanga umuyoboro wo guhererekanya amakuru hagati y’ihuzanzira za hafi cyangwa ihuzanzira rito, kigahuza ihuzanzira ryo mu nyubako imwe, amazu atandukanye ya kaminuza cyangwa se ahantu hanini, gifite imbaraga zo guhuza uturere dutandukanye, inzu z’amakuru na murandasi ndetse na serivisi z’ububiko bw’iyakure.

english_terms: Backbone network | Network backbone | backbone | core network
definition_kin: Igice gikuru cya mudasobwa gihuza imiyoboro itandukanye, kigatanga uburyo bwo guhererekanya amakuru biciye mu mpuzanzira zoroshye nka LAN na WAN ndetse n’iziri nto kuri zo.
Urutonde rukubiyemo ibicuruzwa biri ku isoko byo mu bigo bitandukanye.
Urutonde usangamo amakuru abitswe ku mafishi muri mudasobwa ku byakozwe n’uyikoresha.
Porogaramu rusange yakozwe na Mikorosofuti.
Igikoresho cyo kwinjizamo kigufasha kwinjiza
Porogaramu yigana mwandikisho isanzwe, ishusho ya mwandikisho igaragara kuri mugaragaza, maze umukoresha akayikandaho kugira ngo yandike amagambo.

french_terms: Feuille de calcul TIC | tableur | Excel
definition_kin: Porogaramu ikora ibijyanye no guteranya imibare ikabikora yifashishije imbonerahamwe.
Urutonde rugizwe n’imibare guhera kuri 0 kugera ku 9, rwifashishwa na mudasobwa mu kwandika amakuru agizwe n’imibare.
Ikibaho cya mudasobwa gikoze muri plasitiki cyangwa urundi rupapuro rukweduka, rufite ibimenyetso n’inyuguti na byo bikoze muri izo mpapuro.

Urwego rw’ikoranabuhanga rubarirwamo gukora ibijyanye n’itumanaho, kubigerageza no gukwirakwiza serivisi z’itumanaho hagamijwe iyoherezwa ry’imiraba nyamajwi, za fagisi n’amakuru hagati y’ibikoresho bitegeranye.
Urwego rw’igihugu rufite mu nshingano umutekano w’ibijyanye n’ikoranabuhanga mu itangazabumenyi n’itumanaho.
Igikoresho gifatika gituma umuntu ashobora kugera ku makuru aca mu ihuzanzira koranabuhanga.
Inzira yawe yo kugera ku buryo butangaje bwo kwidagadura bwa Dolby ku mikino, filime n'ibiganiro kuri Xbox, Windows 10 PC cyangwa LG OLED TV yawe.
Imyubakire iri mu byiciro yerekana ubwoko bwa gahunda zishobora cyangwa zigomba kubakwa n’uburyo buri cyiciro kiba cyigenga.

english_terms: Marketing technology system | marketing technology | Martech
definition_kin: Sisitemu y'ikoranabuhanga yo kwamamaza yerekeza ku bikoresho bikoresha ikoranabuhanga mu kunoza ibikorwa byo kwamamaza.
Igikoresho cyifashishwa n’abahagarariye banki mu gukora ibikorwa bya serivisi za banki.
Uburyo bukoresha gahunda nyinshi icyarimwe ku nshobozamudasobwa imwe.
Uburyo bushyirwaho bugamije kurinda inzungano bugenzura iyinjira n’isohoka muri izo nzungano, cyane cyane harindwa igikoresho cy’itangaburenganzira kiba kiri muri izo nzungano.
Urwungano rutuma inyandiko zitandukanye zishobora guhuzwa bityo abantu batandukanye bagashobora kuzikoraho.

Urwungano rw’inkoranabuhanga rufasha ibigo kuboneza imikorere y’ubucuruzi y’ingenzi yabyo, twavuga nk’imari, icungwa ry’abakozi rukomatanyije, ikorabintu, uruhererekane rw’igemurabintu, igurisha n’igura, rugatanga ishusho rusange y’umurimo kandi akaba ari inkomoko yihariye y’ukuri kw’ibikorwa.
Imyigaragarize gitoroniki y’amakuru bwite ashobora gukoreshwa mu kugenzura ibiranga umuntu, urugero nk’uruhushya rwo gutwara ikinyabiziga.

french_terms: Système de contrôle informatisé | système de contrôle
definition_kin: Uburyo butuma ibikoresho byo hanze ya mudasobwa bigenzurwa kugira ngo hashobore gukorwa ingiro nsohoka zikenewe, bukagirwa n’urwinjiriro, inzira n’urusohokero, bukoreshwa nko mu kugenzura amatara, insaku za moteri, n’amaboko y’amarobo.

Inyurabwenge nkoranabuhanga ishingiraho itanga imikorere y’ibanze, ikaba yahindurwa ku buryo butoranyije hakoreshejwe ururimi rwa mudasobwa rw’inyongera rwanditswe n’ukoresha iyo nkoranabuhanga, hagakorwa indi nkoranabuhanga yihariye ijyana n’itsinda ry’inkoranabuhanga.

french_terms: Groupe de sécurité à extension messagerie
definition_kin: Urwungano rutanga uruhushya rwo kugera ku makuru y’amasangiriro mu rutonde rukoreshwa rw’amakuru akoreshwa no kohereza ubutumwa bwa imeri bumenyesha abazikoresha.

french_terms: Carte-mère | carte mère | carte d'ordinateur | carte
definition_kin: Igikoresho mwikorezi cya mudasobwa gituma ibindi bikoresho bihanahana amakuru hagati yabyo, ibyo ni nk’imbikamakuru, inshobozamudasobwa, ikarita y’amashusho n’ibindi bikoresho.

sisitemu y'itumanaho ikoresha umuraba w'imirasire ya radiyo mu rwego rwa micro-onde frequency kugira ngo yohereze videwo, amajwi cyangwa amakuru hagati y'ahantu habiri, hashobora kuba hagati ya metero cyangwa metero nke cyangwa hagati ya kilometero cyangwa kilometero nyinshi.
Ibikoresho cyangwa porogaramu byagenewe gukora kimwe cyangwa bisa cyane na sisitemu y'umwimerere.
sisitemu ya mudasobwa ishingiye kuri poroseseri nto kandi ifite porogaramu zagenewe gukora akazi kayo, haba ku giti cyayo cyangwa muri sisitemu nini.
Uburyo bukoreshwa na sisitemu y'imikorere kugira ngo itunganye, icunge, kandi igere ku madosiye n'ububiko ku gikoresho cyo kubika amakuru.

Urwungano rutanga ahantu ho mu rwego rwo hejuru kugira ngo hagenzurwe ku buryo buhamye amakuru n’ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo hashobore kwemezwa ko inzungano koranabuhanga zigenzurwa kandi zigakorerwa isuzumwa hakurikijwe intego z’ikigo n’ibyerekezo by’inzaduka gifite.
Uruhurirane rwa za gahunda koranabuhanga ruhabwa icyemezo, izo gahunda zishobora gukururwa cyangwa zikagurwa ku buryo twakwita ikirundo cy’ibicuruzwa bifitanye isano.
Itsinda rya mudasobwa ebyiri cyangwa nyinshi cyangwa ibindi bikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga bifitanye isano bikoreshwa hagamijwe guhana amakuru.

Urwungano huzanzira rwa mugabuzi rwihariye rucunga amakuru mpuzanzira no gutanga serivisi z’isangira ry’amafishiye, gucapa inyandiko no kubika inkoranabuhanga nkoresha zikenerwa n’abakiriya habariwemo abakoresha inzungano huzanzira zitandukanye.

english_terms: Systems administrator | IT administrator | system administrator | computer administrator | sysadmin | admin | Root
french_terms: Administrateur de systèmes TIC | Administrateur informatique | administrateur du système | administrateur système | administrateur
definition_kin: Umuntu urema itsinda rubugambaga kandi akaba afite ubushobozi bwo gushyiramo abantu cyangwa akabakuramo.
Utanga umuyoboro w’itumanaho cyangwa serivisi z’itumanaho hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga.

Urwego rwa Leta, rwigenga cyangwa umuntu ku giti cye biha abakoresha serivisi zabo ubushobozi bw’itumanaho hakoreshejwe mudasobwa cyangwa urusobe rwa mudasobwa cyangwa urundi rwego rutunganya cyangwa rubika amakuru abitse mu buryo koranabuhanga mu mwanya wa nyir’iryo tumanaho cyangwa w’abakoresha bene iyo serivisi.

french_terms: Fournisseur de services de certification électronique
definition_kin: Uwemerewe gutanga ibikoresho cyangwa serivisi bisuzuma umwimerere.
Uwahawe uruhushya rwo gutanga umuyoboro wa radiyo cyangwa serivisi z’itumanaho rikomatanya imirongo myinshi.
Umuntu ku giti cye, ikigo cya Leta cyangwa icy’abikorera cyangwa urwego bifite ubuzimagatozi byemerewe gutunganya amakuru bwite mu izina ry’umugenzuzi w’amakuru.
Usaba kugira cyangwa ufite izina ry’urubuga rwa murandasi.

Ubuhanga bwo guhuza amajwi n’amashusho mu isura imwe ntangamakuru byereka abarebyi ishusho yafashwe ku buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga n’imfatashusho ikerekanarwa ku ndebero ya tereviziyo cyangwa y’ikindi gikoresho.
Inkoranabuhanga ngome ikwirakwira muri za mudasobwa ikangiza amakuru n’inkoranabuhanga.
virusi mbi yinjira mu bubiko bwa mudasobwa ikabugumamo, bityo ikabasha kwanduza andi madosiye ya mudasobwa n’iyo itaba iri gukora.
Inkoranabuhanga ngome irangwa no kwisubiramo igakwirakwira mu zindi mudasobwa kandi igakomeza kwangiza inzungano yagezemo.
Inkoranabuahanga ngome yangiza urwungano ntangizi rw’urwungano cyangwa rw’imbikamakuru ahoraho.

Ubwoko bw’inkoranabuhanga yihagurutsa ubwayo igakora ibikorwa bitandukanye nkoranabuhanga bigira ingaruka zidahita zigaragara ikangiza cyane inzungano, irikuba inshuro nyinshi igakirakira mu zindi nzugano ikazangiza.
Ubwoko bwa porogaramu mbi ikora vuba cyane, igatera icyarimwe umurongo utangiza igikoresho n’amadosiye akora porogaramu.

french_terms: Pirate de navigateur | virus de redirection de navigateur
definition_kin: Porogaramu mbi ihindura uburyo bwo gukora bw’umukono w’urubuga idasabye uruhushya rw’umukoresha kandi ikamwohereza ku mbuga atateganyaga gusura.

Inkoranabuhanga ngome ikora ishingiye ku mikorere y’amakode aba yihishe inyuma y’inyandiko y’ifishi, igasakaza amafishiye cyangwa imeri zanduye biva kuri mudasobwa bijya ku yindi, ku buryo ishobora guhanagura imbikamakuru nini yawe, igashyira muri mudasobwa yawe inkoranabuhanga yangiza.
Inkoranabuhanga y’ingome ifata ku mafishiye afunguka ku buryo bwemewe mu rwungano runaka.
Ubwoko bwa porogaramu mbi bwateguwe ku buryo buhindura kenshi isura yabwo cyangwa imikono yabwo hakoreshejwe uburyo bushya bwo gusobanura no gupakurura amakode.
Inkoranabuhanga ngome ishobora kwinjira muri mudasobwa ikangiza ibigize umutekano w’urubuga rwa murandasi.

english_terms: Trojan horse virus | trojan virus | Trojan horse | trojan
definition_kin: Inkoranabuhanga yangiza ihenda
Uburyo bwo gukora porogaramu za Windows (API) mu guteza imbere porogaramu za 32-bit.
Uburyo bwo gutunganya inyandiko bwa Mikorosofuti Wadi, porogaramu ikunzwe cyane yo gutunganya amagambo.
Ikinyabumwe cyo kubika amakuru koranabuhanga, akaba ari ikinyabumwe kinini kuruta ibindi mu bikoreshwa, kikaba kingana na bayiti miriyari igihumbi za terabayiti.
Ikinyabumwe gikoreshwa mu kubika amakuru yo mu ikoranabuhanga kingana na bayiti 1 000 000 000 000 000 000 000.
